title: Paid Media Specialist (B2B)
description:
We are seeking a strategic and results-driven Paid Media Specialist (B2B) to lead and scale our paid acquisition and demand generation efforts. This role is responsible for driving qualified leads, pipeline growth, and revenue through data-backed performance marketing strategies.



The ideal candidate is highly fluent in Google Ads and Meta 
 & Instagram) advertising, with a strong understanding of B2B funnels, attribution, and lifecycle marketing. TikTok experience is a plus. This role sits under the Marketing Department and works closely with Sales, Content, Creative, and CRO teams to ensure consistent, scalable growth.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design, execute, and optimize B2B performance marketing campaigns across Google Ads and Meta to drive leads, MQLs, SQLs, and pipeline growth.

- Own full-funnel strategy from awareness to conversion, managing budgets, bidding, targeting, and channel mix to maximize ROI.

- Analyze campaign performance using GA4, ad platform data, CRM insights, and dashboards to guide decisions and forecasting.

- Continuously test and optimize creatives, audiences, offers, and landing pages, partnering with CRO to improve conversion rates.

- Collaborate with creative and content teams to develop high-performing ad copy and creatives aligned with ICPs and buyer stages.

- Lead and mentor media buyers and performance marketers, supporting recruitment, onboarding, training, and skill development.

- Build scalable workflows, SOPs, and documentation to streamline paid acquisition and lead generation processes.

- Ensure alignment and collaboration across Sales, RevOps, and Marketing teams

- Stay current on performance marketing trends, platform updates, and emerging channels, maintaining certifications and exploring new opportunities.



Qualifications:

- 3+ years in performance marketing with a strong B2B lead generation focus

- Deep expertise in Google Ads and Meta Ads (TikTok is a plus)

- Proven experience managing full-funnel B2B campaigns tied to pipeline and revenue

- Strong understanding of CRO, landing page optimization, and A/B testing

- Experience working with CRM systems and marketing attribution

- Proven leadership experience managing and developing teams

- Data-driven mindset with strong analytical and optimization skills

- Excellent communication, organization, and stakeholder management skills



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement



Want to work on projects that truly move the business forward? If this role feels like your next challenge, apply today and become part of a team that values your expertise.

 for questions or follow-ups.

title: Business Analyst
description:
We are seeking a highly strategic, tech-forward Business Analyst to serve as the connective tissue between stakeholders, operations, and IT execution. This role is responsible for identifying business bottlenecks, architecting scalable system solutions, and driving technology initiatives that elevate performance across the entire organization.



This is not a passive documentation role. This person must think like an operator.



The ideal candidate understands Agency operations deeply, sees operational inefficiencies before they become problems, and can translate business complexity into executable IT projects. Amazon account management, listing optimization, and PPC experience is a strong asset. They must be comfortable challenging assumptions, aligning leadership on priorities, and guiding technical teams toward high-impact outcomes.



Key Responsibilities:

- Lead discovery sessions to uncover operational constraints and workflow inefficiencies.

- Analyze processes end-to-end, mapping current and future workflows for scalability.

- Translate business challenges into project charters, requirements, and actionable plans.

- Collaborate with IT to validate feasibility, manage resources, and oversee execution.

- Enhance systems, dashboards, CRMs, and cross-platform integrations for efficiency.

- Strong working knowledge of Amazon Seller Central and/or Vendor Central operations

- Strong technical literacy (APIs, automation tools, CRM systems, system integrations)

- Strong documentation and process-mapping skills

- Excellent executive-level communication and stakeholder management skills

title: Marketing Automation Specialist
description:
The Marketing Automation Specialist will own, rebuild, and scale My Amazon Guy’s marketing infrastructure, with a primary focus on HubSpot architecture, lifecycle automation, attribution clarity, and governance standards. This is a systems-first, hands-on role responsible for transforming our CRM and marketing automation ecosystem into a clean, scalable, revenue-driving engine. This is not a brand marketing or campaign execution role. This is a technical marketing systems leadership position focused on structure, integrity, and long-term scalability.



Key Responsibilities:

- Audit, clean, and restructure CRM data, workflows, lifecycle stages, and automation

- Remove deprecated assets, deduplicate records, and eliminate redundant processes

- Establish clear lifecycle definitions, segmentation logic, and governance standards

- Build intent-based segmentation and automated journeys tied to revenue movement

- Align marketing automation with sales handoffs and outbound outreach

- Prevent overlapping messaging and ensure accurate intent-driven actions

- Standardize tracking, UTMs, and attribution across marketing and sales platforms

- Improve visibility into MQL ? SQL ? Opportunity progression and reporting accuracy

- Reduce unnecessary broadcast activity and reporting ambiguity

- Implement request protocols, documentation, and long-term system governance



Qualifications:

- 5+ years in Marketing Operations, RevOps, or Marketing Technology

- Deep, hands-on HubSpot experience (required)

- Proven experience cleaning and restructuring complex CRM environments

- Strong understanding of paid media funnels and conversion tracking

- Experience with lifecycle marketing, lead scoring, and segmentation frameworks

- Experience building or restructuring automation systems

- Comfortable enforcing governance and setting system standards

- Experience working with distributed teams (Filipino team experience preferred)



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

title: DSP Strategist
description:
We are looking for a DSP Strategist who combines strong brand management and strategic marketing skills with a solid understanding of digital advertising. In this role, you’ll own the planning, strategy, and campaign oversight for our programmatic display and performance campaigns. The ideal candidate thrives at the intersection of brand growth and data-driven marketing, translating insights into actionable campaign strategies that drive measurable business outcomes.

- Collaborate closely with the DSP Manager to ensure campaigns are optimized for performance while staying on-brand.

- Act as the bridge between brand vision and programmatic execution, providing insights and recommendations for targeting, creatives, and messaging.

- Monitor campaign performance, analyze trends, and report actionable insights to stakeholders.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams (marketing, creative, analytics) to ensure consistency and effectiveness of campaigns.

- Identify opportunities for campaign growth, testing, and innovation within programmatic channels.

- Oversee budget allocation and pacing to maximize ROI across campaigns.

- Stay current with programmatic advertising trends, tools, and industry best practices to maintain a competitive advantage.

- Strong understanding of DSP platforms, programmatic media, and performance marketing principles.

- Excellent analytical skills with the ability to translate data into actionable marketing insights.

- Experience collaborating with cross-functional teams to execute integrated marketing campaigns.

- Familiarity with analytics tools (Google Analytics, Looker, Tableau, or equivalent).

- Strategic thinker with a strong sense of brand and consumer behavior.

- Strong communication and presentation skills for internal and external stakeholders.

title: Website SEO Specialist
description:
The Website SEO Specialist leads the charge in optimizing our website's performance and driving the growth of organic traffic. As part of this role, you'll be at the forefront of boosting our online visibility and attaining top search engine rankings. We're looking for someone with a strategic mindset, a profound enthusiasm for SEO, and an unyielding dedication to delivering measurable outcomes. An SEO Specialist will play a pivotal role in refining our online presence to achieve unmatched success.



If you're a strategic thinker with a passion for SEO and a drive for results, we want you on our team. Join us as a Website SEO Specialist and play a key role in optimizing our online presence for success. Apply now to embark on a rewarding career in digital marketing with us!

- Conduct thorough keyword research to pinpoint pertinent search terms and optimization prospects.

- Carry out technical audits to detect and rectify issues affecting website crawlability, indexing, and ranking.

Qualifications

- Preferably has 2 years of experience previously working at an SEO Agency.

- Proven experience in SEO, with a strong track record of improving search engine rankings and driving organic traffic.

- In-depth knowledge of SEO tools and techniques, including keyword research tools, SEO auditing tools, and analytics platforms.

- Familiarity with HTML, CSS, and website CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress, Shopify) for implementing technical SEO optimizations.

- Strong analytical skills and attention to detail, with the ability to interpret data and draw actionable insights.

- SEO certification or relevant training courses is a plus.

title: Senior Bookkeeper *Superstar Only*
description:
We are looking for an experienced bookkeeper to join our finance team and take ownership of expense categorization, transaction reconciliation, accounts payable, and invoice processing across multiple legal entities.



The bookkeeper will work closely with the CFO, ensuring that all financial transactions are accurately recorded, categorized, and reconciled on a regular basis. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing financial data across multiple platforms — including Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and our custom CRM.



Key Responsibilities

- Categorize all expenses and transactions in Xero, ensuring accurate classification for reporting and compliance

- Reconcile transactions across multiple payment platforms, including Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRM tools

- Manage accounts payable, ensuring all invoices are properly reviewed, recorded, and scheduled for payment

- Assist with invoice processing, ensuring all vendor invoices are accurately documented and match purchase orders where applicable

- Work closely with the CFO to provide up-to-date financial records for monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting

- Ensure all financial data is accurate and properly organized to support compliance across multiple jurisdictions

- Flag discrepancies or unusual transactions for review by the CFO



What We’re Looking For

- At least 5 years of experience in bookkeeping and expense reconciliation

- Strong proficiency in Xero

- Experience working with Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRMs

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Experience handling multi-entity, multi-currency financial data preferred

- Comfortable working in a remote-first environment

- Fluent in English, both written and spoken



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of photo and video editing

- Stable high-speed internet connection

- Conducive work environment



Working Schedule

- Full-time opportunity

- Remote work setup (Philippines-based applicants only)



Benefits

- Competitive salary.

- Paid Time Off from day one, increasing to 10 days annually after six months with the company.

- Training and development opportunities.

- Opportunity to contribute to a rapidly expanding content team producing world-class creator content.

- Great potential for career advancement into leadership positions.



Salary range

title: Social Media Content Producer *Superstar Only*
description:
We're hiring a Social Media Content Producer to own the daily execution, publishing, and production operations behind our short-form content engine across Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. This is the hands-on execution role on the social team. You take creative direction and turn it into finished, polished, published content - fast, clean, and on-brand, every single day.



You will be working directly with a creator who has over 4 million followers across platforms, with Instagram as the primary channel. Our content operation is structured like a studio with batch production, performance metrics, and AI-native systems. You report to the Content Strategist who sets the creative direction and generates the ideas. Your job is to bring those ideas to life - editing, designing, scheduling, publishing, tracking performance, and keeping the entire production machine running smoothly.



This is a full-time remote position. We are looking for a fast, detail-oriented executor who can produce high-quality short-form content at volume, manage publishing workflows across multiple platforms, and actively use AI tools to increase speed and output. A genuine interest in health, beauty, and strong visual aesthetics is essential - this is the world we operate in, and you need to live and breathe it.



Responsibilities

- Produce 2 to 3 short-form videos and supporting graphics per day, including editing, trimming, captioning, and polishing content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

- Execute on creative briefs and direction provided by the Content Strategist, turning concepts into finished, platform-ready assets.

- Design on-brand visuals such as carousels, text graphics, thumbnails, and infographics that support the creator's style and messaging.

- Plan, schedule, and publish short-form content across all platforms while maintaining a balanced mix of educational, inspirational, and trend-based formats.

- Follow short-form trends including audio, hooks, captions, and editing styles, and flag relevant opportunities to the Content Strategist.

- Monitor performance metrics weekly and provide insights, recommendations, and data summaries based on watch time, retention, views, and engagement.

- Source and organize trending sounds, audio, and reference content to support the Content Strategist's ideation process.

- Coordinate collaboration posts and identify smart opportunities for creator crossovers and partnership content.

- Keep systems clean in Asana and Google Drive, ensuring clear task ownership, file naming, version control, and a predictable content runway.

- Use AI tools to streamline editing, captioning, clipping, and repurposing workflows to increase daily output and reduce turnaround time.

- Continuously improve and document production workflows to increase the efficiency and scalability of the content system.



Requirements

- 3+ years of experience creating and publishing short-form content for Instagram, TikTok, and/or YouTube Shorts with proven results.

- Genuine interest in health, beauty, and aesthetics. You naturally follow this space, understand the visual standards, and have an eye for what looks premium.

- Editing and design expertise in short-form video editing using Premiere Pro, CapCut, or Final Cut, and strong design ability using Canva or Photoshop, including thumbnails, carousels, text graphics, and supporting visuals.

- Strong ability to take creative direction and execute it accurately and quickly with minimal revision cycles.

- Deep platform fluency across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and emerging formats, with a clear understanding of distribution mechanics and platform culture.

- Experience managing posting schedules and publishing workflows across multiple platforms, with strong attention to detail, file organization, and systems management.

- Ability to track and interpret performance metrics such as watch time, retention, views, and engagement, and surface insights to inform strategy.

- AI-forward operator who actively uses AI tools in editing and production workflows. Bonus for familiarity with tools such as Runway, VEO or Flow, ChatGPT, or Claude.

- Excellent communication skills for collaborating with the Content Strategist, editors, and cross-functional teams.

- Ability to handle multiple tasks effectively while operating in a high-volume, fast-paced environment.

- Must submit a strong portfolio demonstrating editing, design, and creative execution across multiple short-form formats.

- Recognized for exceptional achievements such as attaining Latin Honors (Summa Cum Laude, Magna Cum Laude, Cum Laude), performance awards, or demonstrating fast career progression into higher roles.



Results

- Social content consistently published within 24 to 48 hours of long-form production wrap.

- Sustained growth in high-quality engagement including shares, saves, retention, and audience sentiment.

- A cohesive, premium social presence that reinforces and amplifies the creator's broader ecosystem.

- Clean, organized production systems with predictable output and minimal missed deadlines.



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of video editing.

- High-speed internet connection plus backup.

- Conducive work environment.



Working Schedule

- Full-time remote position.



Compensation

- Salary will be based on skills, speed, portfolio output, and experience.



Benefits

- Competitive salary.

- Paid Time Off from day one, increasing to 10 days annually after six months with the company.

- Training and development opportunities.

- Opportunity to contribute to a rapidly expanding content team producing world-class creator content.

- Great potential for career advancement into leadership positions.



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.

title: Senior Bookkeeper *Superstar Only*
description:
We are looking for an experienced bookkeeper to join our finance team and take ownership of expense categorization, transaction reconciliation, accounts payable, and invoice processing across multiple legal entities.



The bookkeeper will work closely with the CFO, ensuring that all financial transactions are accurately recorded, categorized, and reconciled on a regular basis. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing financial data across multiple platforms — including Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and our custom CRM.



Key Responsibilities

- Categorize all expenses and transactions in Xero, ensuring accurate classification for reporting and compliance

- Reconcile transactions across multiple payment platforms, including Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRM tools

- Manage accounts payable, ensuring all invoices are properly reviewed, recorded, and scheduled for payment

- Assist with invoice processing, ensuring all vendor invoices are accurately documented and match purchase orders where applicable

- Work closely with the CFO to provide up-to-date financial records for monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting

- Ensure all financial data is accurate and properly organized to support compliance across multiple jurisdictions

- Flag discrepancies or unusual transactions for review by the CFO



What We’re Looking For

- At least 5 years of experience in bookkeeping and expense reconciliation

- Strong proficiency in Xero

- Experience working with Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRMs

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Experience handling multi-entity, multi-currency financial data preferred

- Comfortable working in a remote-first environment

- Fluent in English, both written and spoken



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of photo and video editing

- Stable high-speed internet connection

- Conducive work environment



Working Schedule

- Full-time opportunity

- Remote work setup (Philippines-based applicants only)



Benefits

- Competitive salary.

- Paid Time Off from day one, increasing to 10 days annually after six months with the company.

- Training and development opportunities.

- Opportunity to contribute to a rapidly expanding content team producing world-class creator content.

- Great potential for career advancement into leadership positions.



Salary range

- Php 50,000 - Php 70,000 (based on experience)



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

title: Community Operations & Customer Service Specialist
description:
WE'RE HIRING!



Are you a people-person who LOVES to talk, motivate, and make things happen? Do you get energy from connecting with others and helping them succeed? Then keep reading — this role was made for you!

STEP 1: CREATE YOUR VIDEO (This Is How You Apply!)



Before you submit anything else, we need to see YOU! Record a short 2-3 minute video and tell us:

1. Your name and a quick intro about yourself

2. Why you're excited about working with the Digital Product Creators community

3. What makes you the perfect person to call and support our members every single day

4. How you use Go High Level and your experience with the platform

5. One fun fact about yourself!



No video = No application. Show us your personality — we want to meet YOU!

About the Role: You Will Be on the Phone Every Single Day

Let's be upfront: calling clients is the core of this position. You will be picking up the phone daily to welcome new members, re-engage inactive ones, and be the warm, energetic voice of our community. If you love connecting with people and have the gift of gab — you are going to thrive here!

Daily Client Calls (Your #1 Priority):



• Call and welcome every new member within 24 hours of sign-up — make them feel like a VIP from Day 1!

• Call Ultimate 5-Day Mentorship Experience sign-ups within 48 hours — catch them while they are fired up!

• Proactively call members who have gone quiet at the 15, 30, 45, and 60-day marks — be their accountability partner!

• Answer all incoming calls to the Digital Product Creators Customer Service line — you are the voice of our brand!



More Ways You'll Make an Impact:



• Host engaging sessions inside the Digital Product Creators Community — bring the energy!

• Train members to use Canva for stunning digital product banners and designs

• Manage the chat box during LIVE Zoom certification trainings

• Pitch upgrades to the $497, $997, and $1,997 Digital Marketing System plans

• Monitor and respond to support
s 
 from 11:00 AM to 8:00 PM EST

• Interview top-performing members to create inspiring Case Studies and Success Blueprints



Required Skills & Experience:



• Go High Level (GHL) — REQUIRED: You must have hands-on experience with Go High Level. This is non-negotiable. We use GHL daily to manage pipelines, automations, and member communications.



• Proven customer service or client-facing experience — you are comfortable on the phone every day

• Canva experience (or willingness to learn quickly)

• Comfortable with Zoom and online community platforms

• Strong written communication for
 support



Who Is This Perfect For?

• You LOVE talking to people and could make friends anywhere

• You are organized, reliable, and never drop the ball on follow-ups

• You are motivated by commissions and love seeing people win

• You can work independently and manage your time like a boss

• You are energetic, empathetic, and customer-obsessed



Ready to Join the Team?

Record your 2-3 minute intro video (make sure you tell us your Go High Level experience!), then submit your application today.



We cannot wait to meet you!



Digital Product Creators Community

title: ARE YOU OUR NEXT LEAD GENERATION SPECIALIST? APPLY NOW!
description:
Schedule: Monday–Thursday or Monday-Friday



NOW HIRING: TELEMARKETER / OUTBOUND SALES CALLER



Weekly Bonuses + Career Growth + High-Energy Team Culture



Are you confident on the phone, motivated by goals, and excited by the idea of earning bonuses based on performance? We’re looking for driven and energetic Telemarketers / Outbound Sales Callers based in the Philippines to join our growing team.



This role is perfect for someone who enjoys talking to people, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and knows how to turn conversations into opportunities.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Making outbound calls to prospective customers

Introducing our services and generating interest

Qualifying leads and scheduling appointments for our licensed sales team

Accurately documenting call outcomes and follow-ups

Meeting weekly performance goals

Bringing energy, professionalism, and consistency to every call



What We’re Looking For:

Strong English communication skills (spoken and written)

Confident, upbeat, and professional phone presence

Comfortable handling objections and staying resilient

Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

Previous telemarketing, cold calling, or sales experience preferred

Positive attitude and team-oriented mindset



What You’ll Get:

Competitive Base Pay + Performance Bonuses

Weekly bonus opportunities and incentives

Ongoing coaching, scripts, and support

Clear growth opportunities within the company

Fully remote work setup

Fun, supportive, and goal-driven team environment

Our Zoom Culture:

We operate in a collaborative virtual environment where cameras and microphones remain on during working hours (except during breaks and lunch). We value professionalism, engagement, accountability, and strong team communication.



Bonus Points If You:

Love hitting goals and earning incentives

Are self-motivated and dependable

Bring positive energy to the team daily

Can confidently handle rejection and bounce back quickly



To Apply:

Please send us a short 1–2 minute introduction video sharing:



Your background

Any relevant experience

Why you’d be a great fit for this role



If you’re ready to grow your career, sharpen your sales skills, and be part of a team that values performance and culture — we’d love to hear from you.



Apply today and grow with us, one call at a time!

title: IT & AI Automation Specialist / Tech VA
description:

Key Responsibilities:



Build and maintain automations using Zapier /

title: (Remote) HubSpot Sales Operations @ https://crisp.co/
description:
Compensation: $2,300 USD/month



Time Commitment: ~40+ available hours/weekly



Working Hours: 8:55am–6:00pm EST (or longer as required to get the work done)



Engagement Type: Independent Contractor



Location: Remote (US-based hours required)



English Mastery and Working Culture Notice: Native-sounding and command-of-spoken English (and, of course, written English) is imperative in this role, as you will be working directly with U.S.-based Sales leadership and tea
mbers. Please do not apply if you do not meet this requirement. Additionally, prior experience working with U.S. companies and operating in fast-paced, high-performance environments is critical.





Do you enjoy working inside systems, fixing what’s broken, and making things run correctly?



Can you take messy, inconsistent data and turn it into something accurate, reliable, and usable?



Do you get satisfaction from building workflows, troubleshooting issues, and ensuring nothing slips through the cracks?



Final question: When faced with a complex challenge, do you get excited, or run away?



At Crisp, we’re on a mission to help 10,000 law firms each grow their revenue by $10,000,000 over the next 10 years, creating a $10 billion impact in the legal industry.



We operate with the intensity of a championship team, where every player is expected to bring their best, own their outcomes, and drive results.



We’re hiring a HubSpot Sales Data Operations tea
mber to support our Sales organization by owning data accuracy, workflow execution, and system reliability inside HubSpot.



This role exists for one reason:



…to ensure that our HubSpot data is accurate, our sales workflows function correctly, and our Sales team can operate without friction, enabling leadership to make decisions based on reliable data and drive revenue growth. If data is wrong, decisions are wrong. This role ensures that never happens.



** IMPORTANT: TO APPLY **

You will be evaluated and vetted based on your ability to follow instructions:

Follow the following Willo link (recorded interview platform), and answer the few questions on there, first.



Willo Link: 



Then reply to the ad, stating you’ve completed the Willo, and we will be in touch.



Who You Are:



You are highly detail-oriented and process-driven.

You take ownership of problems and solve them without being handheld.

You move with urgency and do not let tasks sit idle.

You are highly experienced being the HubSpot expert and troubleshooting issues independently.

You are not afraid to “get your hands dirty” fixing data and cleaning systems.

You communicate clearly and directly.

You can handle a fast-paced, high-pressure environment with strong personalities.

You do not make excuses, rather, you find solutions.



What You’ll Do:



HubSpot Data Ownership & Accuracy

Own data cleanliness and accuracy inside HubSpot across the entire sales pipeline

Identify and fix incorrect, incomplete, or inconsistent data

Ensure all sales data reflects reality and can be trusted for decision-making

Workflow & Automation Execution

Build, maintain, and troubleshoot HubSpot workflows and automations

Ensure lead routing, deal movement, and task assignments function correctly

Reduce friction for Sales by simplifying and optimizing workflows

Sales Pipeline & Reporting Support

Maintain and support the integrity of the deal pipeline (lead ? calls ? close)

Ensure accurate tracking of sales KPIs and performance metrics

Support and maintain integrations feeding into reporting systems (e.g., “Daily Dash”)

System Troubleshooting & Problem Solving

Diagnose issues across HubSpot, integrations, and workflows

Work cross-functionally with Sales tea
mbers to identify root causes

Implement solutions quickly without waiting for direction

Process Documentation & Training

Build and maintain clear, step-by-step process documentation (“point-and-click” SOPs)

Train Sales tea
mbers on correct system usage

Ensure new hires are properly set up and onboarded in HubSpot and related tools

Quality Control & System Integrity

Ensure all workflows, automations, and data structures are functioning correctly

Continuously monitor for errors, inconsistencies, and breakdowns

Escalate issues quickly and proactively

Our Requirements Are Pretty Straightforward. To Qualify You Must:

2+ years experience managing a company’s HubSpot instance for Sales

Strong understanding of sales pipelines and funnel stages

Proven experience building workflows and automations

Strong problem-solving ability and resourcefulness

High level of proficiency in Google Sheets (formulas, lookups, data handling)

Ability to work independently and execute without constant direction

Strong written and spoken English

Ability to work U.S. business hours consistently

Ability to move quickly without sacrificing accuracy



Bonus:



HubSpot certifications

Experience with the following integrations: Zapier, Coefficient

Familiarity with sales tools such as Zoom Phone or similar systems

Exposure to AI tools or automation platforms



In Return, Here’s Our Promise to You:



At Crisp, we don’t just hire people: we build A-players.

Clear expectations. You will know exactly what success looks like.

High-impact work. Your work directly affects revenue decisions.

Fast-paced environment. Work moves quickly and decisively.

Growth opportunity. Strong performance leads to expanded responsibility.

Ownership culture. You are trusted to solve problems and execute.



Why Our Work Matters:



Lawyers go to law school to learn how to practice law, but law school doesn’t teach them how to run a business. In a world where the best cases often go to the best marketers, not necessarily the best lawyers, legal expertise alone isn’t enough. That’s where Crisp comes in.



We partner with committed, growth-minded law firms that care deeply about their teams, clients, and communities. Often, it’s a David vs. Goliath scenario, where the most dedicated attorneys lack the resources of their larger competitors.



Our mission is to level the playing field, equipping these firms with the tools, strategies, and support they need to stand out and win.



We empower law firms to not only grow their businesses but also make a bigger impact — delivering better outcomes and driving positive change.



At Crisp, we’re here to ensure that the best law firms, no matter their size, have a fighting chance to lead, serve, and transform their communities.



By empowering our law firm clients to succeed, we’re not just building stronger businesses; we’re creating a ripple effect of positive change that impacts lives, families, and communities across the country.



About Crisp:



Crisp is an incredibly fast-moving, high-growth company (1470%+ growth in 3 years) with a laser focus on delivering the absolute best legal marketing and business coaching services on the market today.



Check out what we are about here: www.crisp.co/careers 



We’re all about working hard and staying humble. In the spirit of humble bragging, here are some of our awards and accolades:

Crisp Founder and CEO Michael Mogill named EY Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2023

Named to Inc. 5000 List of Fastest-Growing Private Companies for 7-Years (2024, 2022, 2021, 2020, 2019, 2018, 2017)

Atlanta’s fastest-growing companies 9 years in a row (2024, 2023, 2022, 2021, 2020, 2019, 2018, 2017, 2016)

Recognized as Atlanta’s Best Places to Work

Creators and annual hosts of the Crisp Game Changers Summit, the largest and most ambitious law firm growth conference on Earth 

Published the legal industry’s best-selling marketing book 

Host of the most listened-to podcast in the legal industry 

Featured in Forbes, The Wall Street Journal, TechCrunch, Yahoo, and The Huffington Post



Why You Should Work Here:



You will work in a company where operations and systems are taken seriously

You will be part of building and improving core sales infrastructure

You will gain exposure to high-level sales operations and systems

You will be pushed to grow and perform at a high level



If you’re looking for a job that’s boring and easy, you won’t find that here. We put 110% into everything we do. Greatness is achieved through hard work, discipline, and sacrifice, and we’re determined to be great. 



If you want to solve real problems, own systems, and operate at a high level — apply.

title: Digital Specialist
description:
Here Molly Girl/Script Marketing



Digital Specialist (Long-Term, Remote)

Full-time

Work Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (Alabama, USA Central Time Zone)



Role Overview

We are a growing marketing firm seeking a highly detail-oriented Digital Specialist to support website builds, ongoing maintenance, and technical marketing infrastructure across multiple client accounts.



This role is execution-focused and requires strong technical proficiency in WordPress, website hosting environments, digital tracking tools, and foundational SEO support. You will be responsible for keeping websites running smoothly, implementing updates, and ensuring all tracking and backend systems are functioning correctly.



This is an ideal role for someone who enjoys working behind the scenes, solving problems, and bringing structure and consistency to digital systems. You will report to the company owner, and work with all members of the team. 



About Here Molly Girl and Script

Here Molly Girl is a local marketing firm specializing in full-service marketing, design, and website service for a variety of clients. We’re a small, close team who believe in doing great work and having fun while doing it. 



Our sister company, Script, is a marketing firm specializing in full-service marketing for landscaping companies. Script clients are based throughout the U.S. 



All tea
mbers work for both companies.



Core Responsibilities (Required)



WordPress Website Management & Builds

• Execute updates to WordPress websites, including:

         - Text and image updates

         - Blog uploads and formatting

         - Page creation and layout adjustments

• Build new websites based on provided wireframes (Adobe XD or similar)

• Ensure all websites are responsive, visually accurate, and aligned with design intent

• Troubleshoot layout, plugin, or functionality issues

• Standard updates completed within 24–48 hours

• Website builds completed based on project timelines, with consistent progress updates



Website Hosting & WPMUDEV Management (Critical)

This is a core platform for our agency, and strong familiarity with hosting environments is required.

• Manage websites within the WPMU DEV platform, including:

         - Setting up new website backends

         - Managing hosting environments

         - Clearing cache and resolving performance issues

         - Deactivating object cache when needed

         - Updating and maintaining custom site templates

         - Deleting or archiving sites as needed

• Ensure all sites are properly maintained and functioning

• Hosting-related tasks handled within 24–48 hours

• Urgent issues addressed same-day



Website Maintenance (Ongoing Client Work)

• Perform quarterly website maintenance, including:

         - Updating WordPress core, themes, and plugins

         - Testing site functionality after updates

         - Ensuring site security and performance

• Conduct monthly SEO check-ins and basic optimizations

• Maintenance completed within scheduled windows

• Issues identified and resolved proactively



Analytics, Tracking & Technical Setup

• Set up and manage:

         - Google Analytics (GA4)

         - Google Search Console

         - Google Tag Manager

         - Bing Webmaster Tools

• Install and verify tracking codes:

         - Meta Pixel

         - Pinterest Tag

         - LinkedIn Insight Tag

• Set up and review session tracking tools such as Microsoft Clarity

• Ensure all tracking is firing correctly and data is accurate

• New setups completed within 2–3 business days

• Troubleshooting completed within 24–48 hours



Domains, Hosting &
 Setup

• Manage domain-related tasks, including:

         - Purchasing domains

         - Transferring domains to Namecheap

         - DNS configuration and updates

         - SSL setup (via Namecheap and VPN when required)

• Set up business
 via Google Workspace; Microsoft when required

• Configure
 deliverability using SMTP2GO

• Standard setups completed within 2–3 business days



Website Tools, Plugins & Compliance

• Work with preferred WordPress plugins and tools

• Implement:

         - Cookie consent banners and policy pages (e.g., via Complianz)

         - CSS updates using internal repositories when needed

• Utilize preferred Chrome extensions for efficient builds



Content & Platform Updates

• Upload and format blog posts (including images)

• Perform updates across WordPress and occasional alternate platforms (Webflow, etc.)

• Support ongoing website content updates for client accounts



SEO Support & Optimization

• Conduct basic SEO checks and ongoing improvements across client websites

• Utilize tools such as SEMrush to:

         - Review keyword rankings

         - Identify opportunities for on-page optimization

         - Monitor site health and flag technical issues

• Implement on-page SEO best practices, including:

         - Updating meta titles and descriptions

         - Optimizing headers (H1, H2, etc.)

         - Ensuring proper internal linking

         - Reviewing basic keyword placement within content

• Assist with blog SEO optimization prior to publishing

• Identify and flag larger SEO issues for the team

• Monthly SEO checks completed within scheduled timeframe

• Identified issues addressed or flagged within 24–48 hours



Quality Assurance & Troubleshooting

• Conduct regular QA checks for:

         - Broken links

         - Tracking issues

         - Formatting inconsistencies

• Proactively identify and resolve issues before they impact clients

• Test all updates before marking tasks complete



Task & Workflow Management

• Work within project management tool (
) and Slack

• Maintain clear communication on task status and timelines

• Follow internal processes and documentation (knowledgebase + screen recordings)



Nice to Have (Not Required)

• Experience editing and publishing podcasts using Podbean platform

• Experience with Webflow

• CSS editing experience



Ideal Candidate Profile

• 3-5 years experience – this is not an entry level role

• Strong hands-on experience with WordPress (required)

• Comfortable working in hosting environments and managing technical backend tasks

• Comfortable troubleshooting independently before escalating issues

• Highly detail-oriented and organized

• Able to follow documented processes and work independently

• Strong written communication skills

• Proactive problem solver



Working Style Expectations

• Need to work U.S. central time zone hours 

• Must be fluent in English

• Must have reliable internet and computer

• Able to manage multiple tasks across different clients

• Consistent follow-through and attention to detail

• Willingness to learn and adapt to internal systems and processes



Compensation & Payment

• Competitive pay based on experience 

• Hours: Full-time (40 hours/week), Monday–Friday, 8 AM–5 PM CST (Alabama, USA time)

• Pay frequency: Weekly for the first 2 months, then biweekly/monthly (to be discussed)

• Payment method: Wise



What We Offer:

• Full-time opportunity with part-time workload to start (plenty of room to grow)

• Long-term stability for the right candidate

• A supportive and fun work environment

• Clear expectations, efficient processes, and an owner who values your time and contributions

• Paid time off available after 3-month trial period

• Philippine national holidays observed

• Flexible unpaid leave with advance notice



Application Instructions (Required)

To be considered for this role, you must complete the following steps:



1. Subject Line Requirement

When you apply, your message subject line must be: Digital Specialist – Detail Matters



2. Short Video (Required – No Exceptions)

Please record a 2–4 minute video telling me the following:

1. Your experience working with WordPress (what types of sites, what you typically do)

2. Your experience with website hosting or platforms like WPMU DEV (or similar tools)

3. One example of a technical issue you’ve solved on a website (what happened and how you fixed it)

4. Why this role specifically interests you



Important:

• This must be a new video created specifically for this application

• Please begin your video by saying:

“Hi Katy, this is my application for the Digital Specialist role.”



What Happens Next

If you’re selected to move forward in the hiring process, here’s what to expect:

1. I’ll first send you a short list of written questions through the OnlineJobs.ph messaging system to learn more about your experience and how you think.

2. After that, we’ll schedule a Zoom call for a brief interview.



Don’t worry — I’m not concerned about your background, camera setup, or what’s behind you during the Zoom call. This is a remote role, and part of it will include communicating with me and our team on Zoom, so I just need to know that you’re comfortable participating in video meetings when needed.

title: UK Image Ad Creator - Dropshipping Company
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a talented and detail-oriented UK Image Ad Creator to design high-converting static and animated image advertisements for our growing dropshipping brand portfolio. You will be responsible for producing scroll-stopping visuals that are optimised for Meta

This role is ideal for a creative professional who thrives at the intersection of aesthetics and performance — someone who understands that a great ad is not just beautiful, but built to sell. You will work closely with our UK Creative Strategist and media buying team to bring winning creative concepts to life at scale.



Key Responsibilities



Image Ad Design & Production

• Design and produce high-quality static image ads for Meta 

• Create multiple ad variations per brief (e.g., different hooks, colour schemes, formats) for A/B testing purposes.

• Ensure all creatives meet platform-specific size, resolution, and compliance requirements.

• Produce on-brand ad creative that aligns with product positioning and target audience preferences.

• Adapt winning ad templates to new products rapidly and efficiently.



Creative Brief Execution

• Interpret creative briefs from the Creative Strategist and translate them into visually compelling ad assets.

• Collaborate with copywriters to integrate ad copy seamlessly into visual designs.

• Incorporate performance insights (e.g., hook effectiveness, visual attention heatmaps) into design iterations.

• Maintain a consistent design language across all brand touchpoints while testing new visual styles.



Brand & Asset Management

• Organise and manage a well-structured library of creative assets, templates

• Ensure all image assets are correctly labelled, versioned, and stored for easy retrieval.

• Stay current with design trends on UK social media platforms and incorporate fresh visual styles into ad production.



Performance-Driven Iteration

• Review ad performance data in collaboration with media buyers to identify which visual elements drive the highest CTR and conversion rates.

• Proactively suggest design improvements based on performance feedback.

• Produce rapid creative iterations based on testing results, ensuring a consistent pipeline of fresh ad creative.



Required Skills & Qualifications

• 2+ years of experience in graphic design, digital advertising, or social media creative production.

• Proficiency in Canva Pro.

• Strong portfolio showcasing image ad creative for eCommerce or direct response campaigns.

• Understanding of design principles as applied to paid social advertising (hierarchy, contrast, CTA placement, white space).

• Knowledge of UK social media trends, platform aesthetics, and consumer visual preferences.

• Ability to produce high volumes of quality creative assets under tight deadlines.

• Strong communication skills and ability to take and implement creative feedback efficiently.



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience designing ads specifically for dropshipping or DTC eCommerce brands.

• Basic understanding of colour psychology and how it influences consumer purchase behaviour.

• Knowledge of Meta Ads Manager creative specs and best practices.

title: Senior Media Buyer - Dropshipping Company
description:
About the Role

We are hiring an experienced Senior Media Buyer to lead the planning, execution, and optimisation of paid advertising campaigns across our dropshipping brand portfolio. You will be responsible for managing significant ad budgets in Meta — with a singular focus on driving profitable growth at scale.

This is a senior, high-impact role best suited for a media buying professional who has a deep understanding of direct response advertising, audience segmentation, and creative-data loops. You will have direct influence over the company's revenue trajectory and will work hand-in-hand with the creative strategy and finance teams to maximise return on ad spend (ROAS).



Key Responsibilities



Campaign Strategy & Execution

• Own and manage paid advertising campaigns across Meta 
)

• Develop full-funnel media buying strategies from awareness through retargeting and conversion.

• Structure ad accounts using best-practice campaign architecture (Campaign Budget Optimisation, ASC+, TOFU/MOFU/BOFU).

• Launch and scale winning campaigns, identifying the most profitable audience segments, placements, and bidding strategies.

• Manage daily, weekly, and monthly ad spend budgets 



Creative Testing & Optimisation

• Collaborate with the Creative Strategist to build structured creative testing frameworks aligned with media buying insights.

• Identify patterns in top-performing creatives and feed insights back into the creative production pipeline.

• Monitor and act on key performance metrics including CTR, CPM, CPC, CPA, ROAS, and LTV.

• Execute rapid iteration cycles to pause underperformers, scale winners, and introduce fresh creative consistently.



Audience & Market Research

• Build detailed customer personas and audience segments based on demographic, psychographic, and behavioural data.

• Leverage first-party data, lookalike audiences, interest stacking, and retargeting lists to build effective audience pools.

• Monitor competitor advertising activity through ad intelligence tools such as Meta Ad Library.

• Stay current with algorithm updates, platform policy changes, and emerging ad formats to maintain a competitive edge.



Budget Management & Financial Accountability

• Maintain strict budget discipline across all accounts, ensuring spend is aligned to targets 

• Provide daily and weekly spend reports, flagging anomalies, budget pacing issues, and optimisation opportunities.

• Work closely with the Finance Specialist to reconcile ad spend against revenue attribution and ensure accurate ROAS reporting.

• Forecast monthly ad spend requirements and anticipated returns based on current campaign performance trends.



Team Leadership & Mentorship

• Mentor junior media buyers and support their professional development in paid advertising.

• Lead performance marketing reviews and contribute to overarching go-to-market strategy discussions.

• Collaborate cross-functionally with product, creative, and operations teams during product launches.



Required Skills & Qualifications

• 5+ years of hands-on media buying experience in a dropshipping, DTC eCommerce, or performance marketing agency setting.

• Proven track record of scaling eCommerce brands profitably with Meta

• Advanced proficiency in Meta Business Manager

• Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data from multiple sources and make data-driven decisions.

• Excellent understanding of the dropshipping business model, including product cycle, margins, and scaling constraints.



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience scaling Shopify-based dropshipping stores

• Understanding of creative iteration frameworks and their relationship to media buying outcomes.

title: Finance Specialist - Dropshipping Company
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a commercially minded and detail-oriented Finance Specialist to manage and optimise the financial operations of our dropshipping business. In this role, you will be the financial backbone of the company — responsible for budgeting, cash flow management, ad spend reconciliation, profitability analysis, supplier payment coordination, and financial reporting.

This role is ideally suited for a finance professional with experience in eCommerce or digital marketing environments who understands the unique financial dynamics of dropshipping — including high transaction volumes, variable ad spend, supplier payment cycles, and multi-currency operations.



Key Responsibilities



Financial Reporting & Analysis

• Prepare accurate weekly, monthly, and quarterly profit & loss (P&L) statements, balance sheets, and cash flow reports.

• Analyse revenue, gross margin, cost of goods sold (COGS), and net profitability at both product and brand level.

• Provide actionable financial insights and forecasts to the senior leadership team to support strategic decision-making.

• Track key financial KPIs including net margin and return on ad spend (ROAS).



Budgeting & Forecasting

• Develop and manage the company's annual and rolling financial budgets across all departments.

• Build financial models to forecast revenue scenarios, break-even points, and growth projections.

• Partner with the media buying team to allocate and monitor advertising budgets across platforms.

• Proactively identify cost-saving opportunities and recommend budget reallocations based on performance data.



Ad Spend Reconciliation & Attribution

• Reconcile daily and weekly advertising expenditure in Meta

• Work closely with the Senior Media Buyer to ensure ad spend reports are accurate and aligned with financial records.

• Manage credit card and payment platform reconciliation for all advertising accounts.

• Identify discrepancies in spend reporting and resolve with platform support or internal stakeholders.



Cash Flow Management

• Monitor and manage company cash flow to ensure sufficient liquidity for operations, supplier payments, and ad spend commitments.

• Forecast cash flow requirements on a rolling 30/60/90-day basis.

• Coordinate with payment processors to optimise payout schedules and minimise cash flow gaps.

• Manage foreign currency exposure and advise on FX risk mitigation strategies.



Supplier & Vendor Payments

• Oversee the timely processing of supplier invoices, dropshipping fulfilment partner payments, and platform fees.

• Manage accounts payable and ensure payment terms are negotiated and adhered to.

• Track and reconcile supplier refund claims, chargebacks, and dispute resolutions.



Systems & Process Improvement

• Design and implement scalable financial processes and internal controls as the business grows.

• Automate repetitive financial workflows using integrations between eCommerce, advertising, and accounting platforms.



Required Skills & Qualifications

• 3+ years of experience in a finance, accounting, or financial analyst role — preferably within eCommerce, digital marketing, or a high-growth startup.

• Strong experience with financial modelling, budgeting, and forecasting in Excel or Google Sheets.

• Solid understanding of eCommerce revenue models, including COGS, gross margin, and contribution margin analysis.

• Experience reconciling advertising spend across platforms such as Meta Ads Manager

• Excellent analytical and numerical skills with meticulous attention to detail.



Preferred Qualifications

• Direct experience managing finances for a dropshipping or DTC eCommerce business.

• Familiarity with Shopify financial reporting, Stripe payouts, and PayPal reconciliation.

• Experience with financial automation tools and API integrations between platforms.

title: Bookkeeper / Accountant – Logistics Industry
description:
Compensation & Benefits

• Paid weekly or bi-weekly

• Paid training and onboarding

• No weekends

• USD $8/hour = PHP 480/hour (based on experience)

• Remote, with potential to go full time.  Future promotions also possible 



Hey There!

We're an accounting/Finance/Fractional CFO firm serving the logistics industry — trucking companies, freight brokers, 3PLs, and warehousing operations across the U.S. — and we're growing fast.

We're looking for a sharp, detail-obsessed Bookkeeper / Accountant who loves clean books, knows their way around debits and credits in their sleep, and isn't afraid to ask questions when something doesn't tie out. If you're proactive, organized, and take pride in delivering accurate financials on time — we want you!

This is NOT a data-entry-only role. This is NOT a job where you just push buttons and hope for the best. This is a results-driven role focused on owning the books for real clients in a fast-paced industry.

If you're naturally curious, comfortable communicating in English with U.S.-based clients, and excited to specialize in logistics accounting, you'll thrive here.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

• Manage full-cycle bookkeeping for multiple logistics clients (AP, AR, bank/credit card reconciliations, journal entries)

• Categorize and reconcile high-volume transactions including fuel, tolls, driver settlements, factoring, and freight invoices

• Prepare monthly financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow) and month-end close packages

• Process payroll-related entries and 1099 contractor tracking

• Maintain accurate records in QuickBooks Online (and TMS platforms like McLeod, SunnyBrook, or Tai where applicable)

• Communicate directly with U.S.-based clients via
, Slack, and video calls

• Flag discrepancies, missing documents, or unusual transactions proactively

• Use tools like ClickUp or Asana to track tasks and deadlines

________________________________________

Requirements

• Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

• 3+ years of bookkeeping or accounting experience (logistics/transportation industry experience is a HUGE plus)

• Proficient in QuickBooks Online (QBO ProAdvisor certification a plus)

• Strong spreadsheet skills required (Excel/Google Sheets) — comfortable with pivot tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, SUMIFS,    conditional formatting, and building clean, formula-driven workbooks. 

• Strong understanding of U.S. GAAP basics and accrual vs. cash accounting

• Fluent in written and spoken English (tested during application)

• Available during U.S. business hours overlap (insert PH hours, e.g., 10PM – 6 AM PH time), Mon–Fri

• If I ask you what your favorite food is, say pizza.  this will be asked in your application

• Strong internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps) and a quiet, professional workspace

• Familiar or willing to learn: TMS platforms (McLeod, SunnyBrook), 
, Ramp/Brex, ClickUp, Asana, Slack

• Laptop/PC with at least i5 processor, 8GB RAM, dual monitors preferred



• Apply Now: Complete the application form here: 

• Note: There's a secret question in the form. Read carefully — incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Bookkeeper / Accountancy Assistant (UK Accounting Practice)
description:
Bookkeeper / Accountancy Assistant (UK Accounting Practice)

Remote 



About the Role

We are recruiting on behalf of a UK-based accountancy practice working with a diverse client portfolio including sole traders, limited companies, and high-net-worth individuals.



The firm provides bookkeeping, payroll, year-end accounts, tax returns, and financial support services across multiple industries such as hospitality, construction, retail, and creator-led businesses.



This is a hands-on bookkeeping role focused on maintaining accurate financial records, ensuring reconciliations are completed correctly, and supporting clear financial reporting across multiple clients and systems.



You will be working in a fast-paced, detail-driven environment where accuracy, communication, and consistency are essential.



Working Style



Remote role

Fast-paced, deadline-driven environment

Collaborative team structure with accountants and support staff

Strong focus on client communication and financial clarity







Key Responsibilities



Bookkeeping & Daily Accounting



Perform daily bookkeeping and transaction categorisation (income and expenses)

Maintain accurate and structured Chart of Accounts

Process invoices, bills, and recurring expenses

Support accounts receivable and accounts payable management





Reconciliations & Financial Accuracy



Complete bank and credit card reconciliations (monthly and ongoing)

Maintain clean and accurate ledgers across multiple clients

Identify and correct errors, duplicates, or miscategorised transactions

Minimise reliance on journals through clean bookkeeping practices





Reporting & Financial Support



Prepare and review P&L, balance sheet, and general ledger reports

Support VAT-related bookkeeping and compliance preparation

Ensure financial records are accurate and ready for review

Provide clarity on client financial positions where required





Client & Stakeholder Communication



Liaise with clients, vendors, and banks to resolve discrepancies

Communicate clearly and professionally regarding financial queries

Support clients using both QuickBooks Online and Xero

Escalate issues or risks where necessary





Multi-Client Management



Manage multiple client files across different industries

Maintain organisation across competing deadlines and priorities

Ensure consistent quality across all client accounts







Required Skills & Experience



Solid bookkeeping or accountancy experience (UK exposure preferred)

3–5+ years experience using QuickBooks Online (essential)

Strong experience with Xero accounting software (highly preferred)

Strong understanding of reconciliations and Chart of Accounts

Knowledge of UK VAT principles and bookkeeping standards

Experience managing multiple client accounts simultaneously

Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills (pivot tables preferred)

Experience with tools such as CRMs or workflow systems (e.g. Asana, Airtable) is an advantage







Key Attributes

We are looking for someone who:



Has exceptional attention to detail and accuracy

Is confident handling financial data with integrity

Communicates proactively and asks the right questions

Works well under deadlines and fast-paced conditions

Can adapt to different client styles and requirements

Has a problem-solving mindset when handling discrepancies

Maintains a client-focused and professional approach







What This Role Is NOT

? Basic data entry bookkeeping role

? Low-responsibility or transactional-only accounting work

? Role without client interaction or ownership

title: AI Creative Designer for $500K/Month Skincare Brand | Beauty Ads + Higgsfield + Long-Term Role
description:
We are a fast-growing skincare brand doing around $500K/month, and we are building a new kind of creative team.



Our goal is to produce beauty ad creative faster, smarter, and better than traditional brands by combining AI image generation, strong visual taste, direct-response marketing, and performance data.



We are looking for a full-time AI Performance Creative Designer who can help us create high-volume static ads for our skincare campaigns.



This role is perfect for someone who loves beauty, advertising, AI tools, image generation, copywriting, and performance marketing.



You will mainly use Higgsfield to create realistic skincare and beauty ad images. Experience with tools like GPT Image, Sora, Nano Banana, Midjourney, Runway, Photoshop, Figma, or Canva is a big plus.



But this is not just a “prompting” role.



We are looking for someone who understands that great ad creative needs to sell an idea, not just look nice.



Why This Role Is Exciting



AI is changing the way brands create ads.



Most companies are still slow. They need photographers, studios, models, editors, and weeks of back-and-forth just to create a few images.



We want to move faster.



You’ll help us build a creative system that can produce dozens of fresh ad concepts every week, test them in the market, learn what works, and create better versions.



You will get to work on:



AI-generated beauty ads

Skincare product visuals

Anti-aging and skin confidence concepts

Ingredient-focused creative

UGC-style static ads

Premium beauty campaign images

Before/after-style concepts

Advertorial and landing page visuals

Meta ad creative for
 and Instagram



This is a chance to become highly skilled in one of the most valuable new creative fields: AI-powered performance advertising.



What You’ll Do



Your main job will be to create high-quality static ad images using AI tools and design tools.



You will:



Create 80–120 static ad variations per week

Use Higgsfield to generate realistic beauty and skincare images

Turn marketing angles into visual ad concepts

Create variations for different hooks, emotions, customer problems, product benefits, and objections

Add simple but effective text overlays and headlines

Use Photoshop, Figma, Canva, or similar tools to clean up and polish images

Organize all creative into clean Google Drive folders

Label files clearly by campaign, angle, concept, and date

Study winning ads and create new variations based on what is working

Work with our creative strategist and founder to improve creative quality over time



You will not be expected to invent every angle from scratch. We will give you campaign angles, reference images, product assets, examples, and feedback.



But we do want someone who can think, not just follow instructions.



Who We’re Looking For



You may be a great fit if you:



Have experience creating AI-generated images

Have good visual taste

Understand beauty, skincare, or ecommerce ads

Have copywriting instincts

Know how to make images feel realistic, clean, and scroll-stopping

Can use tools like Higgsfield, Photoshop, Figma, Canva, or similar platforms

Are organized with folders, file names, and creative batches

Can work quickly without sacrificing quality

Can take feedback and improve fast

Are curious about what makes ads perform

Want to become excellent at AI-powered creative production



You do not need a degree.



You do not need perfect English.



You do need strong taste, speed, curiosity, and the ability to learn.



What Makes Someone Excellent in This Role



The best person for this role is not just someone who can generate pretty images.



The best person can look at an ad angle like:



“Makeup that improves your skin over time”



and turn it into 20 different visual ideas.



For example:



A woman applying CC cream in soft morning light

A product shot surrounded by skincare ingredients

A split image showing dull skin vs glowing skin

A close-up of smooth, hydrated mature skin

A premium editorial-style beauty visual

A UGC-style bathroom mirror image

A dermatologist-inspired concept

A clean advertorial image with product benefits



That is the skill we are hiring for.



You need to be part designer, part AI operator, part copywriter, and part marketer.



Tools We Use



Main tool:



Higgsfield



Helpful tools:



Photoshop

Figma

Canva

GPT Image

Sora

Nano Banana

Midjourney

Runway

Google Drive

ClickUp



You do not need to know every tool already, but you must be excited to learn new AI creative tools quickly.



What Success Looks Like



You are doing a great job if:



You consistently produce strong creative every week

Your images look realistic and polished

Your ads clearly communicate the angle

Your folders are clean and easy to navigate

You improve based on feedback

You notice patterns in what works

You start suggesting better image ideas over time



The goal is not to make random AI images.



The goal is to help us create ads that can be tested, improved, and scaled.



Growth Path



For the right person, this role can grow into a bigger creative position.



Possible future paths include:



Lead AI Creative Designer

AI Creative Strategist

Creative Production Manager

Performance Creative Specialist



As the brand grows, we want the right people to grow with us.



If you are hungry, curious, organized, and creative, this can become much more than a design role.

title: UK Creative Strategist - Dropshipping Company
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a results-driven UK Creative Strategist to lead the ideation, development, and optimisation of high-converting creative assets across our dropshipping brand portfolio. In this pivotal role, you will bridge the gap between data-driven performance marketing and compelling storytelling — ensuring our paid social campaigns cut through the noise and drive measurable revenue.

This is a unique opportunity to shape the creative direction of a rapidly scaling eCommerce business, working closely with media buyers, ad creative teams, and product managers to build winning ad strategies from concept to conversion.



Key Responsibilities

Creative Strategy & Campaign Development

• Develop and own the end-to-end creative strategy 

• Build detailed creative briefs aligned to customer personas, buying intent signals, and product positioning.

• Identify winning creative angles, hooks, and messaging frameworks through competitor analysis, trend research, and performance data.

• Collaborate with media buyers to analyse ad performance data and translate insights into actionable creative iterations.

• Develop and maintain a structured creative testing calendar (A/B tests, multivariate tests) to continuously improve click-through rates (CTR) and return on ad spend (ROAS).

• Review and approve all creative deliverables to ensure alignment with compliance guidelines, and platform specifications.



Market & Audience Research

• Conduct in-depth research into UK consumer behaviour, trending products, and seasonal buying patterns.

• Analyse competitor ad strategies using Meta Ad Library

• Translate market insights into differentiated creative positioning that resonates with UK demographics.

•. Performance Analysis & Reporting

• Build and maintain a creative asset library, documenting winning formats and retired underperformers.



Team Collaboration

• Act as the central liaison between the creative production team and media buying team.

• Provide mentorship and direction to junior creative tea
mbers

• Participate in strategy meetings, product launches, and cross-functional campaign planning sessions.



Required Skills & Qualifications

• 3+ years of experience in a creative strategy, performance creative, or content marketing role — ideally within eCommerce or dropshipping.

• Proven track record of producing ad creatives that drive measurable ROAS improvements.

• Strong understanding of UK consumer behaviour and cultural nuances in digital advertising.

• Proficiency in analysing paid social metrics in Meta Ads Manager

• Experience creating briefs for static image ads

• Excellent written communication skills with the ability to craft compelling ad copy and hooks.

• Familiarity with creative tools such as Canva

• Highly organised with the ability to manage multiple campaigns and creative pipelines simultaneously.



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience working in a dropshipping, DTC (Direct-to-Consumer), or performance marketing agency environment.

• Working knowledge of conversion rate optimisation (CRO) principles and landing page best practices.

• Familiarity with Shopify, WooCommerce, or similar eCommerce platforms.

title: Real Estate Transaction & Due Diligence Coordinator (Execution Role)

RESPONSIBILITIES:

* agents

* title companies

* lenders

* inspectors

  • Verify property data:

* rent rolls

* utility costs

* taxes

  • Flag issues and risks immediately

  • Maintain task trackers (ClickUp / spreadsheets)

  • Ensure all deadlines are met without reminders

  • Follow SOPs strictly



• Review and verify deal analysis:

  - rent vs market rent

  - expense assumptions

  - basic cash flow accuracy

• Flag inconsistencies or risks immediately (do not assume data is correct)

---



YOU MUST:



• Be extremely detail-oriented

• Be proactive (do not wait for instructions)

• Be comfortable following strict systems

• Communicate clearly and directly

• Take ownership of your work
