title: Social Media Content Strategist *Superstar Only*
description:
We're hiring a Social Media Content Strategist to lead the creative vision, ideation, and strategic direction behind our short-form content engine across Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. This is the senior creative role on the social team. You are the person who has the ideas - who watches a long-form episode and immediately knows which fifteen seconds will stop a scroll, who sees a cultural 
nt and already has three concepts ready before anyone asks.



You will be working directly with a creator who has over 4 million followers across platforms, with Instagram as the primary channel. Our content operation is structured like a studio with batch production, performance metrics, and AI-native systems. You own the creative engine - the ideas, the concepts, the narrative direction, and the quality standard. You manage the Content Producer who handles daily execution, publishing, and platform operations. Together you run a system that produces high-volume, high-quality content every day.



This is a full-time remote position. We are looking for a senior creative operator who generates ideas naturally, understands modern platform dynamics at a deep level, actively integrates AI into workflows, and holds every piece of content to an elite standard. A genuine interest in health, beauty, and strong visual aesthetics is essential - this is the world we operate in, and you need to live and breathe it.



Responsibilities

- Generate and develop original content ideas, concepts, and creative angles on a continuous basis. You are the primary source of what we make and why.

- Identify high-retention 
nts within long-form content and develop them into short-form concepts with clear hooks, narrative arcs, and platform-specific angles.

- Develop creative briefs and direction for each content cycle, giving the Content Producer and editors clear guidance on what to build and how it should feel.

- Lead trend research and cultural awareness across TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts, spotting opportunities early and translating them into on-brand concepts.

- Translate brand strategy into high-performing content concepts, story structures, and creative playbooks that guide all short-form output.

- Define and evolve the brand's visual and tonal identity across platforms, maintaining a cohesive and premium creative standard.

- Direct and approve content through production and post-production, ensuring quality, creative alignment, and platform-ready formatting before anything publishes.

- Manage the Content Producer by setting priorities, providing creative direction, reviewing output, and ensuring disciplined execution of the publishing calendar.

- Analyze performance data at a strategic level, identifying what is working, why it is working, and how to double down or pivot.

- Build and optimize repeatable creative systems, including AI-driven workflows that streamline ideation, editing, and production.

- Partner with the production team to ensure social-first thinking is embedded in long-form content capture and planning.



Requirements

- 5+ years of experience in a creative strategy or production leadership role in digital media, YouTube, branded content, or entertainment with proven results.

- A natural idea generator who consistently develops strong content concepts, creative angles, and fresh approaches without waiting to be briefed.

- Genuine interest in health, beauty, and aesthetics. You naturally follow this space, understand the visual standards, and care about how things look and feel.

- Deep fluency in platform culture and trends. You know what is trending, why it is working, and how to adapt it to a creator's voice without losing authenticity.

- Strong understanding of storytelling, pacing, hooks, and modern platform dynamics across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and emerging formats.

- Demonstrated experience managing at least one direct report and owning creative and performance outcomes.

- Proven ability to operate across creative strategy and production logistics while maintaining high quality standards.

- Editing and design literacy. You do not need to be the hands-on editor, but you must be able to direct editors and designers with precise, actionable feedback.

- AI-forward operator who actively integrates AI into creative and production workflows. Bonus for familiarity with tools such as Runway, VEO or Flow, ChatGPT, or Claude.

- Strong editorial judgment. You can look at a piece of content and immediately know what is missing, what is not working, and how to fix it.

- Excellent communication skills and ability to give clear, concise creative direction.

- Must submit a strong portfolio demonstrating creative direction, ideation, and platform-native content across multiple formats.

- Recognized for exceptional achievements such as attaining Latin Honors (Summa Cum Laude, Magna Cum Laude, Cum Laude), performance awards, or demonstrating fast career progression into higher roles.



Results

- A consistent pipeline of strong content ideas and creative concepts that drive the team's output forward.

- Trending sounds, formats, and cultural 
nts consistently identified and turned into on-brand content before they peak.

- A high-functioning creative system with predictable output and strong quality control.

- Content that reinforces the creator's positioning while maintaining consistency and a premium standard across platforms.

- Measurable increase in traffic from short-form content to long-form assets.



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of handling video production workflows.

- High-speed internet connection plus backup.

- Conducive work environment.



Working Schedule

- Full-time remote position.



Compensation

- Salary will be based on skills, speed, portfolio output, and experience.



Benefits

- Competitive salary.

- Paid Time Off from day one, increasing to 10 days annually after six months with the company.

- Training and development opportunities.

- Opportunity to contribute to a rapidly expanding content team producing world-class creator content.

- Great potential for career advancement into leadership positions.



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

title: AI Suite 360 — Help Wanted: Viral Video Creator
description:
Compensation: $8–$20 USD per finished reel + performance bonuses · Monthly retainer option $300–$600 USD · Top performers clear $400–$800 USD / month

Job Type: Independent contractor · paid weekly in USD via PayPal, Wise, GCash, or Payoneer

Hours: Flexible · 4–6 hours per day equivalent · async-first with 1 weekly creative review call





About AI Suite 360

AI Suite 360 is a U.S.-based operating system for service-business owners (CRM, AI receptionist, missed-call text-back, review engine, follow-up automation). Our clients are attorneys, roofers, realtors, gyms, and service businesses across the United States.



The Role

We are hiring a Filipino-based Viral Video Creator to produce 12-20 finished short-form reels per month (45–90 seconds, 9:16 vertical) & long form content for distribution on Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. Reference style is direct-to-camera authority hooks layered over cinematic B-roll, driving music, captioned hooks, and a hard CTA in the final 3 seconds. We supply the angle, the script, and the pain points; the creator delivers the finished file.



Responsibilities

The creator will refine supplied scripts, source or shoot B-roll, edit reels with on-screen captions and music in CapCut or Premiere Pro, optimize the first 1.5 seconds for retention, and deliver finished files within 48 hours of script delivery.



Required Qualifications

The applicant must have at least one reel that broke 50,000 organic views in the last 12 months, demonstrated proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut Pro, a stable home internet connection, and a working camera setup (DSLR, mirrorless, or iPhone 12 or newer if shooting is required). Strong English reading comprehension is required; on-camera English voiceover is not required and may be sourced separately.



Preferred Qualifications

Prior experience editing for U.S. personal brands, real estate, finance, coaching, or service-business niches is preferred. Familiarity with current Reels and TikTok caption styles, viral sound trends, and short-form retention curves is a strong plus.



Compensation Detail

Base pay is $8–$20 USD per finished reel based on production complexity (talking-head only, B-roll heavy, or full cinematic). Stackable performance bonuses include +$10 at 25,000 views, +$30 at 100,000, +$100 at 1 million, and +$50 per signed AI Suite 360 client attributed via UTM or DM keyword. A monthly retainer option of $300–$600 USD for 8–12 reels is available to top performers after 30 days. All payments are weekly in USD via PayPal, Wise, GCash, or Payoneer.



How to Apply

 
 with subject line VIRAL VIDEO CREATOR — [your name] and include: a portfolio link, your top three reels with view counts, a 60-second mock reel built around the hook "Most service businesses lose 40% of their leads before lunch. Here's how to fix it in 7 minutes," your rate sheet (per-reel and/or monthly retainer), and your turnaround time in hours. We respond to all qualified applicants within 48 hours and book a 15-minute call with finalists in the same week. Two creators are being onboarded this quarter.



Example of what we are looking to have done:

title: AIRBNB GUEST COMMUNICATIONS SPECIALIST
description:
We manage 185+ furnished rental units across the U.S. on Airbnb, VRBO, 
, Expedia, Marriott, and more. We are a professional, systems-driven operation looking for experienced tea
mbers who already know how this industry works and can perform from day one.



This is not a beginner role. If you do not meet every requirement below, do not apply. Applications that do not qualify will be deleted without response.



ROLE DETAILS

[AM / PM] Shift — USA Pacific Time 

Full-time: 5 days/week or 6 days/week 

Pay: Based on experience. Six-day schedules receive higher compensation.



REQUIREMENTS — YOU MUST MEET ALL OF THESE

5+ years of experience in short-term rental co-hosting, property management, or STR hospitality operations 

You must have worked directly in a co-hosting, STR operations, or property management role supporting a portfolio of 50+ units 

Hands-on experience with Guesty or Hostaway 

Strong written and spoken English 

Reliable internet, stable workspace, and full availability during your assigned shift



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

We want someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and hospitality-driven. Someone who takes ownership of problems and solves them without being told to. Someone who can communicate with guests professionally under pressure, think clearly during difficult situations, and treat every interaction like it matters. If you need to be micromanaged, this is not the right fit.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES

Your main focus is front-end guest communication. This includes messaging and calling guests, managing check-ins and check-outs, coordinating maintenance, communicating with cleaners and handymen, following up on open issues, screening reservations, and supporting channel communications.



SECONDARY RESPONSIBILITIES

You will also assist with backend tasks including claims filing, review removal, responding to reviews, listing creation and updates, and daily task tracking. Guest communication always comes first.



TOOLS WE USE

Guesty, PriceLabs, Enso Connect, Autohost, HelloHost, OpenPhone, Slack, 



HOW TO APPLY

Reply to this listing with everything below included. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

- Your resume and a short message covering your total years in STR, the type of operation you worked for, and roughly how many units you managed or supported.



- Complete two personality assessments. Take both today and do not submit old results. Save your full results page for each and include both:



First: Go to 
/disc and take the free DISC assessment.

Second: Go to 
 and take the free personality test.



- A Loom video recorded at 
, between 3 and 5 minutes. Cover three things: your STR background and the types of operations you have worked for; walk through one specific difficult guest situation you personally handled and how you resolved it; and explain why you are applying to this role. Do not read from a script.



- Your written responses to the scenarios below. Take your time. This should take 20 to 30 minutes.



Scenario A: It is 11:30 PM. A guest sends this message: "The AC isn't working and it's 85 degrees in here. We have a baby. This is unacceptable. I want a full refund and I'm leaving a 1-star review." Your maintenance contact is not responding. The next available technician cannot come until 9 AM. Write the exact message you send to the guest right now. Write the exact message you send to the maintenance contact. Write what you log in the daily report. Then in 2 to 3 sentences, explain why you responded to the guest the way you did.



Scenario B: It is 8:30 AM at the start of your shift. You open your task board and see four things. One: a guest checking in today at 3 PM is requesting early check-in at noon and the unit is not cleaned yet. Two: a guest who checked out this morning left a complaint about a broken shower head. Three: a review from 3 days ago has not been responded to. Four: a new reservation just came in flagged by Autohost for review. List these in the order you would handle them and explain why.



Scenario C: A guest checks out and leaves a 3-star review that says: "Good location but the team was slow to respond." You personally replied to every message within 15 minutes during their stay. Write the public response you would post.



Qualified applicants will be contacted for an interview. All new hires begin with a one-month paid trial period.

title: Real Estate Sales Consultant
description:
PLEASE READ HOW TO APPLY AT THE BOTTOM. ALL OTHER APPLICATIONS OR RESUMES WILL BE IGNORED IF YOU DO NOT FOLLOW. 



About Beycome:



We're changing how people buy and sell homes — and we're just getting started.



Beycome is a real estate technology company on a mission to put homeownership back in the hands of the people, not the system built around it. We replace commissions with technology and confusion with clarity. Our platform gives everyday buyers and sellers access to the same tools the insiders have — MLS exposure, offers, digital signatures, title, mortgage, and closing — all in one place, all without traditional commissions.



The results speak for themselves:



19,384 properties closed

$220.3 million saved by our customers

One of our properties sells every 40 minutes

We're a small, fast-moving team based in South Miami with a startup mentality — no corporate red tape, no outdated processes. Just smart people building something that matters.



The Role:



We have over 1,000 sellers listing with us every month. Many of them are also buying their next home — and that's where you come in.



As a Real Estate Inside Sales Representative, your job is simple: call our sellers, explain our Buyer Program (where they get up to 2?ck at closing), and convert them into buyers who close with us.



Once they sign our Buyer Broker Agreement and are ready to see properties, our transaction coordinators take over — scheduling visits and submitting offers. Your job is to get them there.



We're looking to grow our Buyer Program attach rate to 30%, and you'll be a key driver in making that happen.



What You'll Do:



- Make an average of 70 calls per day to current Beycome sellers

- Explain the Buyer Program and the rebate they receive at closing

- Convert sellers into buyers by getting Buyer Broker Agreements signed

- Follow up via calls, texts, and
s to move leads through the pipeline

- Track your activity and conversions in our CRM

- Hand off signed buyers to our transaction coordinators for scheduling and offers

- Help get buyers to the closing table



What We're Looking For:

- Real estate experience required (agent, ISA, TC, brokerage support, etc.)

- High-volume phone skills — 70+ calls a day doesn't scare you

- Sales instincts — you know how to handle objections and close

- Strong written communication for texts and
s

- Self-starter who thrives in a fast-paced, startup environment

- Coachable and hungry to grow



What We Offer:



- Competitive base salary + bonus/commission

- Warm leads — you're calling people who already work with us

- Growth opportunity at an early-stage company

- Startup culture — small team, big impact, zero corporate BS



How to Apply



To apply, please send a short 2 to 3 minute video telling us:



Do not send old pre-recorded videos. If you want this job, take your time to visit our website and what we do to see if you are a good fit. 



A bit about your sales experience, especially in real estate or title

What you understand about Beycome after checking out our website

Why you think you’d be a good fit for this role

Nothing fancy needed. A quick, clear video is perfect.



Heads up: we only review applications that include a video. It helps us get a feel for how you communicate and shows you took the time to learn about Beycome. Submit video to 



Pay: $900 - $1,300 per month + unlimited commission paid out monthly

title: Full Stack Developer
description:
Remote | Full-Time | 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Central Time (CST)



About the Role

We are looking for a heavy-hitting, seasoned Developer to join our team. This is not a "follow the manual" position. We need a proactive critical thinker with at least 8 years of experience who can walk into a complex environment, identify bottlenecks, and build robust, scalable solutions from scratch.



In this role, you will be responsible for the architecture, development, and maintenance of our internal business systems. The ideal candidate anticipates problems before they arise and consistently delivers efficient, well-documented solutions. You must be able to take a vague problem, design a solution, and execute it end-to-end—handling whatever is thrown at you with a high level of expertise.



Key Responsibilities

Design & Deploy: Build, test, and maintain custom software applications (Power Apps) and complex automated workflows (Power Automate).



Architecture & Logic: Proactively identify potential issues and propose efficient, well-reasoned solutions.



Integrations: Build and maintain integrations across Microsoft and third-party platforms via REST APIs and webhooks.



Data Management: Manage and query SQL databases and Dataverse to ensure data integrity across all platforms.



Documentation: Create and maintain clear technical documentation, process guides, and project timelines.



Project Leadership: Manage milestones and communicate progress against deadlines to stakeholders.



Technical Requirements (The "Must-Haves")

8+ Years of Development Experience: A proven track record of building and managing complex systems.



Power Platform Mastery: Expert-level development in Power Apps (Canvas and Model-Driven) and Power Automate (cloud flows, desktop flows/RPA).



SQL Server & Dataverse: Advanced knowledge of SQL. You must be comfortable managing complex databases, writing stored procedures, and optimizing queries.



Microsoft Ecosystem Proficiency:



Microsoft Azure: Cloud infrastructure, services, and deployments.



Microsoft 365: Advanced configuration of SharePoint, Teams, and Entra ID (Azure AD).



Scripting & External Tools:



Proficiency in PowerShell, Python, or JavaScript.



Experience with Git/GitHub/Azure DevOps for version control.



Deep experience with REST APIs and third-party SaaS connector ecosystems.



Qualifications

Analytical Mindset: Strong critical thinking and analytical problem-solving skills—you don't wait for a step-by-step guide.



Communication: Excellent written communication skills, including the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.



Reliability: Demonstrated ability to manage timelines, prioritize high-pressure tasks, and meet deadlines independently.



Portfolio: A portfolio of published projects or a detailed list of the most complex automation challenges you have solved.



Preferred Qualifications

Microsoft certifications (e.g., Azure Developer Associate, Power Platform Developer).



Experience with Agile or Scru
thodologies.



Background in process improvement or workflow optimization.



How to Apply

Please send your resume along with a brief portfolio or list of your most complex automation projects.



Application Requirements:



Written Question: What is the most difficult automation challenge you've solved using SQL and Power Automate, and how did you architect the solution?



Introduction Video: Please include a link to a short video (1–2 minutes) explaining your background and why you believe you are the best fit for this specific "problem-solver" role.

title: Senior Medusa.js Developer
description:
About USs

We are building a next-generation, premium marketplace. We are moving beyond the traditional "Buy It Now" model to create a dynamic trading platform that includes a sophisticated "Make an Offer" negotiation engine, a digital wallet system, and a full-service physical consignment and warehousing operation.



This is not a standard e-commerce build. We are creating a complex, multi-sided marketplace with unique business logic, hybrid payment flows, and physical inventory management. We have chosen Medusa.js as our foundational architecture because we need total headless flexibility, robust custom workflows, and native marketplace capabilities.



The Role



We are seeking a Senior Medusa.js Developer to lead the technical architecture and development of the platform. You will be responsible for building the core custom modules that differentiate our business, integrating with third-party services, and ensuring the platform is scalable, secure, and performant.



You will work closely with the founding team to translate complex business requirements into elegant, maintainable Node.js/TypeScript code.



Key Responsibilities & Custom Modules to Build



1. The Offer Engine (State Machine): Build a robust negotiation system allowing buyers to submit offers, sellers to accept/decline/counter, and manage the complex state transitions and time-expirations of these offers using Medusa's Workflows SDK.



2. Digital Wallet & Hybrid Payments: Implement a user wallet system where users can hold funds from sales. Crucially, you must build a custom checkout flow that allows a single transaction to be split between wallet funds and a credit card (via Stripe Connect).



3. Warehousing & Consignment Module: Develop a custom backend module to manage physical inventory. This includes generating unique barcode IDs for incoming stock, tracking storage locations, and managing the "Hold in" logic (where buyers purchase but delay shipping to consolidate orders).



4. Stripe Connect Integration: Architect the complex payment splitting and automated payouts required for a multi-vendor marketplace, ensuring compliance and seamless onboarding for our consignors.



5. Multi-Channel Sync: Build robust integrations to sync our "Buy It Now" inventory with Google Shopping and eBay, ensuring real-time stock updates across all channels.



Required Skills & Experience



• Deep Medusa.js Expertise: Proven experience building complex, custom e-commerce solutions using Medusa.js (v1 or v2). You must understand its core architecture, plugin system, and Workflows SDK.



• Node.js & TypeScript: Expert-level proficiency in backend JavaScript/TypeScript development.



• Marketplace Architecture: Experience building multi-vendor marketplaces, handling split payments, and managing complex user roles.



• Stripe Connect: Deep understanding of Stripe Connect (Custom or Express accounts) for marketplace routing and payouts.



• API Design: Strong experience designing and consuming RESTful and GraphQL APIs.



• Database Management: Proficiency with PostgreSQL and Redis.



Work Setup



• Flexible hours / outcome-focused delivery: We care about what you build, not when you log on.



• Experienced Team: Work with a team running multiple SaaS brands and an established digital agency.



To Apply



Please submit:



1. Your CV or LinkedIn/GitHub profile.



2. Links to any relevant projects, demos, or code (specifically Medusa.js projects if possible).



3. Your answers to the following application questions.



Application Questions (Required)



If the above sounds like you, please apply. Your application will include the following questions:



1. What interests you most about building a complex, multi-sided marketplace?



2. Describe a previous project where you built a custom e-commerce solution or marketplace using Medusa.js. What was the most complex custom module you had to build, and how did you approach it?



3. We require a hybrid payment system where a user can pay for a $1,000 order using $400 from their digital wallet and $600 via credit card. How would you architect this custom checkout flow within Medusa.js and Stripe?



4. We need a robust "Make an Offer" engine with states like Pending, Accepted, Countered, and Expired. How would you leverage Medusa's Workflows SDK or custom services to build this state machine reliably?



5. If you had to deliver an MVP of this platform in 8–10 weeks, what would you prioritise, what would you defer, and what specific Medusa plugins or starters would you leverage to accelerate development?



6. What is your general availability each week?



7. What excites you most about joining a startup team building something new from the ground up?



8. What is your expected salary expectation?



9. Please also let us know why you are the right person, explain your experience, and tell us why we should hire you.

title: Senior Sylius / Symfony Developer
description:
About Us



We are building an innovative, upcoming online marketplace. We are moving away from traditional auction models to a dual-sales approach: "Buy It Now" and "Make an Offer."



We operate a full-service consignment model where we handle the physical inventory, inspecting, photographing, and storing the goods, while providing a seamless digital experience for both buyers and sellers. Our platform will integrate advanced features like a digital wallet for sale proceeds, hybrid payments, complex shipping logistics (including "Hold in Cellar"), and multi-channel sales via Google Shopping, Amazon Marketplace and eBay.



We are a small, experienced founding team looking for a highly skilled technical partner to build the core platform.



The Role



We are seeking a Senior Sylius / Symfony Developer to architect and build the platform from the ground up. You will be responsible for taking our detailed technical specifications and turning them into a robust, scalable, and secure e-commerce marketplace.



This is not a standard e-commerce build. You will be developing complex custom modules on top of the Sylius framework to handle our unique business logic.



Key Responsibilities



• Platform Architecture: Design and implement the core platform using Sylius and Symfony.

• Custom Module Development: Build sophisticated custom modules, including:



• Offer Engine: A state machine-driven system allowing buyers to submit offers and sellers to accept/reject them.

• Wallet & Hybrid Payments: A digital wallet system for sellers to hold proceeds, integrated with Stripe Connect for complex payouts and hybrid (wallet + card) checkout flows.

• Warehousing & Logistics: A backend module to manage physical inventory, barcode generation, storage locations, and consolidated shipping ("Hold in Cellar").

• Multi-Channel Integrations: Automated feeds for Google Shopping and a comprehensive two-way integration with the eBay API.

• API Development: Design and build RESTful APIs to support a future mobile application.

• Third-Party Integrations: Integrate with Stripe Connect, shipping providers, and potentially external identity/age verification services.

• Quality Assurance: Write comprehensive unit and integration tests to ensure platform stability and security.



Required Skills & Experience



• Deep Sylius Expertise: Proven experience building complex, custom e-commerce platforms using Sylius. You must understand how to extend Sylius core components, state machines, and resource management.

• Symfony Mastery: Strong background in PHP 8+ and the Symfony framework.

• Marketplace Experience: Previous experience building multi-vendor marketplaces or platforms with complex payment splitting (Stripe Connect experience is highly desirable).

• API Design: Experience designing and consuming RESTful APIs.

• Database Design: Strong SQL skills and experience with Doctrine ORM.

• Frontend Integration: While this is primarily a backend role, you should be comfortable working with Twig templates and integrating frontend assets.

• Testing: Commitment to automated testing (PHPUnit, Behat).



Work Setup



• Flexible hours: We are outcome-focused. Delivery matters more than specific hours logged.

• Collaboration: You will work directly with the founders and our UX/UI design team.



Application Questions (Required)



If this sounds like the challenge you've been looking for, please apply with your CV/LinkedIn, links to relevant GitHub repositories or live projects, and answers to the following questions:



1. Sylius Experience: Describe the most complex custom module or feature you have built on top of Sylius. What was the business problem, and how did you solve it technically?

2. Marketplace Payments: Have you worked with Stripe Connect or similar complex payment splitting systems? If so, briefly describe the implementation.

3. State Machines: Our "Make an Offer" feature requires a robust state machine (Pending -> Accepted/Rejected/Expired). How would you approach implementing this within the Sylius ecosystem?

4. MVP Delivery: If you had to deliver the core MVP (Buy It Now + Make an Offer + Basic Stripe integration) in 8-10 weeks, what would be your technical approach and what potential bottlenecks would you anticipate?

5. Availability & Rates: What is your general availability each week, and what is your expected salary?

6. What excites you most about joining a startup team building something new from the ground up?



Please also let us know why you are the right person, explain your experience and tell us why we should hire you.

title: Legal Case Manager(s)/Quality Control
description:
About Martine Law:







Martine Law is one of the fastest-growing law firms in the country, specializing in criminal defense and family law. We combine traditional expertise with cutting-edge technology to provide exceptional client representation. Our supportive, fast-moving, and tech-savvy culture allows our team to thrive professionally while maintaining a healthy work-life balance.

title: Part-Time Graphic Designer for Local Business Ad & Print Projects
description:
Shop Local Delmarva is looking for talented part-time graphic designers to join our growing design team.



We work with local businesses that need professional, eye-catching graphics for advertising, print, apparel, labels, and promotional materials. This is not a full-time position right away. It is project-based, with steady weekly design work available for the right designer.



This role is best for someone who has a strong eye for design, understands layout, can follow instructions, and can make small local businesses look polished and professional.



## Type of Work You Will Design



You may be asked to create:



* Print ad graphics

* Magazine ads

*
 and Instagram ad graphics

* T-shirt designs

* Product labels

* Sticker designs

* Flyer designs

* Coupon graphics

* Simple logo refreshes

* Business card layouts

* Promotional graphics for local businesses



Most projects will be small and simple, but they still need to look professional.



## How the Work Will Be Assigned



We are building a small team of designers.



When a customer places a graphic design order, the project will be assigned to an available designer. This will work somewhat like a small private Fiverr-style system.



Designers will be tagged on projects, given the instructions, files, examples, and deadlines, then paid based on the work completed.



This is a part-time, project-based position.



Expected workload in the beginning:



**4–5 small projects per week**



Average pay for small projects:



**$12.50 per completed job**



Estimated weekly pay:



**$50–$62.50 per week to start**



As we grow, more work will become available.



## Growth Opportunity



This position can grow for the right person.



If you are very good, reliable, and have a great eye for design, you may be offered higher-paying projects such as:



* Product label design

* Full brand identity design

* Higher-end print campaigns

* Magazine layout work

* Business branding packages

* Social media campaign graphics

* Larger advertising projects



The better your design skill and communication, the more opportunity you will have.



## What We Are Looking For



We are not just looking for someone who can use Canva templates.



We need someone who has **“the eye.”**



That means you understand:



* Good spacing

* Clean layouts

* Font pairing

* Color balance

* Visual hierarchy

* How to make an ad easy to read

* How to make a business look professional

* How to follow a brand style

* How to take direction without getting defensive



Templates are okay as tools, but we need designers who can create strong original designs when needed.



## Required Skills



You should be comfortable with:



* Canva, Photoshop, Illustrator, or similar design tools

* Print design basics

* Social media graphics

* Basic typography

* Layout and spacing

* Working from written instructions

* Making revisions quickly

* Meeting deadlines

* Communicating clearly in English



Bonus skills:



* Experience with product labels

* Experience with apparel graphics

* Experience with magazine or print ads

* Experience preparing print-ready files

* Experience designing for small businesses



## Personality Fit



This role is for someone who is:



* Reliable

* Detail-oriented

* Creative

* Fast but not sloppy

* Open to feedback

* Easy to communicate with

* Good at following instructions

* Proud of making small businesses look great



We do not want someone who disappears, misses deadlines, or gives lazy template-looking work.



## Pay



Starting pay:



**$12.50 per small completed project**



Most small projects should not take very long for a skilled designer.



Expected starting workload:



**4–5 projects per week**



Estimated starting weekly pay:



**$50–$62.50 per week**



Higher-paying projects will be available for designers who prove they are highly skilled, reliable, and have a strong design eye.



## Schedule



This is flexible, part-time work.



However, once you accept a project, you must complete it by the deadline.



Most projects will need to be completed within 24–72 hours depending on the size of the job.



## How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. A link to your portfolio

3. Examples of ads, print graphics, labels, apparel, or social media graphics you have designed

4. The design software you use

5. Your availability each week

6. Why you believe you have “the eye” for good design



## Important Application Instruction



To show that you read this full job post, please put this phrase at the top of your application:



**“I have the eye for design.”**



Applications without this phrase may not be reviewed.



## Final Note



This is a great opportunity for a designer who wants steady part-time work, real client projects, and the chance to grow into higher-paying design work over time.



We are building a design team that helps local businesses look better, advertise better, and grow stronger.

description:

You’ll be responsible for identifying opportunities, building strong relationships with procurement officers, and closing deals for product procurement contracts. If you know how to hustle on the phone and via
 — and thrive in a fast-paced environment — we want to hear from you.

• Identify and pursue new government contracting opportunities

, Cal eProcure, etc.

Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

title: Construction Estimator- Residential-Focus
description:
Job Summary



We are looking for a Construction Estimator who specialized in Residential Construction and will serve as a critical operational partner — performing precise quantity takeoffs and assembling professional bid packages that feed directly into the company’s existing workflows inside Job Tread. The ideal candidate brings a no-hand-holding mindset: and can slot into an established system, deliver accurate work, and build a long-term, trust-based working relationship.





Key Responsibilities



•     Perform complete construction takeoffs from architectural plans, covering all phases from site work through final completion.

•     Conduct internal quantity takeoffs exclusively for custom residential projects — subcontractor quote-chasing is not part of this role.

•     Generate clean, itemized lumber package lists from framing plans for competitive bidding.

•     Compile and organize professional bid packages aligned with the client's established estimating structure.

•     Create 3D material renderings (brick, stone, tile roofing, etc.) to help clients visualize finish selections.





Required Qualifications



•     Demonstrated expertise in residential construction estimating — commercial only backgrounds will not be considered.

•     Thorough understanding of the residential construction sequence from foundation to finishes.

•     Ability to read and interpret architectural drawings and translate them into accurate quantity takeoffs.

•     Experience with US-based construction estimating standards and practices.

•     Generalist skill set capable of handling full-scope takeoffs across all trades.

•     Engineering background strongly preferred.



Tools & Software



Required:

•     Job Tread — primary estimating platform; proficiency is mandatory.

•     PlanSwift

•     Bluebeam Revu



Optional but a PLUS

•     BuilderTrend (experience may be transferable to Job Tread workflows)





Working Hours / Timezone:

Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (Central Standard Time)



Company Benefits:



Starting Salary

Paid Holidays

Sick Leave

Vacation Leave

13th Month Pay

Medical Benefits

Referral Bonus

Monthly competition

/english

A 1–2 minute video introduction is required.

After submitting, reply with: “application form done.”



Screening Questions:



2. How many years of experience do you have working as a Construction Estimator?

3. How many years of experience do you have working in Residential Construction Estimating?

4. Do you have a US Background Experience in Residential Construction Estimating? If yes, for how many years?

5. Can you handle full-scope takeoffs across all trades, from foundation through finishes?

6. Do you have experience creating 3D material renderings (brick, stone, tile roofing, etc.)? If yes, which tools do you use and for how many years?

7. Attached your computer specs here

8. Have you generated itemized lumber package lists before?

9. For how many years are you using these tools and rate your proficiency (1-10)

Job Tread

Planswift

Bluebeam Revu

Buildertrend

10 Name all the construction estimating tools that you've used in the past.

12. Are you an Engineering Graduate?



Thank you!

title: Marketing & Lead Generation Specialist — Luxury Renovation Studio (Tampa Bay, Florida)
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

V&C Design Studio is a luxury kitchen and bathroom renovation company based in Tampa Bay, Florida. We serve high-end residential clients with projects ranging from $25,000 to $200,000. We are growing and we need a results-driven marketing specialist to take ownership of our digital presence and lead generation.

Our phone needs to ring more — and you are the person who will make that happen.



POSITION DETAILS



Location: Remote — Philippines

Schedule: Monday to Friday — 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM EST

Hours: 20 hours per week

Rate: $8.00 – $10.00 USD per hour based on experience

Start Date: As soon as possible

Status: Independent Contractor





THE ROLE

This is not a social media manager position. This is a performance-driven role focused on generating qualified leads for V&C. You will own our entire digital marketing ecosystem and be held accountable for results every week.

Your responsibilities include:

GOOGLE ADS & GOOGLE LSA



Manage and optimize Google Local Services Ads daily

Create and run Google Ads campaigns targeted at Tampa Bay homeowners

Monitor budget, cost per lead, and conversion rates weekly

Ensure V&C profile is always 100% complete and ranking at the top



LANDING PAGES & CAMPAIGNS



Create targeted landing pages for each campaign (kitchen, bathroom, realtor program)

Design and launch seasonal promotions with dedicated landing pages

A/B test headlines, offers, and CTAs to maximize conversion

Connect landing pages to Google Ads and track results end to end



SEO — LOCAL SEARCH OPTIMIZATION



Optimize 
 for Tampa Bay local search keywords

Manage and optimize Google Business Profile

Build local citations and backlinks to improve organic ranking

Monthly SEO report with keyword rankings and traffic data



 MARKETING & NEWSLETTER



Create and send monthly newsletter to client and lead database

Build automated
 sequences for lead nurturing

Manage promotional campaigns tied to seasonal offers



SOCIAL MEDIA & CONTENT



Post 3 times per week on Instagram,
, LinkedIn, and Google Business

Create before & after content, design tips, and promotional posts

LinkedIn outreach — 10 realtor connections per day in Tampa Bay



REPORTING & ANALYTICS



Weekly report every Friday: leads generated by source, cost per lead, conversion rate

Monthly performance report with ROI analysis per campaign

Track all platform performance: Houzz, Google LSA, Google Ads, social media





REQUIREMENTS

MANDATORY — You must have ALL of these:



Proven experience with Google Ads — you must show real campaign results

Experience creating landing pages — show us pages you have built

Google LSA management experience — ideally in home services

SEO knowledge — local SEO specifically

 marketing experience — Mailchimp, Zoho Campaigns, or similar

Strong written English — all content must be flawless

Available Monday to Friday 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM EST — no exceptions

Stable internet and quiet home office



STRONG ASSETS — Big advantage:



Experience with home services, renovation, or real estate companies

GoHighLevel, WordPress, or similar landing page tools

Experience with Houzz Pro

Basic graphic design — Canva or Adobe

Google Analytics and Google Search Console



AUTOMATIC DISQUALIFICATION — Do not apply if:



You cannot show real Google Ads campaign results

You have never built a landing page

You are not available 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM EST Monday to Friday

You are currently working with 3 or more other clients

You cannot commit to at least 6 months





HOW TO APPLY

Do not send a generic application. Applications without all required elements will be ignored.

Your application MUST include all 5 of these:



A brief introduction — who you are and why you are the right fit for V&C (max 150 words)

Links to 2 landing pages you have created — real, live examples only

One Google Ads campaign result — show us the numbers: spend, leads, cost per lead

Your answer to this question: "V&C gets 1-2 renovation projects per month. Our Google Ads budget is $500/month. What would you do in the first 30 days to increase qualified leads?"

Your availability confirmation: "I confirm I am available Monday to Friday 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM EST"

title: Healthcare Operations, Compliance & Administrative Support
description:
Position Overview



We are seeking two highly organized, detail-oriented Virtual Assistants to support our growing healthcare practice in administrative, compliance, documentation, and operational workflows. These roles will assist in maintaining clinical documentation standards, medical records processing, billing support functions, and internal accountability systems.



Responsibilities will be divided between the two positions based on organizational priorities, individual strengths, and workflow demands.



This is an ideal opportunity for candidates with experience in healthcare administration, behavioral health operations, medical records, billing support, or compliance coordination.



Core Responsibilities

Clinical Documentation & Compliance Support

Monitor clinician documentation completion and ensure adherence to required timelines

Track open notes, incomplete records, and compliance-related tasks

Conduct internal chart audits for completeness and accuracy

Assist with external audit preparation and insurance documentation requests

Maintain compliance logs, reports, and quality assurance metrics

Identify documentation gaps and escalate concerns when necessary



Medical Records & Release of Information (ROI)

Process incoming records requests from attorneys, disability offices, providers, and patients

Verify valid authorizations and HIPAA compliance requirements

Coordinate with clinicians to ensure records are complete before release

Track deadlines for all records requests and ensure timely fulfillment

Maintain organized records request logs and reporting systems



Open Claims & Revenue Cycle Administrative Support

Monitor reports for open claims tied to incomplete documentation

Track claim-related documentation delays impacting revenue cycle

Follow up with clinicians regarding outstanding notes and billing barriers

Support operational goals related to documentation timeliness and claims reduction

Maintain weekly reporting metrics for leadership review



Administrative Communication & Workflow Coordination

Send regular follow-up
s and reminders to clinicians and staff

Collaborate with leadership on workflow improvements

Support implementation of internal accountability systems

Assist with process documentation and SOP development

Maintain professionalism when communicating across departments



Qualifications

Prior experience as a Virtual Assistant, Healthcare Administrator, Medical Records Specialist, Billing Support Specialist, or Compliance Coordinator preferred

Experience in behavioral health, medical, or insurance-related administrative work strongly preferred

Knowledge of HIPAA, ROI processes, and healthcare compliance standards

Strong organizational and time-management skills

Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Ability to manage multiple deadlines independently

Proficiency with EMR/EHR systems, spreadsheets, and reporting tools

High attention to detail and problem-solving ability



Preferred Skills

Clinical documentation review

Insurance audit preparation

Medical records coordination

Revenue cycle support

Data tracking/reporting

Workflow optimization

Team communication

SOP creation



Core Competencies

Detail-oriented

Highly accountable

Process-driven

Strong follow-through

Professional communication

Confidentiality and discretion

Ability to work independently in a remote environment



Schedule & Structure

Full-time or part-time options may be considered

Responsibilities will be divided between two hires based on operational needs

Potential for role specialization over time



Impact of the Role

These positions are essential to maintaining operational efficiency, clinical compliance, revenue integrity, and organizational accountability. Successful candidates will play a key role in supporting leadership, clinicians, and internal systems while helping ensure the organization remains compliant, efficient, and scalable.

title: IT Systems AdmIT Systems Administrator & Web Analytics Specialist (CRO inistrator & Web Analytics Specialist (CRO Focus)
description:
We are looking for a versatile professional to manage our technical infrastructure and drive growth through data-driven insights. This role has two primary pillars:



VPN & Infrastructure: Monitor and service our private VPN server to ensure secure, high-speed access for our remote team. Ensure 99% uptime and handle any troubleshooting or security patches.



Web Analytics & Conversion: Perform deep-dive analytics on our websites (Zoho, Kajabi, and landing pages). We need someone who doesn't just report traffic, but analyzes visitor behavior to increase transactions.



Key Responsibilities:



Maintain and optimize VPN server performance and security.



Set up and manage Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and Heatmapping tools (like Hotjar or Microsoft Clarity).



Analyze the "path to purchase" and identify where visitors are dropping off.



Provide weekly reports on traffic quality and transaction success rates.



Recommend A/B tests for landing pages to improve ROI.



Skills Required:



VPN Server Administration (OpenVPN, WireGuard, or similar)



Google Analytics 4 & Google Tag Manager



Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)



Key Analytics for Improving Transactions

To move the needle on visitor transactions, you should ask your new hire to monitor these specific metrics:



1. Conversion Funnel Visualization

Don't just look at total sales. Look at the Abandonment Rate at each step:



Landing Page ? Lead Form: Are they interested enough to click?



Lead Form ? Submission: Is the form too long or broken?



Checkout/Contact ? Completed Transaction: Is there friction in the payment/booking process?



2. Traffic Quality (Attribution)

Not all traffic is equal. You need to see which sources (e.g., specific lead lists or marketing
s) actually result in sales.



Metric: Goal Completions by Source/Medium.



Goal: Shift budget away from high-traffic/low-conversion sources to low-traffic/high-conversion ones.



3. User Behavior (Usability)

Heatmaps: See where people are clicking. If they are clicking on an image that isn't a link, you’re losing a transaction.



Session Recordings: Watch a video of a user struggling to find the "Buy" or "Contact" button.



Bounce Rate vs. Engagement Rate: If people leave within 3 seconds, your page speed or your VPN-hosted assets might be loading too slowly.



4. Technical Performance

Since you mentioned the VPN, ensure your web assets aren't gated behind slow connections.



Server Response Time: If your server takes more than 200ms to respond, visitors will bounce before the transaction starts.

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Are you a creative, driven marketing professional who wants your work to make a real difference? If so, we want to hear from you.



The Role

We are looking for an experienced and strategic Marketing Manager to join our team. Reporting to the Head of Marketing & Growth, you will take ownership of Indigenous Wealth's marketing execution across brand, digital, events, partnerships, and content. You will lead campaigns end to end, drive lead generation, and help shape how we show up in market.

This is a hands-on leadership role. You will manage day-to-day marketing operations, coordinate across teams, and bring both strategic thinking and creative execution to everything you do.



This role will give you the opportunity to:

* Lead campaigns and content strategy that directly support Indigenous economic empowerment

* Own and grow our digital presence across social,
, SEO, and paid channels

* Drive lead generation and build reporting that connects marketing activity to business outcomes

* Collaborate with a passionate, close-knit team who care deeply about impact

* Shape the voice, brand, and market presence of a purpose-driven organisation

* Manage partnerships, events, and community engagement initiatives

* Contribute to a growing business with a clear and compelling mission



About You

You are someone who brings energy, creativity, strategic thinking, and genuine cultural awareness to everything you do. You have:

* Proven ability to plan and execute marketing campaigns across multiple channels

* Strong content creation skills. You can write, design, brief creatives, and manage social media with confidence

* A data-informed mindset. You measure what matters and use insights to improve performance

* The ability to manage multiple workstreams, prioritise effectively, and deliver under pressure

* A collaborative, no-ego approach. You are exceptionally capable and naturally humble. You let your work speak for itself.



Essential

* Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field (or equivalent experience)

* 5+ years of experience in marketing, communications, or a comparable role with demonstrated progression

* Proven experience managing social media channels, content calendars, and campaign execution

* Strong capability in digital marketing tools and design platforms (Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, Meta Business Suite, Google Ads, or equivalent)

* Experience with
 marketing platforms and CRM-integrated campaign workflows

* Strong written and verbal communication skills with high attention to detail

* Proficiency in Google Workspace and at least one design tool (Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or equivalent)

* Demonstrated ability to manage budgets, report on campaign performance, and optimise based on data

* Ability to manage multiple priorities and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment



Nice to Have (Not Essential)

* Experience with CRM platforms (e.g. HubSpot) and marketing automation

* Working knowledge of SEO, Google Analytics, and Meta Ads Manager

* Experience planning and coordinating events or community activations

* Experience managing external agencies, freelancers, or creative partners

* Understanding of the property investment, financial services, or Indigenous community engagement landscape



Why This Role?

You will report directly to the Head of Marketing & Growth. You will have genuine influence over how Indigenous Wealth shows up in market and how we connect with the communities we serve. The company culture is professional yet fun. We move fast, back each other, and don't hide behind corporate jargon. If you want a role where your work actually matters, this is it.



How to Apply - To apply, please submit the following:

* Your CV

* A 1-2 minute Loom video (or similar) introducing yourself and telling us why this role excites you. This is a required part of your application.

* One piece of work you are proud of. This could be a social post, a campaign summary, a piece of copy, a brand project, or anything that shows us what you can do.



Applications without a video introduction will not be progressed. And to confirm you have read all the way to the bottom of this position description, please include the word RABBIT somewhere in your application.

- Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.

title: Senior Amazon Specialist
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

We are looking for a Senior Amazon Operations Specialist to join Velomix and take ownership of our day-to-day Amazon engine.



Velomix is a high-performance, innovation-driven fitness brand and the #1 best-selling protein shaker brand on Amazon US, now expanding into supplements and digital products.



This is a senior, hands-on role for someone who already knows Amazon inside out and wants to own results, not wait for step-by-step instructions.



Key Responsibilities

- Own daily Seller Central operations across marketplaces (US first; CA/EU as needed):

listings, variations, catalog hygiene, account health, policy compliance.

- Lead problem-solving on issues: suppressions, NCX, stranded / inactive SKUs, voice-of-customer, buy box, listing changes, hijackers, etc.

- Coordinate with inventory/supply-chain team on FBA/AWD shipments, restock plans, and stock-out risk; maintain clear reorder and launch calendars.

- Manage and improve listing quality: images, copy, A+ content, brand store, keywords (working with design, content, and PPC teams).

- Monitor performance and spot opportunities: sessions, CVR, CTR, TACoS inputs, SQP, pricing, promo calendar.

- Create and maintain SOPs, checklists, and dashboards so the system runs smoothly and can be delegated to junior tea
mbers.

- Mentor and quality-check work of Junior Amazon specialists and VAs.

-Drive and report weekly: key metrics, issues, root causes, and proposed fixes.



Skills & Experience

- 2+ years managing Amazon Seller Central for private label brands (PL model) with strong track record in operations and catalog management.

- Deep familiarity with tools like Helium10, Keepa, Sellerboard, and Amazon Business Reports; strong skills in Google Sheets/Excel.

- Confident handling: listing creation/variation, flat files, cases with Seller Support, FBA/AWD workflow, account health.

- Data-driven mindset: able to pull numbers, interpret them, and turn them into clear actions.

- Excellent written and spoken English (upper-intermediate or higher).

- Fast, reliable internet and a solid laptop suitable for daily Amazon work.

- Personality: ownership-driven, proactive, low-ego, comfortable working remotely with minimal micromanagement.



Why Join Velomix?

- Work at a fast-growing, data-driven brand with real category leadership on Amazon.

- Senior role with clear impact on revenue, profit, and customer experience.

- Competitive salary, with growth based on performance and ownership.

- Remote work with flexible hours, collaborating with a global team.



Only applications submitted via the form with a video will be considered.



FORM : 

LINK: 



Complete the form:

In the form, you’ll:

Share your basic info and Amazon experience

Record a short video answering questions in form



Record a short video (Loom or any Recording) answering questions in form



1. Account Management & Problem Solving

Walk me through how you manage a typical day inside Amazon Seller Central. Can you share a specific example where you identified and resolved a critical issue (such as listing suppression, stranded inventory, or account health risk)? What steps did you take and what was the outcome?



2. Data-Driven Growth

Explain how you use data to improve product performance on Amazon. Which key metrics do you prioritize (e.g., conversion rate, CTR, TACoS), and can you give a real example of how your analysis led to a measurable improvement in sales or profitability?



3. Scaling & Strategy

If you were given a top-selling product that has plateaued, how would you scale it further? Please outline your approach across listing optimization, PPC, pricing, and inventory management.



For link issues,

title: Software Developer
description:
***PLEASE READ ON HOW TO APPLY***



Job Title: Software Developer

Location: Remote | Philippines based ONLY

Salary Range: Php 180,000 per month

A MUST: Minimum of 5 years of solid experience



We’re looking for talented Software Developers to join our remote-first team. In this role, you’ll be responsible for

building and maintaining responsive, high-performing full- stack web applications using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and

Supabase.



Our ideal candidate writes clean, maintainable code, takes ownership of their work, and thrives in a fast-paced

startup environment where autonomy, communication, and craftsmanship are valued.



Key Responsibilities

- Design, develop, and maintain web applications using TypeScript, React, and Next.js.

- Work with Supabase (PostgreSQL) to design, query, and optimise relational database schemas.

- Integrate third-party APIs, including reading, understanding, and applying API documentation.

- Implement responsive, accessible, and performant user interfaces with Tailwind CSS.

- Utilise AI-powered tools (e.g. Cursor, Claude, and similar) to accelerate development while

maintaining high code quality and exercising sound engineering judgment over AI-generated output.

- Collaborate with other developers and/or stakeholders to refine requirements, propose technical solutions, and deliver features on agreed timelines.

- Work with background jobs and scheduled tasks using Inngest (or similar services) for cron-like and event-driven workflows.

- Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve issues across the stack, including in production environments.

- Produce clear technical documentation for features, architectural decisions, and processes.

- Communicate proactively and clearly within a remote team, including written updates and participation in online meetings across UK-Philippines time zones.



Must-Have Skills:

- Strong proficiency in TypeScript, React, and Next.js

- Experience with Supabase or relational databases (PostgreSQL)

- Ability to read and integrate third-party API documentation

- Strong understanding of Tailwind CSS and responsive design principles

- Familiarity with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and modern development workflows

- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively in a remote environment

- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

- Comfortable using AI-assisted development tools while maintaining engineering judgment and security best practices



Nice-to-Have Skills

- Experience with React Native and mobile development tools (Expo, Xcode, Android Studio)

- Experience with Inngest or similar background job / cron orchestration tools

- Familiarity with Vercel serverless and edge functions



Tech Stack



Primary:

- TypeScript

- React

- Next.js

- Tailwind CSS

- Supabase (PostgreSQL)



Secondary / Bonus:

- React Native

- Expo

- Python



Tools & Platforms:

- Git / GitHub

- Vercel

- Supabase

- Inngest

- Standard remote collaboration tools (Slack/Teams, Jira/Linear or equivalent)



***PLEASE READ ON HOW TO APPLY***



How to Apply:

To apply for this role, please submit a link to your resume and a brief Loom video (max 2 minutes) introducing yourself and highlighting your skills relevant to the role. In your video, please address the following:

- A short introduction of yourself and why you're interested in this role.

- Your previous experience as a Software Developer and specific experience with Next JS/Supabase

- Key skills or qualifications that make you a strong fit for this position.



Please note: Applications without a video will not be reviewed. We look forward to welcoming a passionate developer who prioritizes clean code, performance optimization, and delivering exceptional user experiences.

title: Video Editor for Cinematic Product Videos in a German Agency
description:
About Us:



We are a rapidly growing marketing agency from Germany, recognized as a market leader in our field. Our team is young, motivated, and passionate about producing outstanding content. We specialize in creating high-quality product videos for online shops and Amazon product pages. As we continue to expand, we're looking for Remote Video Editors to join our team for a long-term commitment.





Job Description:



We are seeking a talented and experienced Video Editor to cut product videos. You will be provided with all the raw material and a detailed video script for each project. The role is entirely remote, requiring a high-speed internet connection due to the large size of the projects (avg. 100GB) for efficient uploads and downloads.





Training:



To ensure you're set up for success, we provide an extensive course on editing product videos, created by our team. Watching and learning from this course marks the beginning of our collaboration.





Trial Period:



The first week is a paid trial phase, where you'll go through our course and complete a test project. If the quality meets our standards, we will proceed with a permanent employment offer.





Requirements:



Experience in video editing

• Very good in Premiere Pro

• Good in After Effects and Photoshop

• Strong aesthetic sense and design skills

• Good English skills

• Interested in a full-time role (40 hours/week) and looking for long-term employment (years)





How to Apply:



Please submit your application with the subject "Gold-Video-Candidate" and include videos of your previous work.





Traits We Value:



• Ability to follow clear instructions and processes

• Discipline and determination

•. Eagerness to create amazing videos and push the limits





Benefits:



• Paid time off and paid holidays

• 13th-month pay

• Annual performance-based salary bonus/increases

• Internal training with exclusive knowledge





Join Us:



If you're passionate about making a significant impact with your video editing skills and are looking for a long-term, fulfilling career, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today to become a part of our success story!

title: Amazon online arbitrage / A2A / A2A EU virtual assistant (Minimum 1 year previous experience)
description:
***MINIMUM 1 YEAR EXPERIENCE IS A MUST, DO NOT APPLY IF YOU CANNOT SHOW ME PREVIOUS EXAMPLE LEADS. AS I WILL IGNORE YOUR APPLICATION***



Job Description:



We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant from the Philippines to join our team on a full-time basis. The ideal candidate will have proven experience in Amazon online arbitrage sourcing for the UK market, a bonus would be having A2A sourcing skills and A2A EU sourcing skills this will make you stand out compared to the other candidates. If you have A2A experience please highlight this in your application as well as when you send over your previous example leads



We are currently in search of 2 full time virtual assistants



Having experience with Keepa product finder is a must as this is the tool we use to find majority of the leads as well as experience with Seller amp as this is what we use to analyse the deals



Responsibilities:

• Source unique, high-profit and medium-profit deals on Amazon UK, focusing on high-ticket niches such as electronics, home & kitchen, toys, Computers and accessories. (Anything with a sell price of above £50 NO MAKEUP) 

• Ensure all leads are exclusive and not shared with other clients.

• Deliver high-quality, consistent sourcing leads in a timely manner.

• Present leads in a well-organized Excel sheet format with all necessary data points (e.g., cost price, Amazon selling price, profit, ROI, ASIN, etc.).

• Using coupons and taking into account student discount etc when sourcing. 

•Source from unique websites and ensure they are legit and not scam websites by checking trustpilot



Requirements:

• Proven experience in Amazon online arbitrage sourcing for the UK market – this is non-negotiable.

• Must be able to provide examples of previous sourcing work.

• Each deal should have a minimum profit of £10 and a minimum ROI of 20%.

•No oversaturated brands/websites such as Ryobi, Milwaukee, notino and etc

• Must be reliable, detail-oriented, and trustworthy – we value loyalty and hard work, and we take care of our tea
mbers who are committed and dedicated.

• Strong communication skills and the ability to follow instructions independently.

• All leads must be exclusive and not reused or recycled across other clients.



If you’ve read this far and would like to apply, please use the word “Ready” in your application title so I know you have read and understood everything, without this title I will ignore your application. You must also apply with your previous work/example of deal sheet. Without this we will not read your application.



Must also be able to find 5-10 high quality leads a day within the specified criteria above. Your previous work/deal sheet should highlight this.



To get a better understanding of what we require I have attached a training proposal below, please ensure you read it thoroughly to understand our expectations 









Thank you I look forward to your applications and viewing your previous results



Salary will be discussed once you apply. Starting is £250 a month with performance based bonuses and base salary increase out our discretion.

title: Real Estate Transaction Coordinator VA
description:
Just copy and paste everything from the post I built. Start with the "About the role" paragraph all the way through to the "Compensation & growth" section.

Here it is in plain text so you can copy it cleanly:



About the Role

DMV Prime Real Estate is an independent brokerage serving Maryland, DC, and Virginia. We are growing and need a detail-obsessed Transaction Coordinator VA who can own our contract-to-close process from day one — without hand-holding. This is not a general VA role. You will be the backbone of our transaction pipeline. If a deadline gets missed, a deal falls apart. We need someone who understands that.

What You Will Own



Manage all active transactions inside ClickUp from contract execution through closing

Track all critical dates: EMD deadlines, inspection contingencies, financing contingencies, and closing dates

Coordinate with title companies, lenders, buyers agents, and listing agents to keep every deal on track

Send proactive updates to all parties — you communicate before things become problems

Maintain and update the 5-phase Contract to Close checklist for every file

Assist with document management inside ZipForms

Send the broker a daily status report — no file goes dark



You Must Have



2+ years supporting a US real estate agent, team, or brokerage in a TC or operations role

Solid understanding of US real estate contracts, contingency periods, and closing timelines

Experience with ClickUp or a comparable task management tool

Proactive communication habits — you send updates without being asked

Availability Monday–Friday, 9am–1pm Eastern Time

Reliable internet and a professional remote work setup



Strong Plus (Not Required)



Experience with ZipForms or similar transaction management software

Familiarity with GoHighLevel CRM

Experience supporting brokers in Maryland, DC, or Virginia markets specifically



This Is Not a Fit If



You have never worked in US real estate transactions before

You need someone to walk you through every step of the process

You struggle to work independently without daily check-ins

You are not available during US Eastern morning hours



Screening Questions — Answer All Before Applying

Applications without answers to all questions will not be reviewed.



Describe a US real estate transaction you managed from contract to close. What tools did you use and what was your specific role?

Please attach your resume or provide a link to your OnlineJobs.ph profile so we can review your full work history.

A buyer's inspection contingency deadline is in 48 hours and we have not received the inspection report yet. What do you do?

What task management or CRM tools have you used in a real estate role? Be specific.

What is your availability Monday through Friday in US Eastern Time?

What monthly rate are you seeking for a 20-hour per week part-time role?



Important: To confirm you read this post carefully, begin your application with the phrase: "DMV Prime Ready." Applications that do not include this will be skipped.

Compensation & Growth

Starting at $350–$450/month based on experience for 20 hours per week. Performance bonuses are available tied to transaction volume. Path to full-time as the brokerage grows.

title: SOP Specialist (Process Documentation Expert)
description:
SOP Specialist (Process Documentation & Visual Guides)



We’re looking for a highly experienced SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) specialist to help us document processes for our community course content.



This is NOT a general VA role — we want someone who has done SOPs professionally and can create clear, structured, and visual step-by-step guides.



You should be able to:

* Take a process (sometimes messy or unclear) and turn it into a clean SOP

* Follow the process yourself and document it as you go (when relevant)

* Capture high-quality screenshots and visuals

* Write simple, clear, easy-to-follow instructions

* Organise everything neatly in Notion



**This role is perfect for someone who LOVES systems, clarity, and documentation.**



**Requirements:**

* Proven experience creating SOPs (must provide examples) and ideally with E-com businesses or brands

* Strong written English

* Experience with tools like Notion, Loom, Google Docs

* Ability to work independently and figure things out

* Strong attention to detail



**IMPORTANT – HOW TO APPLY:**



To be considered, you MUST:

1. Send 2–3 examples of SOPs you have personally created

2. Briefly explain your process for turning a task into an SOP

3. Include the word "HonestBrands SOP" at the top of your application



We are looking to hire someone long-term if it’s a good fit.



If you’re someone who takes pride in making things simple, clear, and beautifully organised — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Utility Administrator
description:
Job Title: Utility Administrator

We are looking for a highly detail-oriented and analytical Utility Administrator to join our team. This role is responsible for utility reporting and analysis, ensuring billing and contractual accuracy, and supporting operational excellence across the organization. The ideal candidate demonstrates exceptional attention to detail, strong problem-solving skills, and the ability to identify discrepancies quickly and accurately.

Key Responsibilities

Coding and Processing Invoices

Prepare and maintain comprehensive utility reports and tracking systems.

Perform daily utility analysis and monitor recapture activities.

Audit utility billing formulas to ensure accuracy, consistency, and compliance with municipal rate adjustments.

Monitor and track utility rate increases, providing timely and accurate updates to management.

Identify unusual or high consumption patterns and coordinate with field staff for immediate resolution.

Communicate regularly with field staff to address and correct utility-related issues such as water leaks, meter discrepancies.

Ensure all reporting and operational deadlines are consistently met with precision.

Maintain accurate records and ensure all data entries are complete, consistent, and error-free.

Foster clear, consistent, and professional communication across all levels of the organization.

Perform additional duties and responsibilities as assigned by the Supervisor.

Qualifications

Strong attention to detail with a high level of accuracy in data analysis and reporting.

Excellent organizational and problem-solving abilities.

Proficiency in reporting systems and data analysis tools.

Strong verbal and written communication skills.

Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment while maintaining accuracy.

Why Join Us

Collaborative, growth-oriented, and supportive work culture.

Opportunities for professional development and career advancement.

Exposure to cross-functional projects and operational strategy.

title: Business Development Representative (Cold Calling)
description:
Location: Remote

Department: Sales / Business Development

________________________________________

Job Summary:

We are seeking a highly motivated and results-driven Business Development Representative (BDR) to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for making outbound cold calls to potential clients, identifying business opportunities, and setting appointments or generating leads for the sales team. This is an exciting opportunity for someone who enjoys engaging with people, is comfortable with phone outreach, and is looking to grow within a fast-paced sales environment.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities:

• Conduct high-volume outbound cold calls to potential customers.

• Identify prospects' needs and qualify leads through strong discovery conversations.

• Schedule meetings or demos for the sales team with qualified prospects.

• Maintain accurate and detailed records of calls and outcomes in CRM.

• Collaborate with the sales and marketing teams to improve messaging and outreach strategies.

• Meet or exceed daily/weekly/monthly KPIs (dials, talk time, appointment set, sold).

• Stay informed on industry trends and company offers.

________________________________________

Requirements:

• Proven experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or outbound sales is highly preferred.

• Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

• Resilient, coachable, and able to handle rejection professionally.

• Comfortable working in a target-driven environment.

• Basic computer proficiency and experience using CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot).

• High school diploma or equivalent; college degree a plus.

________________________________________

Preferred Skills:

• Experience in B2B sales or lead generation.
