title: Credentialing Liaison
description:
VCounselors is seeking an experienced Credentialing Liaison to support insurance panel credentialing and re-credentialing for licensed mental health providers. In this role, you’ll manage end-to-end credentialing workflows across payer portals and internal tracking systems, maintain accurate status reporting, and proactively follow up with payers to keep applications moving to completion. This role ensures providers are properly enrolled with insurance companies, maintain active credentials, and remain compliant with regulatory and payer requirements to support uninterrupted billing and reimbursement. 



Key Responsibilities 



Manage the full credentialing lifecycle for mental health providers, including initial applications, re-credentialing, and payer enrollment 



Create, attest, and maintain CAQH profiles; ensure attestations remain current and maintain spreadsheet. 



Monitor expiration dates for licenses, certifications, malpractice insurance, and other required documents 



Submit credentialing applications through payer portals (e.g., Availity and payer-specific portals) and monitor for requests/deficiencies. 



Proactively follow up with payers by phone/email, document outcomes, and resolve missing items to drive approvals. 



Maintain credentialing trackers (e.g., Google Sheets/CRM/internal tools) with accurate, up-to-date status per provider. 



Provide clear weekly status updates and escalate risks, denials, or delays to internal stakeholders. 



Support roster submissions when applicable. 



Required Qualifications 



1+ years of hands-on provider credentialing experience (behavioral health preferred). 



Working knowledge of CAQH ProView, NPI, and payer enrollment processes; familiarity with PECOS strongly preferred. 



Experience submitting and tracking applications through payer portals (e.g., Availity and payer-specific portals). 



Strong written and verbal communication skills for payer outreach and internal status reporting. 



Highly organized with strong attention to detail; able to manage multiple provider files and deadlines. 



Proficiency with spreadsheets and tracking tools (Google Sheets/Excel); comfortable working in CRMs or similar internal systems. 



Preferred Qualifications 



Experience credentialing multi-state behavioral health clinicians and/or telehealth providers. 



Experience with roster submissions and payer contracting/enrollment support. 



Comfort working with high-volume workflows while maintaining accuracy and documentation quality. 



Familiarity with insurance payers (commercial, Medicare, Medicaid) 



Knowledge of credentialing platforms (e.g., CAQH) 



Excellent communication and follow-up abilities 



Ability to manage multiple deadlines and prioritize tasks effectively

dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

title: Boomi Integration Specialist
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

Cloudavize is a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking a highly analytical and solution-driven Boomi Integration Engineer to join our growing team. This role is ideal for someone who thrives on connecting systems, optimizing data flows, and building scalable integration solutions across diverse platforms.



As a Boomi Integration Engineer, you will play a critical role in designing, developing, and maintaining integrations that power business operations. You won’t just be moving data, you will be architecting reliable, efficient, and secure integration ecosystems that bridge business applications and enable seamless automation.



If you are passionate about APIs, middleware, and solving complex integration challenges, we want to meet you!



Key Responsibilities:

•Integration Design: Translate business and technical requirements into scalable Boomi integration solutions.

•Development & Deployment: Build, test, and deploy integrations using Boomi AtomSphere.

•API Management: Design and consume REST/SOAP APIs and manage API integrations across systems.

•System Integration: Connect cloud and on-premise applications including CRM, ERP, and third-party platforms.

•Monitoring & Troubleshooting: Proactively monitor integrations, identify issues, and resolve errors efficiently.

•Process Optimization: Improve existing integrations for performance, scalability, and reliability.

•Documentation: Maintain clear documentation of integration processes, mappings, and system architecture.



Technologies You’ll Work With:

•Integration Platform: Boomi (AtomSphere)

•APIs & Data: REST, SOAP, JSON, XML, SQL

•Cloud & Systems: Microsoft 365, Dynamics, Salesforce, NetSuite, and other SaaS platforms

•Tools & Concepts: API Management, Web Services, Data Mapping, EDI (a plus)



What We’re Looking For:

•Proven Experience: 2–4 years of hands-on experience with Boomi or similar integration platforms.

•Integration Expertise: Strong understanding of APIs, middleware, and system-to-system integrations.

•Technical Skills: Experience with data formats (JSON, XML) and scripting where needed.

•Problem-Solving Mindset: Ability to analyze complex workflows and design efficient solutions.

•Debugging Skills: Strong troubleshooting skills for integration failures and performance issues.

•Communication: Excellent English communication skills with the ability to work with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.



Preferred but Not Required:

•Boomi Professional Developer or Architect Certification

•Experience with ERP/CRM integrations (NetSuite, Salesforce, Dynamics, etc.)

•Familiarity with EDI, FTP/SFTP, or event-driven architectures

•Exposure to Microsoft Power Platform or other automation tools



Why Join Cloudavize?

We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally:

•Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding

•Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, monthly profit sharing, performance bonuses, and 13th-month pay

•Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance

•Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment

•Supportive Culture: Collaborative, innovative, and fun team environment



What Sets Us Apart?

•Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses

•Continuous Learning: Company-sponsored certifications and upskilling

•Collaborative Environment: Your ideas and contributions matter

•Flexibility: Remote work with meaningful, impactful projects



How to Apply:

If you’re ready to take your career to the next level as a Boomi Integration Engineer, we’d love to hear from you!



**Submit your application and include the numbers (2028) in your subject line to confirm you’ve read the full job description.

*Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines.

We look forward to hearing from you!

title: REO Portal Virtual Assistant Equator Pyramid RESNET Cascade
description:
We are a high volume real estate brokerage specializing in foreclosure, REO, and institutional listings. Our team works directly with asset managers, lenders, and government entities and operates in fast paced, compliance driven environment. Accuracy, consistency, and follow through are critical in this role. This is a long term opportunity for the right virtual assistant who wants stability, growth, and real responsibility in the REO space.



We are seeking an organized, detail driven Virtual Assistant to handle foreclosure and REO tasking across multiple client portals. Accuracy is crucial in this role. This position supports properties from assignment through closing and requires strong follow through, deadline management, and the ability to work independently within structured systems. The ideal candidate is comfortable working in portals, following task checklists, and maintaining compliance without constant oversight.



Primary responsibilities include completing all required tasks in REO and foreclosure portals, maintaining daily updates and status changes, monitoring deadlines and escalation requirements, and accurately uploading documents, photos, bids, and reports. You will be responsible for maintaining compliance across all client instructions and identifying missing or incorrect items before they become issues. Strong comprehension is needed in this position.



This role also includes coordinating with field staff and vendors, ordering inspections, occupancy checks, preservation services, and repair bids, and following up as needed. Inspections and bids must be reviewed for completeness and obvious discrepancies before submission. You will assist with BPO tasking and organization, including managing photos, comparable data, and required documentation.



Additional responsibilities include coordinating utility turn ons and shut offs, requesting HOA payoff statements and resale disclosures, assisting with title related items such as deeds, tax information, and lien data, supporting MLS data entry and updates when needed, and maintaining accurate internal records and tracking.



Prior experience with REO, foreclosure, or bank owned properties is required. Candidates must have hands on experience working inside REO client portals and a strong understanding of task based workflows, deadlines, and compliance requirements. Applicants should be prepared to list which portals they have worked in, how long they have handled REO or foreclosure files, and the types of tasks they managed on a daily basis.



Strong attention to detail, excellent written communication, and the ability to work independently are essential. This role requires someone who is organized, reliable, and comfortable with repetitive, accuracy driven work. Candidates must be able to troubleshoot issues as they arise and communicate clearly when escalation is needed.



Technical requirements include reliable high speed internet, a quiet home work environment, and proficiency with Google Workspace. Comfort using PDFs, spreadsheets, cloud storage, and task driven systems is required.



This is a full time position during Arizona, United States business hours. We offer a stable long term role with clear systems, structured training on our workflows and clients, and opportunities to grow into higher level REO coordination and oversight positions.



To apply, please include a brief summary of your REO or foreclosure experience, a list of portals you have worked in such as Equator, Pyramid, RESNET, Bid on Homes, or similar systems, and your availability to work United States business hours. Qualified candidates will be provided with a link to officially apply in our database.

title: Fitness Virtual Assistant (Client Management, Meal Plan changes, follow up missed check ins)

You will not be making coaching decisions. Instead, you will follow clear systems and a decision tree that I provide. Your job is to execute tasks accurately and consistently so the coaching program runs smoothly.



This is a long-term position with room to grow as the business expands.



?

• Uploading and organising training programs

- switching out foods the client doesn’t want that week for the same macros but different food

• Setting up new client profiles in the coaching app via a specific system 

• Updating client notes and progress data

• Managing onboarding for new clients

• Organizing client data in Google Sheets

• Following a structured decision-tree for adjustments

- following up on missed check ins for that day 



?



Requirements

• Organized and detail-oriented

• Good written English

• Comfortable using Google Sheets

• Any coaching software





How to Apply



To apply, please answer this question:



A client has been eating 1700 calories for two weeks, doing 10k steps and has been 100?herent and their weight has not changed.

title: Junior Integration Specialist (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a motivated Junior Integration Specialist to join our Managed Service Provider (MSP) team. In this role, you won't just manage one system, you will be the "bridge builder" for our diverse portfolio of business clients, helping to connect their various software platforms so their data flows seamlessly.



This is a client-facing technical role designed for someone who understands system logic and is eager to master enterprise-level tools like Boomi, Salesforce, and Power Automate across multiple different client environments. You will work under the guidance of senior specialists to build, monitor, and troubleshoot the automated "pipes" that keep our clients' businesses running efficiently.



Key Responsibilities

• Client Integration Monitoring & Support

o Monitor daily integration logs across multiple client environments to ensure data is syncing correctly.

o Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve integration errors or data sync failures for various client systems.

o Maintain clear technical documentation for each client’s unique integration workflows and data mappings.



• Workflow Automation for Clients

o Help build and test automated workflows to reduce manual data entry for our clients' business teams.

o Assist in setting up automated alerts, notifications, and scheduled tasks within client environments.

o Update and optimize existing client automations as their business requirements evolve.



• Data Integrity & CRM Support

o Assist with data cleanup, mapping, and bulk imports into client CRMs and other business tools.

o Help configure client system settings (custom fields, user permissions, etc.) to support new integrations.

o Verify that client data remains consistent across their various platforms (e.g., ERP to CRM sync).



• Requirements Gathering & Consulting

o Partner with client stakeholders to understand their business processes and document their technical requirements.

o Participate in the testing and QA phase of new system rollouts for clients.

o Actively train on our core tech stack (Boomi, Salesforce, Power BI/Automate) to take on more complex client builds.



Qualifications

Required

• Technical Aptitude: A strong interest in system logic and a desire to build a career in technical integrations and automation.

• Basic API Knowledge: A foundational understanding of what an API is and familiarity with data formats like JSON.

• Comfort with APIs: Ability to read technical documentation to understand how different software platforms can be connected.

• Business Process Mindset: Ability to look at a client's manual task and visualize how it could be automated.

• Customer Service Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication; ability to explain technical status to non-technical client contacts.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

• Exposure to any CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.) or automation tool (Zapier, Power Automate, etc.).

Why Join Us?

mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?

mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.

title: Business Systems Specialist (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a Business Systems Specialist to help build, maintain, and improve the systems that power our day-to-day operations. In this role, you will partner with stakeholders to understand business processes, translate needs into technical solutions, and deliver automation, reporting, and integrations that scale.

 

The ideal candidate is a strong communicator who can comfortably move between business users and technical implementation. While we use specific tools like Salesforce, Boomi, Power Automate, and Power BI, we are looking for someone with a solid foundation in CRM/ERP administration, system integrations, and workflow automation who is eager to learn and master our specific tech stack.

 

Key Responsibilities

• Workflow Automation

      o Design, build, and maintain automated workflows to streamline business processes.

      o Troubleshoot and optimize existing automations for performance, reliability, and clarity.

      o Implement approval workflows, notifications, data syncs, and operational automations.



• Reporting & Analytics

      o Build and maintain business reports and dashboards based on stakeholder requirements.

      o Connect to data sources, shape data, and create clear visualizations for decision-making.

      o Ensure reporting is accurate, well-documented, and easy for end users to interpret.



• System Integrations

      o Configure and support integration processes across internal systems.

      o Assist with monitoring, error handling, and ongoing integration improvements.

      o Document integration logic, data mappings, and dependencies.



• CRM/ERP Administration & Enablement

      o Implement and configure CRM/ERP environments (Dynamics 365, Salesforce, etc.) to align with client-specific workflows).

      o Assist with data imports, validation rules, reports, dashboards, and user support.

      o Partner with teams to improve adoption and ensure the CRM/ERP matches business processes.



• Cross-Functional Support

      o Gather requirements, map current-state and future-state processes, and recommend solutions.

      o Provide clear documentation (process flows, system configs, runbooks).

      o Communicate status, risks, and timelines effectively to both technical and non-technical audiences.

 

Qualifications

Required

• Experience with CRM/ERP Systems Foundation: Experience supporting or administering a CRM/ERP (e.g., Dynamics 365, Salesforce, HubSpot).

• Automation & Integration Experience: Familiarity with building automated workflows and connecting systems (e.g., Power Automate, Zapier, Boomi, MuleSoft, etc.).

• API Knowledge: Basic understanding of APIs (REST preferred), including authentication concepts and data formats (JSON).

• Comfort Working with APIs: Ability to use API documentation to understand how to connect and move data between systems.

• Business Process Knowledge: Strong ability to understand business workflows and translate them into system logic.

• Excellent Communication: Strong written and verbal skills, with a customer-service mindset.

Preferred (Nice to Have)

• Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, etc.).

• Familiarity with iPaaS concepts (monitoring, error handling, retries, logging).

• Experience working in a ticketing system and documenting changes.

• A proactive, problem-solving mindset with a strong desire to learn new tools and technologies.



Why Join Us?

We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

title: Real Estate Listing Manager - Transaction Coordinator
description:
We are a high performing real estate team serving the Arizona market, with a strong presence in Yavapai, Coconino, and Maricopa Counties. We are seeking a senior level Transaction Coordinator who can also handle buyer and seller contract preparation, listing execution, and operational support. This role provides high level support for a top producing agent managing a substantial transaction volume across both retail and foreclosure properties.



This position requires someone who can independently manage the full lifecycle of a real estate transaction while keeping timelines protected, files compliant, and communication flowing. The ideal candidate is proactive, detail focused, dependable, and comfortable operating in a fast paced environment where accuracy and follow through are critical.



Primary responsibilities include overseeing buyer and seller transactions from executed contract through closing, preparing listing documentation and purchase contracts, and supporting MLS entry and maintenance. This role schedules and confirms inspections, appraisals, walkthroughs, and closings, while actively monitoring deadlines to ensure documents are executed on time. All transaction files are maintained in Transact and 
, with organized storage and tracking in Google Drive. Regular communication with closing attorneys, lenders, inspectors, vendors, and internal tea
mbers is required, and all files must consistently meet compliance standards.



Client communication is an essential component of this role. The Transaction Coordinator serves as a primary operational contact for clients, providing timely updates, milestone reminders, and status communication throughout the transaction. This includes thoughtful check ins, post closing follow ups, and coordination of client related details. All communication and follow up actions must be documented in the CRM to ensure continuity and accountability.



Listing and marketing support is also part of this position. Responsibilities include coordinating photography, video, signage, print materials, and listing pages. The role assists with creating and scheduling branded marketing assets using Canva, supports
 and newsletter distribution, and prepares marketing packages that align with established brand standards.



Administrative responsibilities include managing calendars and inboxes, scheduling appointments, preparing presentations, market summaries, and client reports, maintaining well organized digital files within Google Drive, and tracking tasks and workflows in 
. This role may also support special projects and operational initiatives as needed.



Qualified candidates will have a minimum of 5 years of experience as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator with US based real estate experience. Proven ability to manage transactions independently from contract to close is required, along with professional references. A strong background in retail residential sales is necessary, and experience with foreclosure, REO, or short sale transactions is a significant advantage. Hands on experience with MLS platforms is required, with FlexMLS experience strongly preferred. Candidates must be able to manage 20 or more active transactions at once while maintaining accuracy and quality.



Experience working within a mortgage or title environment is highly valued, including prior roles involving underwriting, file review, or transaction oversight. Arizona market experience is preferred.



The ideal candidate is self directed, proactive, growth oriented, and receptive to feedback. They perform well under pressure, communicate clearly and professionally in English, and maintain consistent attendance. Availability on weekends is expected when transaction timelines require it. Candidates with children must have dependable childcare in place during working hours to ensure focus and productivity.



Work from home requirements include a quiet professional workspace, a computer with an i5 or Ryzen 5 processor or newer, at least 8 GB of RAM, Windows 10 or newer, a wired internet connection with minimum speeds of 15 Mbps, a noise canceling headset, and an HD webcam. Ability to work Mountain Time hours between 8 AM and 5 PM is required.



Important note: This role requires the ability to independently manage transaction coordination, contract preparation, listing support, and client communication. Applicants without the required experience will not be considered.



How to respond: If you are interested and meet the qualifications above, please reply with a brief message outlining your years of Transaction Coordinator experience, the MLS platforms you have used, your experience managing transactions from contract to close, and whether you have worked with foreclosure or REO properties. Qualified candidates will receive a link to formally apply. Initial responses are required before an application link will be provided.

title: eBay Store Launch and Management Specialist for US Marketplace Business
description:
Summary

We are looking for an experienced eBay operator to help launch and manage a US-based eBay seller business in a structured and professional way.



This is not a casual task. We want someone who understands eBay setup, product research, listing optimization, supplier coordination, fulfillment, customer service, account health, and profitability.



The initial engagement will be a 30-day pilot to evaluate execution, communication, transparency, compliance awareness, and actual net profitability.



Scope of work:

- Set up and optimize eBay seller account

- Research and select products based on demand, margin, and risk

- Source reliable suppliers with clear fulfillment process

- Create and optimize listings

- Manage orders, tracking, customer messages, and returns

- Monitor account health and prevent policy issues

- Provide weekly performance reports

- Document workflow and operating process



Important requirements :

- Must have real hands-on experience managing eBay stores

- Must be able to explain supplier model clearly

- Must understand eBay policy and account health

- Must be organized, responsive, and detail-oriented

- Must be comfortable working under a structured pilot with KPIs



This is not a fit if :

-Your process is vague or undocumented

- Your sourcing model is unclear

- You cannot explain how risk is managed

- You cannot clearly define true net profit



To apply, please answer :

- How many eBay stores have you managed directly?

- What business model do you use?

- What supplier model do you use?

- How do you protect account health and stay compliant with eBay policy?

- How do you handle returns, cancellations, and customer issues?

- What metrics do you track weekly?

- How do you define net profit?

- How would you approach the first 30 days of this project?

Compensation

- Compensation will be finalized after reviewing experience, pilot structure, responsibilities, and reporting standards. A performance-based structure may be considered if economics and scope are clearly defined.

title: Full-Time Bookkeeper (Remote | Long-Term)
description:
Who We Are

GH Group is a growing U.S.-based home services group operating across construction, handyman, electrical, and design/build. We run multiple entities, move fast, and hold high standards. Our books are the backbone of how we make decisions, protect profit, and scale. We need someone who treats accuracy like a non-negotiable, not a preference.

This is not a temp role or a side gig. We are hiring for a long-term seat on the team.



The Role

You will own day-to-day bookkeeping accuracy across multiple operating companies. That means real transactions, real reconciliations, and real accountability. You will work inside live systems alongside operations and leadership. Your output directly protects profitability.

Clean books are not a bonus here. They are the baseline.



What You Will Own

• Record and reconcile transactions daily in QuickBooks Online

• Categorize every expense correctly with zero dumping to catch-all accounts

• Match receipts to the correct jobs, projects, and vendors

• Reconcile bank and credit card accounts monthly without exception

• Track Accounts Payable and flag anything aging or at risk

• Support Accounts Receivable: confirm invoice status, log payments, identify gaps

• Maintain clean, organized digital records in Dropbox

• Proactively flag discrepancies, missing receipts, or inconsistencies before they compound

• Follow documented SOPs exactly and raise broken processes when you find them



What You Must Bring

Do not apply if you do not meet these requirements.



• 2+ years of hands-on bookkeeping experience, not just accounting exposure

• Strong, working proficiency in QuickBooks Online

• Experience working with U.S.-based businesses and U.S. financial standards

• Solid command of expense categorization and chart of accounts discipline

• Demonstrated ability to reconcile bank and credit card accounts independently

• Familiarity with job or project-based accounting (strongly preferred)

• Extreme attention to detail. You catch errors before others find them.

• Ability to follow written SOPs without improvising shortcuts

• Fluent English, written and spoken. You must communicate issues clearly and directly.



Preferred But Not Required

• Background in construction, trades, or service-based businesses

• Experience managing bookkeeping across multiple entities

• Comfortable operating in receipt-heavy environments

• Prior remote work supporting U.S. companies



The Details

Type: Full-Time, 40 hours per week

Schedule: Monday through Friday, 7:00 AM to 3:30 PM Eastern Time

Location: Fully Remote

Pay: Competitive hourly rate based on experience, paid weekly

Term: Long-term for the right person. We are not cycling through contractors.



How to Apply

Your application will be rejected automatically if you skip any of the following. We use these filters on purpose.



• Start your application with the exact phrase: "CLEAN BOOKS, NO GUESSING"

• Write a short paragraph describing your actual bookkeeping experience, not your personality

• List every accounting software you have used and how extensively



Applications that ignore these instructions will not be reviewed. We are not being harsh. We are filtering for people who read carefully and follow direction. Those are two of the most important skills in this role.

title: Fractional Controller — Classic Landscaping Remote (U.S.) | Part-Time, ~20-25 hrs/week with potential to grow
description:
Classic Landscaping is a 40-year-old design-build and maintenance firm based in Kirkland, WA, serving the Eastside. We're hiring a remote fractional Controller to own the integrity of our financials and the discipline of our job costing across our group of companies. Our goal is simple: accurate financials available daily, and a clean month-end close by the 5th business day, every month, without exception. Consistency is paramount.



What you'll own:



- Daily reconciliations — bank, credit card, and clearing accounts kept current so the books reflect reality every day, not just at month-end

- Accruals — booking and reversing accruals on a disciplined cadence so revenue and expenses land in the right period

- Job costing end-to-end — PO issuance, receipt management, committed cost tracking, and WIP reporting so we know true margin by job in real time

- Monthly close by the 5th business day — producing a clean, reviewed P&L and Balance Sheet on a published close calendar

- Account balance integrity — verifying AP and AR balances are accurate (our Admin Manager owns transaction processing and cash management; you ensure the balances are right)

- Payroll accounting accuracy — confirming payroll is recorded correctly each period

- QuickBooks Online optimization — restructuring our QBO file for efficiency: chart of accounts, class tracking, workflows, automation, and reporting

- Monthly financial package with variance analysis for ownership

- Year-end coordination with our outside CPA



What we're looking for:



- 5+ years in accounting with at least 2 in a Controller, Assistant Controller, or senior staff role

Construction, landscaping, trades, or other project-based industry experience strongly preferred — job costing fluency is essential

- Deep QuickBooks Online proficiency; experience restructuring or optimizing QBO files is a major plus

- A track record of building and following repeatable close processes — we value consistency over heroics

- Proven success in a fractional or part-time capacity — you manage your time, hit deadlines, and stay responsive without daily oversight

- Clear communicator who can explain the numbers to a non-finance owner and to field operations leaders

CPA, CMA, or relevant degree preferred but not required if the experience is there

- Significant overlap with Pacific Time business hours

- Bilingual English/Spanish is a plus given our team and client base



Engagement details



- Starting at ~20-25 hours per week, with heavier load during the first week of each month for close

- Potential to expand hours or transition to full-time as scope grows

- Direct access to the owner; you'll help shape how this business runs for the next decade



How to apply



Include the following on your application:

- Your resume.

- A detailed outline of your month-end close process. Walk us through what you do, in what order, and on which day. We're looking for specifics — cutoffs, reconciliation sequence, accrual methodology, review steps, and how you ensure the close lands on time.

- The most common pitfalls you see in new clients' books — what's typically broken when you take over a new engagement?

- The improvements you usually make in the first 60-90 days — where do you typically create the most value early on?

- Your QuickBooks Online certification(s). Please attach your QBO ProAdvisor certificate or equivalent proof of certification.

- Your DISC profile. If you don't have one, you can take the free assessment at OnlineJobs.ph and submit the results.



Applications without the close process outline and QBO certification will not be reviewed.

description:
OVERVIEW

We are looking for a meticulous and detail-oriented Contract Creation Specialist to join our team on a part-time, contract basis. This role is ideal for someone with a strong legal or paralegal background who thrives in a structured, document-heavy environment.



RESPONSIBILITIES

• Draft and prepare representation agreements with accuracy and legal precision

• Create and manage listing agreements in compliance with applicable standards

• Review contracts for completeness, consistency, and potential issues

• Input and track contract data within Zoho CRM

• Maintain organized records and ensure all documents are properly filed and up to date

• Communicate clearly and professionally with tea
mbers in written English



REQUIREMENTS

• Proven experience drafting and reviewing legally binding documents

• Hands-on experience with Zoho CRM preferred

TO APPLY -

title: SEO Research Specialist — Local Search Competitive Analysis (GBP + Organic)
description:
If you know what a Google Business Profile is, understand why NAP consistency matters, and get satisfaction from finding the exact right answer and putting it in exactly the right place - read on.



The Work



We run detailed competitive analysis for local home improvement contractors in the US - comparing their websites and Google Business Profiles against competitors to identify gaps and opportunities.



Your job is to find specific data points from specific sources and put them in the right place in a structured spreadsheet. This is precise, methodical work. It is not creative work. There is a right answer for every field and your job is to find it.



The research process and reporting templates are already built and vetted. You are not being asked to figure out what to look for or how to structure it. You are being asked to execute an established process with precision and consistency.



What You'll Actually Do



- Pull data from websites, Google searches, and SEO tools and enter it into a structured Google Sheet

- Run specific searches (site: searches, sitemap pulls, schema checks) following a step-by-step process

- Check Google Business Profiles for specific listing information

- Flag when something is unclear or when a data point can't be found — rather than guessing



What We're Looking For



Skills can be trained. These cannot:



- You read instructions completely before you start

- When you don't understand something, you say so - you don't guess and hope

- You care whether the data in your reports is actually correct

- You follow a process exactly, even when you think you might know a shortcut



Some familiarity with SEO concepts: title tags, Google Business Profile, basic tool navigation - is helpful. You do not need to be an expert. You need to be honest about what you know and what you don't.



To Apply



Send a brief introduction - who you are, what kind of detail-oriented work you've done before, and any exposure you have to SEO or local search.



Then answer this question in your own words:



If I asked you to find out how many pages a competitor's website has indexed in Google - what would you do, and why?



There is no trick here. We want to see how you think through a practical problem.



Details



- Part time to start, with potential to grow

- Flexible hours - results matter more than schedule

- Long term relationship if it's a good fit



In Closing



If you're looking for quick gig work, this isn't it. 



If you're looking for a long term working relationship with someone who is serious about process and serious about quality - let's talk.

title: VA - Media Manager
description:
VISION HANDYMAN

Social Media & Digital Content Manager

Part-Time  |  Remote  |  Mobile, Alabama USA  |  





The Quick Version

Pay

$100 USD/week to start (~20 hours/week)

Review Period

60 days — bonus + raise if we’re clicking. Won’t wait if it’s obvious sooner.

Hours

Flexible — own your schedule, manage your output

Overlap Required

Available 6:00 PM – 10:00 PM US Central, weekdays

Role Type

Long-term tea
mber. Not a gig.

Non-Negotiable

Must have a sense of humor. A weird one.







Who We Are

Vision Handyman is a small jobs handyman company based in Mobile, Alabama. We’re not a general contractor. We’re not a remodeling company. We do the small to medium jobs that homeowners and businesses need done right — light electrical, light plumbing, carpentry, painting, bathroom work, TV and audio installation, furniture assembly, and general maintenance. If it’s a big complicated build, that’s not us. If it’s the thing that’s been on your list for six months, that’s exactly us.



We also run a second brand called Window Tinting Near Me — architectural window tinting for homes and businesses. Solar film, privacy film, decorative film, security film, anti-graffiti film, bird safety film. We work with homeowners, interior designers, architects, and commercial property owners. We do not tint cars. That’s a different world entirely and not ours.



Our mission is simple:



“Take care of people and the money will come.”

That’s not a tagline. It’s how we actually operate — with clients, vendors, partners, and everyone on our team. When things go well here, the people who helped make it happen share in that. Salaries go up. Benefits improve. We’re a profit-sharing organization and our goal is always to pay above market rate as fast as we can get there.



We are not a serious company. We do serious work, but we don’t take ourselves seriously. If you look at our content you’ll see we’re goofballs. That’s not an a
 — that’s the strategy. We believe the best way to build trust with a community is to show up consistently, be genuinely useful, and be funny about it. Not TikTok-gag funny. Not 
 funny. Weird funny. Absurdist funny. “I can’t believe they just said that” funny. Educational content that makes you smirk or do a double take. If it’s not at least a little funny, it goes back to the drawing board.



We want this job to feel like getting paid to have a good time. If it feels like a grind, something’s wrong. That goes for everyone on the team.





What This Job Is

This is a media manager role. You are not handling customer service. You are not talking to clients. You are not managing DMs. Your job is to take the raw content we produce — job site videos, project footage, notes — and turn it into a consistent, well-edited, properly scheduled content operation across multiple platforms.



We feed you raw footage and information via Google Drive. You do the rest. That includes editing, scheduling, writing, posting, analyzing, and advising. We want to hand this off and trust you to run it — not micromanage every post.





Your Responsibilities

Video Editing & Content Production

Edit 2 long-form videos per week (5–10 minutes each) from raw project footage

Pull 10 short-form clips per week from those long-form videos — 2 shorts per day, every day including weekends

Adapt each short for the platform it’s going on —
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts all get the same core clip but need to feel right for each audience 
 skews older, Instagram is polished but real, TikTok is the wild west, YouTube is more professional)

Once a month, assist with editing a longer video — up to about an hour — for YouTube

Humor is not optional. Every piece of content needs at least one 
nt that makes someone smile, laugh, or do a double take. We’re going for weird and educational — not gags, not punchlines, not comedy sketches. Think dry. Think absurdist. Think ‘what the hell did I just watch and why am I smiling.’ If it doesn’t have that, rework it until it does.

Platform Management, Scheduling & Strategy

Schedule and automate content across
, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn,
/X, and Snapchat

Primary platforms 
, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube) get fully edited and optimized content. Secondary platforms (LinkedIn,
/X, Snapchat) start as cross-posts — but we expect you to analyze performance and tell us where we should be investing more.

Use Meta Business Suite for
 and Instagram scheduling. Set up automation across other platforms wherever possible.

Batch and schedule content ahead of time — ideally a full month queued at once so it runs automatically

Research and own best posting times, frequency, and format for each platform. We’re not giving you a rigid schedule — we expect you to know what works.

Analyze performance across all platforms regularly and bring us recommendations. If LinkedIn is outperforming Instagram, tell us. If TikTok needs custom content instead of a crosspost to really move, bring that to us. We want your strategic input, not just execution.

Respond to comments to support engagement — no DM management

Google Business Profile Management

Manage and keep both GBP listings active and accurate — Vision Handyman and Window Tinting Near Me

Post regular updates, project photos, and service content to both profiles

Write and post GBP updates based on content and information we provide — copy is generated with Claude AI prompts, lightly edited, and published. This should not add significant workload.

Help align both profiles for strong local SEO and map pack ranking — right categories, right service descriptions, right structure so Google and AI crawlers read it correctly

Website Management — WordPress

Basic WordPress proficiency required — adding and updating service pages, uploading content, light formatting. No advanced coding or theme building needed.

Vision Handyman (
) — update and build out service pages to align with our Google Business Profile categories and services. Copy is generated using Claude AI prompts. Your job is to run those prompts, lightly edit for voice and formatting, and get it live. Joe reviews everything before it publishes and gives direct feedback to help you dial in the voice over time. Collaborative, not high-pressure.

Window Tinting Near Me (
) — migrate the current site from GoDaddy’s website editor to WordPress. Keep the same structure and look. If you see ways to improve it, bring them to us — we’re open to your ideas.

Both websites are moving toward an educational resource feel — service-focused blog posts, maintenance tips, how-to content, embedded videos. Think local home maintenance hub, not just a service brochure. Blog topics stay tied to our GBP service categories — not random content. Copy comes from Claude prompts so this should not significantly increase your workload.





The Weekly Content Flow

Here’s roughly how a week looks:



Monday — 2 shorts across all platforms

Tuesday — 1 long-form video (5–10 min) + 2 shorts across all platforms

Wednesday — 2 shorts across all platforms

Thursday — 1 long-form video (5–10 min) + 2 shorts across all platforms

Friday — 2 shorts across all platforms

Saturday & Sunday — 2 shorts per day across all platforms



Goal is to batch and schedule ahead so this runs on autopilot. If you can queue a full month of content at once, that’s exactly right.





Who We’re Looking For

Experienced editing short and long-form video for social media

Comfortable with Meta Business Suite, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn,
/X, Snapchat, and WordPress

Understands how each platform works and what performs on each — without being told

Able to analyze platform performance and bring strategic recommendations — not just post and move on

Strong enough English to write captions, blog posts, GBP updates, and comment replies that feel natural and on-brand

Gets the humor. Not just ‘oh yeah I’m funny.’ Actually gets weird, dry, absurdist humor and can recognize when something needs more of it

Reliable and self-directed — we measure results, not hours logged

Available to communicate 6:00–10:00 PM US Central Time on weekdays

Looking for a real ongoing team role, not a one-off project





The Pay Structure

Starting pay is $100 USD per week for approximately 20 hours of work.



At 60 days we do a review. If things are going well and we’re clicking — and we’ll know pretty quickly if we are — you’ll receive a $500 USD bonus and a 25% pay increase. If it’s obvious we’re a great fit before 60 days, we won’t make you wait.



This is a long-term role. As Vision Handyman grows, compensation grows. We want to pay everyone above market rate — that’s the goal, and we’re working toward it. The right person who helps us get there will absolutely share in what we build.





How to Apply

Send us:

A brief intro — who you are, where you’re based, and why this fits you

2–3 examples of social media content you’ve edited or managed (links preferred)

Your favorite fictional American character — from TV, film, a book, a comic, anything. Include it somewhere in your application. We’re not telling you why

Something that tells us you actually read this listing and get what we’re going for.  Humor highlights



That last one matters more than you think. We’ll know immediately if you didn’t read it. We’re not looking for the most polished portfolio. We’re looking for the right person who wants to build something with us — and who can make it at least a little funny while they’re at it.

title: Business Development Executive
description:
Business Development Executive (BDE)

Full-Time | Remote | £4.50/hour



About the Role



We are recruiting on behalf of a fast-growing commercial growth consultancy that partners with ambitious, owner-managed businesses across the UK and internationally.



This is a high-activity, performance-driven business development role focused on generating qualified conversations and booking appointments with senior decision-makers across multiple client campaigns.



This is not a transactional sales role. You will be working across different industries, supporting structured outbound activity and helping build predictable pipeline for a range of established businesses.



This is a hands-on, ownership-driven role where consistency, communication, and execution are critical.



Working Hours

Flexible within UK business hours (Monday to Friday)

9:00am – 5:30pm UK Time (exact shifts to be agreed)



Key Responsibilities

Outbound Business Development

Execute high-volume outbound activity (primarily phone-led)

Run structured multi-channel outreach (phone, LinkedIn,
)

Engage business owners and senior decision-makers

Create qualified commercial conversations across multiple client campaigns



Appointment Setting

Qualify prospects against defined criteria

Book high-quality, relevant appointments

Ensure meetings are properly positioned and valuable

Confident speaking with senior decision-makers

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Self-motivated and comfortable working remotely



What We’re Looking For

We are looking for someone who:



Takes full ownership of daily activity and outcomes

Thrives in a fast-paced, high-output environment

Is consistent with outbound activity (not occasional effort)

Communicates clearly and professionally

Is commercially aware and outcome-focused

Can manage structure without constant supervision



What This Role Is NOT

? Passive or low-activity sales role

? Admin-only CRM updating role

? Single-product, repetitive sales job

? Role without accountability or targets



How to Apply

title: Online / Remote Sales Specialist | PHP100,000 - PHP300,000+ per month | Top 1% Sales Specialists Wanted
description:
100% Remote | Base $3.10/hour + Uncapped Commission | Realistic earnings: PHP100,000 - PHP300,000+ per month (commission-driven) | Commitment: 48+ hours per week, US time zones | Apply at: 



This is not an entry-level role. This is not a virtual assistant gig. This is not customer support with a sales tag pinned on it.



We are hiring closers. Operators who have already proven they can sell through writing and want a seat where their effort actually compounds. If you have never personally closed a deal, never hit a sales target, and have no track record of revenue you can point to, this listing is not for you. Skip it.



If you are still reading, keep going.



We are a Philippines-based remote sales agency operating exclusively with US-based online social media clients. Our operators run high-volume sales through purpose-built CRMs and convert inbound leads into recurring revenue through written communication. We are not a call center. We are not a BPO. We are a sales floor that happens to be remote, and we hire like a sales floor: high standards, performance accountability, and a leaderboard that determines your paycheck.



You will run dozens of live clients every shift. You will read intent in seconds, build trust through writing, and close the same hour. You will compete against the rest of our team for leaderboard position, and your commission tier moves up or down based on where you land that week.



The work is not hard to understand. It is hard to do consistently at a high level. That is why most people who apply do not last past their trial. The ones who stay earn more than they have ever earned in their lives.



Compensation Reality

- Base: $3.10/hour (~?177/hour), paid weekly from day one

- Commission: Uncapped, scaled by leaderboard position

- Live earnings tracker so you always know your number

- Weekly payouts with no hold-back, no clawback, no agency cut



What our team actually earns:

- 94% of operators clear PHP100,000/month after the 90-day ramp

- Senior tier earns  PHP200,000 -  PHP300,000+/month

- The single top performer last quarter cleared the equivalent of a US engineering salary

- Underperformers do not stay. We do not carry dead weight



We are direct about this because closers respect direct. If you want a comfortable salary with no upside, work somewhere else. If you want to see your name climb a leaderboard and watch your paycheck climb with it, keep reading.



What the Day Looks Like

- Inbound messages land continuously - you respond in real time, build rapport, and monetise

- You manage 3+ live conversations simultaneously without dropping quality

- You hit daily revenue targets that roll up into weekly leaderboard standings

- You take coaching directly from your shift manager and apply it the same shift

- You debrief your numbers at the end of each week and adjust



Who We Will Hire

- Native-level written English - American casual register, slang, emoji fluency, zero stiffness

- 70+ WPM typing with the ability to run 3+ clients at once without losing tone

- High-speed reliable internet and a serious workspace - this is not a coffee shop job

- 48+ hours/week availability

- Coachable ego - you take feedback as data, not as criticism, and adjust faster than the people next to you

- Competitive drive - you want to win the leaderboard, not just hit base



Strongly preferred:

- Prior remote sales role

- Background in copywriting, persuasion, or behavioral psychology



What You Should Skip This Role For

- You have never closed a sale in your life

- You get rattled by a leaderboard or by being benchmarked against peers

- You are looking for a side hustle to fit around other work



Hiring Process

- Written test - real sales scenarios scored on tone, instinct, and close ability

- Interview - 15 minutes with our Operations Manager. Bring proof of past sales performance. We will ask for specifics

- Paid trial shift - 4 to 8 hours running live conversations alongside a senior closer

- Offer or pass - we d
 within 48 hours of your trial



We move fast. If you are the right fit, you will be earning base + commission within one week of your application.



How to Apply

- Apply at: 



All candidates must apply through the portal.

title: Content Creator & Video Editor
description:
About Montra

To Apply

title: Customer Success Manager
description:
Company: Get Me Links

 Location: Remote (Preference for Eastern Europe, South Africa, SEA)

 Salary: USD $3,000–$4,000/month, depending on experience

 Hours: Full-time (flexible, but overlap with 1pm–10pm PH time required)



About Get Me Links

We're a high-performance SEO agency serving other agencies. That's right — our clients are sharp operators who resell our fully bespoke link building services to their own clients. They expect excellence, and we deliver it.

We've grown fast. We're profitable. We've got the sales team ready to take the leads. And now we're building the next-level engine that helps us scale and double our ARR within 2 years, with MRR as our north star.



This is where you come in.

We're looking for a Customer Success Manager to take full ownership of client retention and team development, working directly with leadership to turn relationships into revenue. This is not a check-in-with-clients role. This is not a cushy gig. This is a role for someone who wants to own outcomes, build a high-performing AM team, and become an indispensable force behind our growth.



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Own the full client lifecycle — from onboarding through retention and expansion — ensuring every client feels valued, heard, and set up for long-term success

- Nurture a portfolio of SEO clients, building deep relationships that drive measurable growth in MRR and reduce churn

- Train, coach, and mentor junior Account Managers with a clear pathway to grow them into senior roles — creating a team that runs like a well-oiled machine

- Serve as the strategic bridge between clients and internal delivery teams, translating client goals into actionable outcomes

- Identify upsell and expansion opportunities naturally, through genuine relationship-building rather than hard selling

- Track and report on client health metrics, satisfaction scores, and revenue impact — and use that data to continuously improve the experience

- Build and refine training materials, SOPs, and playbooks that level up the entire AM team



Who You Are:

You're not just a people person — you're a performance person. You care deeply about clients, but you also understand that great customer success is what moves the revenue needle. You've seen what happens when CS is done right, and you have the receipts to prove it.



You thrive in a fast-paced, remote-first environment, you understand the SEO agency world, and you know how to bring structure, warmth, and accountability to a team at the same time. You lead with a customers-first philosophy — not because someone told you to, but because you genuinely believe it's the only way to build something that lasts.



Requirements:

- Proven experience in a Customer Success, Account Management, or Client Services role — ideally within a digital marketing or SEO agency

- Demonstrated ability to train and develop junior tea
mbers into senior-level performers, with real examples you can speak to

- A hard track record of client retention and revenue growth — we want specific numbers: MRR impact, churn rates reduced, accounts expanded

- A working understanding of SEO fundamentals — you don't need to be technical, but you need to speak credibly with clients and internal teams

- Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to handle difficult conversations with professionalism and empathy

- Experience working asynchronously in a remote-first environment





Bonus Points If You...

- Have worked specifically at an SEO, link building, or content agency

- Can walk us through a client you saved from churning — and what you did differently

- Have built or improved a CS or AM training program from scratch

- Are comfortable with tools like HubSpot, Notion, Slack, or similar agency-stack tools

- Have a genuine passion for helping people grow — whether that's your clients or your team



What You’ll Get:

- USD $3,000–$4,000/month based on skills and experience

- 3 weeks paid leave + Christmas break (Dec 24 – Jan 1)

- Remote-first, async-friendly culture — results over hours

- Real autonomy and real impact — this is your department to build

- A sharp team, strong values (Competence, Adaptability, Trust, Collaboration, Humanity), and no fluff



How to Apply (Follow These Steps Precisely)

Please
 the following to 
 with the subject: "CSM – I'm [Your Name] and I Turn Clients Into Loyal Partners"



Include:

- Your resume with two professional references

- Your DISC profile (free test at 
)

- A 2–3 minute video (YouTube Unlisted) where you tell us:

  - Why you want this role

  - The client success story you're most proud of — and the revenue impact it had

  - How you'd approach building and training a team like ours in 2026



We’re looking for someone rare. If that’s you, we can’t wait to meet you.

title: Supply chain manager ecommerce
description:
Supply Chain Manager — Inventory & Replenishment



We are not looking for someone who follows processes. We are looking for someone who makes sure products are in stock, before anyone has to ask.



The role



You own inventory flow. End to end.



You are responsible for inventory availability across all channels and our main warehouse, FBA, and LVB. You ensure the right products are in the right place at the right time, and you act before stock-outs happen. This is a performance system, not a task list.



What you'll actually do



Daily operations

— Monitor stock levels across warehouse, FBA and LVB

— Track incoming shipments and delays

— Maintain full visibility of inventory at all times



Replenishment & planning

— Plan and execute replenishment to FBA and LVB

— Prioritise fast restocking of bestsellers

— Balance stock between channels



FBA shipments

— Create and manage shipments at box and pallet level

— Book and manage Amazon Freight

— Ensure smooth inbound flow



Coordination & control

— Work with warehouse and carriers to ensure correct execution

— Fix issues fast when something goes wrong

— Keep inbound and stock data clean and reliable in Airtable / Sheets



Scope



This role focuses on execution and control of inventory flow within Europe. The following are handled in a separate role and are not part of this position:



— Supplier communication in China

— Procurement / purchasing

— Long-term demand forecasting



What we expect each week



— Which SKUs are at risk of going out of stock

— Which shipments are delayed or at risk

— What actions were taken to resolve issues

— A clear plan for the week ahead



Who you are



You are proactive and fast. You think in stock and flow, not tasks. You take ownership of problems and you don't wait to be asked to fix them.



If a product goes out of stock, you own it.

title: Customer Happiness Specialist
description:
We are seeking a highly dependable and detail-oriented Customer Service & Supply Chain Specialist with solid experience in fashion dropshipping. This is a long-term position for someone who can work independently, communicate effectively, and consistently deliver accurate, high-quality results. A major part of the role involves coordinating with suppliers, monitoring order fulfillment, and ensuring smooth end-to-end operations. Many customer replies will be supported by AI tools.

Use internal spreadsheets and documents to manage daily workflows and maintain accurate operational records.

Respond to HelpScout tickets promptly (expected output: 30–40 tickets per hour).

Follow return policy procedures, including offering discounts, issuing refunds, and providing return instructions.

Report damaged or incorrect items to suppliers (via 
 or CJ) and secure replacements or refunds.

Coordinate closely with suppliers regarding shipment updates, replacements, cancellations, and all fulfillment-related concerns.

Oversee order fulfillment, ensuring all unfulfilled Shopify orders are followed up, and resolve issues regarding size, color, inventory availability, and address verification.

Proven experience with CJ Dropshipping is mandatory.

Collaborate with both Customer Service and Supply Chain teams to keep operations running smoothly.



Qualifications



Required: Proven experience in fashion dropshipping and supply chain/order fulfillment (applications without this will not be reviewed).

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Experience with Zendesk, Gorgias, HelpScout, Shopify, and other customer service or fulfillment tools.

Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple responsibilities independently.

Add the word sky in the subject line when applying.

Detail-oriented with strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Comfortable giving feedback and proposing improvements to operational processes.





What We Offer:

Competitive salary + KPI-based bonuses

Long-term, work-from-home setup

Flexible schedule within agreed hours

Strong opportunities for career growth as the company expands



How to Apply:

Your resume

A loom video [less than a minute] explaining how you organize your day

A cover letter detailing your fashion dropshipping, supplier coordination, and order fulfillment experience, and explaining why you are an ideal fit for this role.

title: Quality Analyst
description:
About Us: We are a company based in the United Arab Emirates, with many international Clientele. You will be working remotely with our head office in the UAE and our Clients around the world, depending on which division we hire you for.



Job Description:

1) Work from home-remote work

2) Full time work-you cannot hold another job during our working hours. This is a professional position which requires dedication and there is room for advancement and growth. You will be in communication during working hours with our team and our partners.

3) Payment will be based on experience. Commissions are also available based on performance.

4) You will work from your computer and phone to review and ensure the quality of marketing content before uploading it to the following platforms: Instagram,
, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, and Dropbox.

5) Monitor sub-contractors, ensuring deadlines are met, responsiveness is maintained, and quality standards are achieved.

6) Communicate with corresponding contacts to align goals and meet work expectations.

7) Perform at a high level in writing viral and engaging content scripts, thoroughly reviewing and ensuring video quality, and creating high-quality designs using tools such as Canva.

8) Research and ideation of content that will help promote the Client and create engagement. This will factor into your commissions.

9) After you pass the initial training period, you will be given a 1-year, renewable contract. We hope to work with you for many years to come. We are looking for someone who wants long term stability.



Skills Needed:

1) Proven experience as a Quality Analyst, QA Specialist, or similar role (preferably in marketing or digital content).

2) Strong organizational and time-management skills, and excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.

3) High attention to detail with a strong commitment to meeting deadlines, and the ability to work both independently and as part of a team.

4) University education preferred.

5) Excellent use of computers and software like MS word, Google sheets, etc.



HOW TO APPLY:

Please send (1) your CV/resume and (2) your portfolio/work samples/metrics to 
 subject should be as follows: Quality Analyst - [Your Full Name]



Once your application is reviewed, you will be contacted via
 about a video or phone interview. After that, you will be notified whether or not you got the position.



Please do not send messages through this application as it is easier for us to organize things via
. If you have any inquiries, please send an
.



Thank you for your application and we hope you are chosen for an interview to join our team!

title: Video editor - REELS/TIKTOK videos
description:
Video Editor for Reels & TikTok (Scaling Edge Agency)



Position: Video Editor (Reels/TikTok)

Location: Remote



About Us



Scaling Edge is a fast-growing growth consultancy that helps businesses scale through AI systems, paid advertising, and content strategy. We work with high-performing entrepreneurs, consultants, and service-based brands to help them grow faster and smarter through automation, branding, and data-driven marketing.



We’re looking for a talented Video Editor who can produce engaging, high-quality short-form videos (Reels and TikToks) for our clients. This role is ideal for someone creative, fast, and detail-oriented who understands how to make content stand out online.



What You’ll Be Doing



Editing short-form videos (30–60 seconds) for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.



Managing large video batches (30–40 videos at a time) with a 48–72 hour turnaround.



Adapting your editing style to match different client brands and tones.



Incorporating trending sounds, captions, transitions, and storytelling techniques.



Collaborating with our creative and marketing team to ensure consistency and quality.



What We’re Looking For

(Experience with AI tools, marketing, or business-related content is a plus but not required.)



Why Join Scaling Edge

Remote flexibility — work from anywhere with consistent, ongoing projects.

Application Instructions
