title: URGENT! Senior Meta Ads Media Buyer ($2500/ Month )
description:
About the role



We are a fast growing performance marketing agency generating leads across multiple industries. Our campaigns are already live. This role is not about launching ads. It is about diving into active accounts, finding what is underperforming, and fixing it with precision.



You will report directly to the Operations Manager and Founders. Your work will be seen and acted on immediately.





Core responsibilities



>Monitor all active Meta, Google, and TikTok campaigns daily during BST hours

>Analyze data to identify optimization opportunities across CPL, CPA, and conversion rate

>Diagnose performance drops and implement fixes quickly with clear reasoning

>Spot creative fatigue early and brief new testing angles backed by data

>Adjust targeting, budgets, bid strategies, and campaign structure based on evidence

>Wont need to create ads as the dashboard can create images and videos, they just need to be able to identify new hooks etc.

>If you are comfortable coming up with new angles/hooks etc. 

>Able to research into competitors for new angles and coming up with creative briefs.

>Produce concise weekly performance reports with actionable recommendations

>Communicate daily through Slack and manage tasks in ClickUp independently





Requirements



>3 or more years managing Meta Ads in a performance focused 

environment

>Proven experience optimizing existing accounts, not just launching campaigns

>Solid understanding of lead generation funnels and conversion mechanics

>Comfortable analyzing large scale Ads Manager accounts with significant daily spend

>Hands on experience with Google Ads, TikTok Ads, and GoHighLevel

>Available full time during BST business hours

>Strong written communication and self managed workflow





Logic question  (required)



You are managing a Meta lead generation campaign. Over the past 7 days CPL has increased by 68?spite budget, audience, and creative all remaining unchanged. iOS traffic accounts for 60% of impressions. Frequency is at 2.1. Landing page conversion rate has dropped from 18% to 9%.



Walk us through your full diagnostic process. What do you check first, in what order, and why? What is your hypothesis and what action do you take?



We are not looking for a perfect answer. We are evaluating how you think, how you structure a problem, and the depth of your knowledge.





Video introduction  (required)



Record a 2 to 3 minute video and upload to Loom or Google Drive. Include the link in your application. Cover who you are, your experience with paid media, a specific result you are proud of with real numbers, and why this role is the right fit for you.



Read carefully before applying



To confirm you have read this post in full, begin your cover letter with the exact phrase "I want to be lucky". Applications that do not open with this phrase will not be reviewed.



What we offer



$16 to  USD per hour based on experience, reviewed after probation



Full time remote position with a stable and growing agency

Direct access to Founders and Operations Manager with no middle layers



Fast moving environment where your decisions have immediate visible impact



****How to apply****

Submit your CV + cover letter starting with the required phrase, and your video link. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Sales Rep and Appointment Setter ($1,300/ month)
description:
Sales Rep and Appointment Setter

(B2B Outbound and Lead Generation Specialist)





Who we are



We are a fast growing performance marketing agency working with serious clients who spend substantial amount  per month on lead generation. We are expanding and need someone sharp, resourceful, and self driven to help us connect with the right prospects at scale.



You will report directly to the Operations Manager and Founders. There are no layers between you and the people making decisions.





What this role is about



This is a pure outbound role. Your job is to find the right people, open conversations, and book qualified calls for the team. We will give you the target industries and ideal client profiles. From there, you own the process  building lists, writing outreach, following up, and filling the calendar.



If you need daily task lists, step by step instructions, or someone to tell you who to contact, this role is not right for you. If you thrive working independently, take ownership of your pipeline, and know how to write a message that actually gets a reply, keep reading.





Core responsibilities



>Build targeted prospect lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Google Search, and other research tools

>Send daily LinkedIn connection requests and follow up messages to qualified prospects

>Write and send personalized cold
s to high value leads

>Maintain clean, organized, and up to date prospect lists inside the CRM

>Follow up consistently across all active leads until there is a clear outcome

>Book discovery calls and coordinate scheduling for the founders

>Log all outreach activity accurately in ClickUp and the CRM daily

>Communicate updates, blockers, and wins clearly through Slack every day





Requirements



>Proven experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator for identifying and reaching high value B2B leads

>Strong written English with the ability to write outreach messages that feel personal, not templated

>Experience with cold
 outreach including writing, sequencing, and follow up

>Comfortable working inside a CRM to manage and track your full pipeline

>Highly organized and able to manage a large number of active prospects simultaneously

>Takes initiative and works independently without needing to be chased

>Available full time during BST business hours





Bonus experience



>Background in B2B, SaaS, lead generation, or performance marketing industries

>Experience booking calls for a high ticket or agency offer

>Familiarity with outreach tools such as Apollo, Instantly, or Smartlead



Logic question  (Required)



You have been given a target industry: digital marketing agencies in the UK with 10 to 50 employees that are actively running paid ads for clients. You have LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Google Search, and Google Workspace available. You have no existing data and your first task is to book 5 discovery calls within 7 days.



Walk us through exactly what you would do from day one. How do you build your list, who do you target, what does your outreach message look like, and how do you follow up? Be specific.



We are not looking for a perfect answer. We want to see how you think, how you plan, and whether you can execute independently without being told every step.





Video introduction (Required)



Record a 2 to 3 minute video and upload to Loom or Google Drive. Include the link in your application. Cover who you are, your experience in outbound sales or appointment setting, a specific result you are proud of with real numbers, and why this role is the right fit for you right now.



***Read carefully before applying***



To confirm you have read this post in full and have the attention to detail this role requires, begin your cover letter with the exact phrase "I want to be lucky". Applications that do not open with this phrase will not be reviewed, regardless of experience.



Do not apply if...



>You need daily instructions and cannot build or manage your own outreach pipeline

>You copy and paste the same generic application for every role you apply to

>You cannot work full time during BST business hours

>You have no real experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator or cold
 outreach

>You are not comfortable being directly accountable to Founders and an Operations Manager





What we offer



>$6 to $8 USD per hour based on experience, reviewed after probation

>Full time remote position with a stable and growing agency

>Direct access to Founders and Operations Manager with no middle layers

>Long term opportunity to grow with the business as we scale

>A fast moving team that values output over process and respects people who take ownership





How to apply



Submit your CV + cover letter starting with the required phrase,  your logic question answer, and your Loom or Google Drive video link. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Debt Recovery Negotiator (UK Debt Recovery
description:
About us

We’re a UK-based credit management and debt recovery firm supporting small businesses. We're firm, fair, and compliant. We focus on outcomes and do the work properly, maintaining professional standards throughout. We already have a well-established team based in the Philippines, and this role will work closely with them.



The role

We’re hiring a senior debt recovery negotiator to progress a portfolio of UK debt recovery matters and increase collections revenue. This is a negotiation-led role with strong case-management discipline: you will secure payments and firm commitments by phone, then accurately document and drive the next action. The balance between calls and case work will vary week to week depending on the portfolio.



You will handle a mix of:

• Commercial debts (e.g., Ltd companies)

• Consumer/sole trader matters where the Pre-Action Protocol (PAP) applies

We will train you on our systems and internal workflow; we are hiring for debt recovery capability and professionalism.



Hours

This role is available part-time or full-time (20–40 hours/week). We can offer 40 hours/week immediately for the right candidate. Please confirm your preferred weekly hours and availability in your application.



Salary and bonuses

Salary is up to PHP 50,000/month for the right candidate (depending on experience and performance), plus performance bonuses. This role is paid in PHP, and you’ll be joining an established team based in the Philippines.



Key responsibilities

• Negotiate payment in full or structured payment plans, securing clear outcomes (date, amount, method, and written confirmation)

• Lead high-friction conversations professionally: build rapport quickly, ask direct questions, manage objections, and maintain control of the call

• Handle common debtor behaviours including delay tactics, avoidance, partial offers, hostility, and “it’s in dispute”

• Identify disputes early, document them clearly, request specifics/evidence, and escalate internally when required

• Communicate professionally with clients when required (updates, clarifying disputes, and progressing next steps)

• Produce clear written follow-ups summarising agreements, deadlines, and next steps

• Maintain excellent case notes, timelines, and follow-up discipline so nothing is missed

• Take ownership of progressing cases daily and working to targets (outcome-focused, not “busy work”)



What success looks like

• Cases move forward consistently and efficiently; you do not allow files to stagnate

• Conversations convert into payments or firm commitments with specific dates and amounts

• Notes are accurate, complete, and audit-ready (dates, amounts, promises-to-pay, dispute details, and next actions)

• You remain calm, professional, and emotionally controlled under pressure, while still being assertive when needed



Performance and incentives

We work to clear targets, and we reward performance. Bonuses are based on results and quality (e.g., collections outcomes, follow-up discipline, and case documentation standards).



Must-have requirements (please don’t apply if you don’t meet these)

• 3+ years of debt recovery/collections experience with negotiation responsibility

• Demonstrable track record of results (e.g., amounts collected, recovery rate, promise-to-pay kept rate, or similar)

• Strong phone-based negotiation and objection handling skills

• Strong written English and the ability to write clear, professional summaries and follow-ups

• High attention to detail and strong personal organisation (case notes and follow-ups are non-negotiable)

• Professional judgement and emotional regulation: firm and persistent without being aggressive

• Comfortable handling a mixed portfolio (commercial and consumer/sole trader matters)

• Comfortable being client-facing when required: able to communicate clearly and professionally with business owners/clients, not just debtors

• Experience working in a specialist collections environment (agency or in-house collections team)

• Regular experience handling customers/clients directly (updates, problem-solving, and expectation management)

• Legal-process literacy: able to work within compliance-led recovery processes, handle disputes/evidence properly, and understand escalation steps (legal background strongly preferred)



Work setup requirements (must-have)

• Reliable laptop/desktop suitable for daily case management work

• Stable, high-speed internet connection and a quiet, private workspace for calls

• Headset with clear audio (noise-cancelling preferred)

• Working webcam and microphone (required for interview, training, and occasional check-ins)

• Backup internet option (mobile data is fine) for continuity

• You must be able to maintain consistent connectivity during agreed working hours

• We provide the calling/VOIP system for debtor calls



Additional experience (beneficial, but not required)

If you don’t have these, you can still be a strong fit — please apply if you meet the must-haves.

• UK debt recovery exposure (e.g., familiarity with LBA/PAP, UK court/claims process, or UK compliance expectations)



Fit and standards

This is not a customer service role. We are looking for a senior negotiator who can close, hold boundaries, and document properly. If you prefer a heavily scripted environment or avoid difficult conversations, this role will not be a fit.



Screening

To be considered, you must complete our short TestGorilla assessment. We will only review candidates who complete the assessment.

title: Freelance Credit Control Team (Associate to Senior Officer) – Philippines (Remote)
description:
Freelance Credit Control Team (Remote, Philippines-based, Flexible Hours)



Credit Control Associate, Credit Controller, Senior Credit Control Officer



About Us

The Credit Collections Company Ltd is a UK-based, SME-focused credit management firm. We support clients with credit control and debt recovery using a warm, professional and relationship-led approach.



The Roles

We’re building a flexible freelance pool in the Philippines to support both PAYG (Pay As You Grow) and monthly-credit-control clients. Some clients need one-off support, and others need more regular help. We are recruiting approximately 2 people for each level.

This role suits someone who already has a full-time job and wants to supplement their income, or someone looking for long-term remote work with the opportunity to grow.



Pay (paid hourly in PHP)

Credit Control Associate: ?115/hour (0–2 years’ relevant experience)



Credit Controller: ?173/hour (2–3 years’ credit control/collections experience)



Senior Credit Control Officer: ?202/hour (3–5 years’ credit control/collections experience)



All payments are made in Philippine pesos (PHP), so you never lose out on exchange rates.



What You’ll Do

Chase overdue balances following the agreed client criteria

Maintain accurate records and provide regular updates

Build supportive client relationships; be firm when needed

Escalate queries/unresolved issues to management

Uphold high standards of professionalism and compliance

Support other reasonable office tasks as needed



Requirements

Experience appropriate to the level you are applying for

English proficiency at C1 (Advanced) or C2 (Mastery/Proficient) level is required

Confident with Microsoft Office (Outlook, Excel, Word)

Reliable internet and home office setup

Friendly, empathetic, organised, and calm under pressure



Working Hours & Flexibility

All work (calls and admin) must be completed between 9 am and 6 pm UK time. Typical demand is 2–4 hours per day, but this can vary depending on client needs. No guaranteed minimum hours.



Progression

For the right committed candidate who looks after clients well, you may be considered for a permanent role in future with additional perks (e.g., paid holidays and sick pay). We don't guarantee this, but we love to promote from within.



How to Apply

Submit your CV and a short cover letter stating which level you are applying for. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete an online skills assessment. Only top-performing candidates from the assessment will be contacted for an interview.

title: Legal-Based Debt Recovery Agent (UK Debt Recovery
description:
About us 



We’re a UK-based credit management and debt recovery firm supporting small businesses. We're firm, fair, and compliant. We focus on outcomes, but we also care about doing the work properly and maintaining professional standards throughout. We already have a well-established team based in the Philippines, and this role will work closely with them.



The role 

We’re hiring a senior debt recovery specialist to manage a high-volume portfolio of UK debt recovery cases with compliance rigour and evidence discipline. This is a compliance-led role with strong case management: you will assess cases for disputes and escalation, gather and document evidence properly, make sound escalation decisions, and communicate clearly with clients and third parties. The balance between case analysis, documentation, and client communication will vary week to week depending on the portfolio.



You will handle a mix of:

• Commercial debts (e.g., Ltd companies)

• Consumer/sole trader matters where the Pre-Action Protocol (PAP) applies

We will train you on the nuances of UK debt recovery law and process; we are hiring for legal literacy and compliance capability.



Hours 

This role is available part-time or full-time (20–40 hours/week). We can offer 40 hours/week immediately for the right candidate. Please confirm your preferred weekly hours and availability in your application.

Salary and bonuses

Salary is up to PHP 50,000/month for the right candidate (depending on experience and performance), plus performance bonuses. This role is paid in PHP and you’ll be joining an established Philippines-based team.

Key responsibilities

• Assess cases for disputes, defences, and evidence gaps; identify issues early and escalate appropriately

• Gather, review, and document evidence (invoices, correspondence, contracts, payment records) to build a clear case narrative

• Draft clear, professional written communications to debtors, clients, and third parties (letters, evidence summaries, escalation memos)

• Identify when cases require legal escalation (statutory demands, court proceedings, etc.) and prepare appropriate paperwork

• Manage compliance-led processes: ensure all actions follow UK law, maintain audit trails, and document decision-making

• Communicate professionally with clients when required (case updates, escalation recommendations, dispute resolution)

• Maintain excellent case notes, timelines, and follow-up discipline so nothing is missed

• Take ownership of progressing cases daily and working to targets (quality and compliance-focused, not “busy work”)



What success looks like



• Cases are assessed thoroughly; disputes and escalation decisions are sound and well-documented

• Written communications are clear, professional, and legally compliant

• Evidence is gathered systematically and presented persuasively

• Notes are accurate, complete, and audit-ready (dates, amounts, evidence summaries, dispute details, escalation decisions, and next actions)

• You remain calm, professional, and objective under pressure; you can make difficult decisions and justify them

• You take pride in doing things properly, not just quickly



Performance and incentives 



We work toward clear targets and reward performance. Bonuses are based on results and quality (e.g., case closures, evidence quality, compliance with standards, and client satisfaction).

Must-have requirements (please don’t apply if you don’t meet these)



• Legal background (law degree, paralegal qualification, or equivalent) OR 3+ years of experience in a legal-services or compliance-led collections environment

• Experience working in a high-volume legal or collections environment (agency or in-house team)

• Demonstrable experience managing disputes, gathering evidence, and making escalation decisions

• Strong written English and the ability to draft clear, professional legal communications

• High attention to detail and strong personal organisation (case notes and documentation are non-negotiable)

• Professional judgement and emotional regulation: objective and composed, able to make difficult decisions

• Comfortable handling a mixed portfolio (commercial and consumer/sole trader matters)

• Comfortable being client-facing when required: able to communicate clearly and professionally with business owners/clients and third parties

• Understanding of legal/compliance-led debt recovery processes: able to work within due diligence frameworks and understand escalation pathways

Work setup requirements (must-have)

• Reliable laptop/desktop suitable for daily case management work

• Stable, high-speed internet connection and a quiet, private workspace for calls and written work

• Headset with clear audio (noise-cancelling preferred)

• Working webcam and microphone (required for interview, training, and occasional check-ins)

• Backup internet option (mobile data is fine) for continuity

• You must be able to maintain consistent connectivity during agreed working hours

• We provide the calling/VOIP system for debtor calls



Additional experience (beneficial, but not required) If you don’t have these, you can still be a strong fit — please apply if you meet the must-haves.



• UK debt recovery exposure (e.g., familiarity with LBA/PAP, UK court/claims process, or UK compliance expectations)



Fit and standards



This is not a customer service role. We're seeking a legal professional who can accurately assess cases, make sound decisions, and document everything thoroughly. If you prefer a highly scripted environment, avoid written work, or struggle with compliance-driven processes, this role will not be a good fit.

Screening



To be considered, you must complete our short TestGorilla assessment. We will only review candidates who complete the assessment.

title: eCommerce VSL Video Editor
description:
Company Description



We are a fast-growing ecommerce store that sells different products through such acquisition platforms as Meta ads, Google ads, Amazon, Klaviyo, Tiktok, Instagram, etc.







Role Description



This is a remote contract role for an Ecommerce Video Editor. The video editor will be responsible for editing new VSL, UGC, mashup, and other types of videos on weekly basis using the scripts provided, and offering data-driven insights to shape overall strategy. In this role, you will also be tasked with honing new skills such as working with AI tools, creating motion designs, researching the content on Instagram, Tiktok, Youtube etc.

Strong analytical skills to assess video performance metrics and optimize for engagement, conversion rates, and return on ad spend (ROAS)

Deep proficiency in video editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, After Effects, or similar) and familiarity with motion graphics, transitions, and dynamic text overlays.

Experience in editing videos for paid media platforms, including
 Ads, Google Ads (Performance Max etc), and YouTube Ads.

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor - Voics



We're hiring a video editor to work on long-form YouTube content, short-form clips, and paid social ads. The scope of work depends on your experience across each format - strong candidates may take on all three, others may focus on one or two.



This can start as project-based work and move to full-time for the right person.



What the work involves

Long-form YouTube videos (typically 15 to 45 minutes), short-form cuts for Instagram and TikTok, and video ads. You'll need to understand pacing and retention - not just technical editing. The difference between a video that keeps people watching and one that loses them at the 90-second mark is almost always an editing decision.



What we're looking for

You should have a working understanding of YouTube as a platform, not just as a place to upload files. Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro or Final Cut Pro is required. After Effects and motion graphics skills are important - we use animation to reinforce key points and expect editors to bring that capability without being directed on every detail. The ability to manage multiple projects without needing to be chased. Strong enough English to communicate clearly and flag problems early.



How to apply

Send us your two best videos. At least one must be long-form. We'll only watch the first 30 seconds of each, so lead with your best work - the hook, the pacing, the first impression.



If those 30 seconds are strong, we'll be in touch.

title: Short form video editor
description:
I want you to grow as a person if you work with me.



I’m looking for a short form video editor to help me impact people. I want to work with a passionate content expert.



I come from a family business background and was tired and depressed doing something that wasn't lighting me up. I quit the family business to pursue my passions and now I share the journey with others. 



My audience is highly educated and highly skilled but are often not connected to their own values. They need courage to take a step forward. They need clarity to understand their own internal makeup of their souls and passions and desires.



When these people create from a place of wholeheartedness they make real results.



Here’s where you come in:



I use Instagram to connect with high performers build a better life. To engage more people we must deliver top rate video content that moves people. They often come from super wealthy families or are super high performers from top global education colleges/universities.



The main responsibilities of this position are as follows:



1. Shuffling through hours of footage



2. Adding in B-Roll, subtitles, and inspiring music to talking head videos



3. Emulating creators like Chloe Shih, Jun Yuh, Mylenesmind, Lifeofriza and Vanessa Lau in video style, quality, and length.



If you care about storytelling, pacing, and making content that connects with people, this might be a good fit.



I am a creator who shares vulnerably, and provides a glimpse into my life. Authenticity and engagement matter. My audience is world-class educated and have a high standard for graphic design, good value content, and non generic content.



To do this, you need to have:



1. An elite understanding and wielding ability of the English language



2. An upbeat attitude, always looking to be helpful and providing value



3. 100% honesty and transparency. We care about improving, not perfection.



4. Attention to detail. For instance, you’ll give me your coffee order for me to review your application.



5. Advanced understanding of CapCut Pro and DaVinci Resolve



6. Advanced understanding of hooks + viral video techniques



What I value about all else:



- Empathy

- Creativity

- Honesty

- Desire to improve every day

- Someone who asks questions

- Someone who can follow step-by-step instructions with ease

- Passionate. You bring your own ideas to the table.



Style:



I like engaging videos that aren’t overly attention-hacking but tastefully made. Nicely color graded but not overly teal + orange. Adding some light music but not too overpowering. Zoom ins here and there to add humor. Engaging graphic design typography added in. 



I want people to feel happy, excited, connected, and moved.



Color Grading Styles:

- Life of Riza. Natural, soft and warm tones.

- Chloe Shih. Minimalist true to color, or warm tones - crushed blacks.

- Mylenesmind



- Clean and minimal

- Strong pacing

- Clear storytelling

- Good use of b-roll and captions

- Engagement tactics but not over the top annoying



Application instructions:



To apply, please include:



- Your coffee order

- A link to your favorite YouTube and Instagram creator



Applications without this won’t be reviewed.



Working setup:



- Remote

- Async communication

- One or two live meeting per week



Potential for ongoing work if it’s a good fit



Your work schedule will be:



This position is for 3 hours per day (more available). Hours are flexible. My expectation is not on when you work but when you turn projects around.



I observe the following holidays:



- **Australia Day:** Monday, 26 January 2026

- **Good Friday:** Friday, 3 April 2026

- **Easter Saturday:** Saturday, 4 April 2026

- **Easter Sunday:** Sunday, 5 April 2026

- **Easter Monday:** Monday, 6 April 2026

- **Anzac Day:** Saturday, 25 April 2026

- **King's Birthday:** 8 June

- **Labour Day:** 5 October 2026

- **Christmas Day:** Friday, 25 December 2026

- **Boxing Day:** Monday, 28 December 2026 (substitute day)



You will have 2 vacation days upon one month of working together. After 6 months of working together, you get another 4. These vacation days will need to be requested in advance by 2 weeks. If we are still working together in 1 year, you will get 12 vacation days to start the year.



Why would you work with me versus someone else?



This position is not for a taskmaster. It is for someone who will be truly valued. You’ll be on the ground floor of me building my audience to 50K+. I also have experience in managing others. My full-time job is as a Director of Funding for my family business which has built 4,100 apartments ($3.5Bn AU).



I work closely with my employees to help them develop. I’m currently developing a personalized roadmap for each employee to make sure they not only help the company but have 100% clarity on where they are headed, what they’re working towards, and how much they’ll make doing it.



I really value leadership. It’s different from management. I know what it’s like to be managed rather than led. I strive to be the best boss any employee of mine has had. I want to know your dreams and help you get there. Your career will be highly valued; your mission will not only be to make me better. We’ll make each other better.



I look forward to working with you!



If you want to check out my IG, I 
 on IG. I'm slowly shifting towards a more cinematic style, so the posts are not 100% reflective of where I want to go if I have the help of a rockstar like yourself.

title: Executive Assistant to Real Estate Broker and Team Leader Still in Production
description:
I am looking to hire an executive assistant to help me with my backend tasks like calendar,
, CRM data pulling and entry(we use FUB), able to build out spreadsheets, communicate with multiple channels and everyone involved in transactions and the team. Will work in dotloop, google drive, and must be able to research products and services and provide feedback, able to work in google drive, and able to organize files and folders, looking for someone with experience in the real estate industry, and will need a lot of other things I am sure that I can't think of right now. I am a Broker in Alabama on CST looking for someone that can work about 8-10 hours a day preferably M-F to help me keep up with everything I have going on. I also run a team and I am still selling real estate myself. I started the brokerage last January so we are still in the building out phase and out team as well as my business is cranking up in a major way and I need some great help. I would like for you to be able to post on our social media accounts and help out with a lot of other things we are working to build out. As we continue to grow and get things in a smoother running place you will be compensated as well. I want someone long term that will be with me over the next few years as we grow and expand into new markets. You will get paid vacation time, we have a really great VA staff now of 2 people and will be adding more people as we continue to have success. Your job will honestly start off pretty crazy since I have been spread thin for a while and our roster currently consists of 6 team agents, an Admin and ISA that are VAs, a broker running the brokerage, and right now just 1 agent on the brokerage side. We are about to start recruiting more agents and I am looking to get this team to closing 50+ transactions a month. Right now we are so far away from that, but we are getting better day by day. Starting pay will run until we get you familiar with everything going on and I don't have to oversee everything you're doing and having to explain each and everything to you. You'll get another raise once you're able to handle everything without me having to have any oversight. Top end pay for the first year $5/hr and there will be room to increase pay as you continue to stay with me and bring value over the years to come. You take care of me and my businesses and I will take care of you without a doubt. We have a great culture and are really building something special. I need someone that can come in and really help me get some of these smaller backend tasks in order so I can focus on the real heavy lifting that will take us further faster. Great English writing and speaking skills preferred. Looking for someone that will not be using Ai for everything. Please follow the instructions below as written in order to be considered for the position. I need someone that can follow directions. You can send over or message any additional information that will help me consider you for this position. I will only be interviewing about 5-7 people in the next few days and looking for someone to start on 5/11/2026. I am really excited for this hire and hoping to land a rockstar that can join and we grow together in a major way.

title: Online Business Manager (Remote) — LVLUP Martial Arts
description:
About Us

LVLUP Martial Arts is a growing multi-location martial arts school based in Madison, Wisconsin with three locations (Waunakee, East Madison, and Verona) and approximately 550 students. We teach kids and adults the art of Taekwondo and operate a ninja/obstacle course concept called Go Ninja. We are scaling toward 900 students across four locations by 2029 and need a sharp, organized operator to help manage the day-to-day so our owner can focus on high-level growth.



The Role

We are looking for a remote Online Business Manager who reports directly to the CEO and works alongside our virtual assistant and incoming Sales Growth Specialist. You will help keep our team accountable, manage scheduling and systems, plan events, and ensure our locations are running at a high standard. This is a hands-on operations role that requires strong follow-through, collaboration, and attention to detail.



What You'll Do



Team Accountability

- Attend weekly tea
eting every Monday at 1:00 PM CST via video

- Conduct weekly video check-ins with each tea
mber

- Hold staff accountable to meeting their required hours, KPIs, and goals

- Ensure CRM (GymDesk) and performance dashboard are kept current and accurate

- Use data to help the team set and exceed enrollment and retention goals

- Flag performance concerns and open items directly to the CEO



Scheduling

- Manage staff scheduling across all three locations via Homebase

- Ensure shifts are covered, hours are accurate, and clock-in habits are consistent

- Coordinate schedule changes and communicate updates to the team



Event Planning & Management

- Plan, coordinate, and manage events for each location throughout the year

- Own event logistics from concept to execution — scheduling, promotion coordination, staffing, and follow-up

- Keep an updated event calendar across all three locations

- Work with the CEO and location instructors to ensure events align with school goals and community engagement



Location Standards

- Conduct weekly video walkthroughs of each location with staff

- Ensure cleanliness, organization, and professional appearance are maintained at all times

- Flag any facility, display, or operational issues to ownership immediately



Project Management & Communications

- Work closely with the virtual assistant and Sales Growth Specialist to keep operations and growth efforts aligned

- Keep a running list of open items, priorities, and next steps across all locations

- Draft internal documents, SOPs, and team communications as needed

- Support CEO with research, scheduling, and administrative tasks



What We're Looking For

- 2+ years of experience as an online business manager, operations manager, or executive assistant

- Strong organizational and project management skills

- Comfortable managing and collaborating with remote teams across multiple locations

- Experience with CRM or business management software

- Proactive, self-directed, and reliable — you follow through without being chased

- Excellent written English communication skills

- Bonus: experience in fitness, martial arts, franchises, or multi-location businesses

- Bonus: familiarity with EOS (Entrepreneurial Operating System)



Hours & Compensation

- Part-time: 20–25 hours per week

- Remote — work from anywhere

- $1,200/month flat

- Reports directly to CEO

- Must be available Mondays at 1:00 PM CST for weekly tea
eting and for additional check-ins during US Central Time business hours



To Apply

Please send a brief introduction, your relevant experience, examples of businesses or teams you have managed, and any tools or systems you are proficient in to 
 with the subject line: LVLUP Business Manager.

title: Senior Typescript/Vue 3 Developer
description:
BACKGROUND:



We are software development company that works with clients to help with technology-related projects (e.g. software development, enterprise software).  We are looking for another member of the team to help immediately with some client projects, but also to have an ongoing relationship with.  If things go well, then this would become a full-time position.



THE JOB: Senior Typescript/Vue 3 Developer

We are looking for a senior front-end developer to help with web development of a medium sized application.  If you are a full-stack developer, please apply also, as we have back-end work (that is a different role we’ll be hiring for, but if you’re strong in Python, let us know).



The initial scope is approximately 20 hours per week.  If we like your work, we will offer you a full-time contract (40 hrs a wk).



The project will be to develop part of the front-end, using Vue3 (composition API, typescript) along with vite, pinia, vitest (jest experience is OK).



The full dev stack is: typescript, bootstrap 5, Vue3 single file components (SFC, composition), Vite, Vitest, bash, github.



We need a senior developer who is comfortable writing clean maintainable code, and has dealt with things like server-sent-events, SSE resumption, well designed class structures, and full test suites (unit, functional and integration).  You will be maintains a TS library, and the app itself.





REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE:



Must Have Skills

- Experienced only: please *do not* apply if you are not an experienced developer.

- Coding: a lot of experience with front-end development (clean, maintainable and (advanced) typescript, html, css, bootstrap).

- Familiarity with either Cursor or Windsurf IDEs, and the agentic coding workflow.

- Test driven development: all of our coding starts with writing tests first. Please outline your experience with automated testing, preferably vitest or jest (or cypress or similar) for end-to-end testing.

- Typescript: typescript development experience (our core logic is in a typescript library that is compiled to JS using Vite and rollup). You must be very comfortable working in a strongly typed environment, writing types and classes, and following strong OOP patterns by default.

- HTML/CSS: strong with HTML and CSS. we use Sass, and Bootstrap 5.

- End-to-end developer: Must have experience taking rich mockups (e.g. Canva or Figma) with sophisticated design and converting them into fully working front-end code. Note you will be working alongside a designer. “Done” would mean: 1) library/service classes built; 2) GUI built; 3) extensive test suite that covers all that code; 4) documentation written. If you are not used to working like that, this might not be a fit for you.

- “Design thinking”: we want a senior developer who knows how to think through designing codebases that scale. i.e. using tests, writing clean code, documentation, etc.

- CI/CD: must be familiar with using Github, bash scripts, etc.



Desirable (but not required) skills:

- Visual Design Sensitbility: whilst we have a designer you can work with, it would be good if you have some design sensibility, and are able to implement “nice” looking pages without help from a designer. Please highlight your skill in this area.

- Backend (python): whilst *not* a requirement, it would be a big plus if you have experience working on the backend as well (i.e. you’re a full-stack developer). Our backend is a python FastAPI set of webservices.

- Backend (other): if you don’t have backend experience with python, but do have it in other languages (e.g. c# / asp.net, or next.js etc) then please include information about that.

- Automation: comfortable writing scripts (e.g. build scripts for npm run build, etc) or deployment scripts in bash or powershell to help with CI/CD.

- Uses AI: if you are using any AI coding tools we like that and we want to know about it! e.g. if you’re using Github co-pilot, or Windsurf or Cursor etc, please let us know. We love AI and use it a lot ourselves, so this is a plus not a negative.



To be considered for this role, you need to also complete the details on this form:

title: Performance Video Editor for Winning Meta Ads
description:
We’re looking for a highly skilled Performance Video Editor to help us iterate on winning Meta video ads.



This is not a role focused on creating brand films or editing generic social content. Your main job is to take proven winning ad concepts and turn them into high-quality variations that improve engagement, retention, clarity, and freshness, without damaging what made the ad work in the first place.



You will work with existing winning creatives that we hand to you. We will usually provide the strategic direction, testing hypothesis, new hooks when relevant, and structured feedback. We are looking for someone who can execute at a high level, collaborate well, and bring strong performance-editing instincts to the table.



What you’ll do

- Create variations of existing winning Meta video ads

- Improve pacing, tighten edits, and shorten videos where needed

- Add VFX, sound effects, motion emphasis, and visual polish to key moments

- Add and refine subtitles, captions, text overlays, and on-screen hierarchy

- Integrate B-roll and additional voice-over when provided

- Clean up audio and improve overall sound quality

- Clean up cuts and make edits feel sharper and more intentional

- Deliver polished, finished 9:16 exports optimized for Meta paid social

- Revise quickly and accurately based on structured feedback

- Occasionally suggest smart edit improvements beyond the brief, with reasoning



What this role is focused on

This role is about iterating on winners, not reinventing them.



We want someone who understands how to:

- preserve the winning core of an ad

- create controlled variations tied to a specific testing hypothesis

- improve engagement in different ways through editing

- make key moments land harder without overediting

- balance direct-response performance with high production quality



What we’ll provide

- The winning concept to iterate on

- A clear brief and testing hypothesis for each variation

- New hooks when needed

- Ideas for moments to emphasize

- Additional VO, B-roll direction, or text direction when relevant

- Structured feedback for revisions

- Our Brand Book with brand direction



What we need from you

- Strong experience editing performance creative / direct-response ads

- Strong understanding of Meta paid social

- Excellent pacing and retention instincts

- Advanced editing skills beyond basic raw UGC cutting

- Strong subtitle and text-overlay design sense

- Strong VFX / SFX / motion enhancement instincts

- Clean audio editing and finishing ability

- Ability to follow a brief while also contributing thoughtful ideas

- Strong organization, file hygiene, and version control

- Ability to deliver finished work at a consistently high standard



Important constraints

- The first 3 seconds are generally off-limits in terms of changing the underlying footage

- Effects, polish, and editing improvements can be added, but the core opening footage usually stays

- These are hypothesis-driven variations, not random creative remixes

- Revisions are part of the process and should not be an issue

- Deliverables must be high quality, with Meta-optimized resolutions and exports



Ideal profile

You’re likely a strong fit if you:

- have edited for DTC brands or performance agencies

- understand retention, payoff, proof, pacing, and direct-response structure

- know how to make ads feel fresher without changing the core concept too much

- can collaborate with founders / marketers and improve execution quality

- understand that every edit should serve performance, not just aesthetics



Nice to have

- Experience with supplement, wellness, health, or consumer product brands

- Ability to work in Premiere Pro and After Effects

- Ability to source or create tasteful supporting motion / visual enhancement where needed

- Familiarity with version testing workflows



Working setup

- Freelance to start

- Potential for regular ongoing work / retainer if the fit is strong

- Work will be assigned on a concept-by-concept basis around winning ads we want to scale or refresh



To apply

Please send:

- a short introduction

- relevant examples of performance / direct-response ad edits

- examples where you created variations of an existing winning concept

- the software you use

- your typical turnaround times

- your rate structure

- whether you are open to a paid trial task



When applying, include the phrase: “controlled variation beats random editing” so we know you read the full brief.

title: Digital Marketing (Reddit and Social Media)
description:
Digital Marketing Specialist – Reddit & B2B Social Media (Part-Time / Full-Time)



About Us



We're a UK based digital marketing agency 
 - working with a portfolio of B2B clients. We're looking for a sharp, self-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to help us grow brand visibility through Reddit and LinkedIn, two channels that, when done right, drive serious traffic and high-quality leads.



This role is hands-on. You'll be writing, posting, engaging, and reporting daily on behalf of our agency and our clients.



What You'll Do



Reddit Marketing (Primary Focus)



Plan and execute Reddit posting strategies for our agency and our clients

Write authentic, value-first Reddit posts and comments that include natural backlinks and brand mentions (no spammy promotion, Reddit will eat you alive for that)

Identify the right subreddits for each client's niche, study their rules, and build posting plans that respect each community

Grow and warm up Reddit accounts to maintain karma and posting credibility

Monitor brand mentions and jump into relevant threads with helpful, on-brand replies

Use 
 (
) as your main tool to assist with research, posting, and tracking. The platform is new, so you'll need to be comfortable learning it as you go and giving us feedback on what works



B2B Social Media (LinkedIn Focus)



Manage and grow 
pany pages and personal/founder profiles for clients

Write LinkedIn posts, carousels, and short-form thought leadership content tailored to B2B audiences

Engage with target accounts, comment on relevant posts, and help build inbound visibility

Schedule content using LinkedIn's native scheduler or third-party tools

Track post performance and report on impressions, engagement, and follower growth



Reporting & Communication



Create monthly client reports summarising activity, performance, and key wins across Reddit and LinkedIn

Submit weekly internal updates on progress and learnings

Communicate proactively with the team via WhatsApp and attend check-ins on Google Meet

Suggest new ideas, we love people who experiment



Who We're Looking For



1+ year of experience with Reddit marketing, community management, or content marketing (Reddit experience is a hard requirement, please mention your Reddit username history or examples of subreddits you've grown or posted in)

Excellent written English with a natural, conversational tone (Reddit instantly detects "marketing speak")

Familiarity with LinkedIn for B2B (organic, not ads). Bonus if you've ghostwritten for founders or executives

Comfortable learning new tools (Analitas, scheduling tools, AI writing assistants)

Self-managing, deadline-driven, and able to work with minimal supervision

Reliable internet and a quiet workspace



Nice to Have



Experience with SEO and the role of backlinks in ranking

Experience writing for B2B niches (SaaS, agencies, professional services)

Basic graphic design (Canva is enough)

Experience juggling multiple client accounts

Experience building client-facing reports (Google Sheets, Looker Studio, or similar)



Hours & Pay



Part-time (20 hrs/week) or full-time (40 hrs/week), your preference

Schedule: flexible, with some overlap with UK timezone for team check-ins

Pay: $3 to $4 USD per hour, depending on experience

Communication: WhatsApp for day-to-day, Google Meet for calls

title: Shopify AI Store Builder needed for team
description:
We are an eCommerce company looking for a talented and efficient Shopify Store Builder & Operator who can build high-quality, branded Shopify stores using AI tools — with limited resources and fast turnaround times.



This is not a basic theme install job. We need someone who can take a product, a brand name, and minimal assets — and build a fully branded, conversion-optimized Shopify store from scratch using AI for copywriting, product images, and store content. You will be expected to operate at a high level across every part of the store build.



---



?? REQUIRED — REVIEW THIS EXAMPLE BEFORE APPLYING ??



Study this store carefully. This is the standard of quality we expect you to deliver:



----------



Pay attention to the product page structure, AI-generated product images, infographic-style PDP images, benefit sections, customer testimonial layouts, comparison tables, results timelines, FAQ sections, trust badges, and overall branding. If you cannot build a store at this level, please do not apply.



---



THE ROLE



You are an overall Shopify store operator and builder. You will be responsible for the entire store — from theme setup and customization to product images, copywriting, app integrations, and final QA. You must have a deep understanding of Shopify and how to build stores that look professional and convert.



---



AI TOOLS WE USE — YOU MUST BE COMFORTABLE WITH THESE



- Nano Banana Pro — for generating product images, lifestyle shots, infographic visuals, and branded PDP imagery when we have limited or no photography. You will be creating professional product images from scratch using AI.

- Claude Opus 4.6 — for writing all store copy including product descriptions, headlines, benefit sections, FAQ content, comparison copy, and homepage content. You must know how to prompt Claude effectively to get high-converting, brand-appropriate copy.

- You should have a deep understanding of how to use AI as your primary tool for building stores with limited resources. We are not handing you a full brand kit with professional photography — you are building the brand visually and verbally using AI.



---



REQUIREMENTS



- Proven experience building Shopify stores from scratch or redesigning existing ones — with examples

- Deep expertise with Shrine Pro theme specifically — this is the theme we use across our stores

- Ability to generate professional, branded product images using Nano Banana Pro or similar AI image tools when no photography exists

- Strong copywriting skills OR the ability to use Claude Opus 4.6 effectively to produce compelling product descriptions, headlines, benefit copy, FAQs, and full page content

- Knowledge of Shopify apps and integrations — you must be able to set up and configure apps such as Loox (reviews), ---------- , upsell apps, subscription apps,
 marketing integrations, and other conversion-focused tools

- Understanding of conversion-optimized store layouts — including trust badges, urgency elements, social proof sections, comparison tables, ingredient/benefit breakdowns, and results timelines

- Ability to build stores that look and feel like the Elare example above — branded, professional, and high-converting even with limited starting assets

- Must be able to deliver projects quickly without compromising quality

- Fluent in English, both written and spoken

- Strong attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines



---



YOUR TASKS AS A SHOPIFY STORE BUILDER & OPERATOR



- Build complete Shopify stores from scratch using Shrine Pro theme

- Customize theme sections, layouts, and styling to match each brand

- Generate all product images using Nano Banana Pro — including main product shots, lifestyle images, infographic PDP images, and benefit visuals

- Write or generate all store copy using Claude Opus 4.6 — product pages, homepage, about page, FAQ, and any additional content sections

- Set up navigation, collections, product pages, and variant structures

- Install and configure Shopify apps — Loox, ---------- , upsell/cross-sell apps, subscription tools,
 capture, and other functionality-enhancing apps

- Build out trust and conversion elements — money-back guarantee sections, comparison tables, ingredient breakdowns, testimonial carousels, and results timelines

- Ensure the store is fully functional, mobile-optimized, and ready to launch

- Handle revisions and feedback to refine design and content



---



QUESTIONS TO ANSWER



1. How many Shopify stores have you built? Please share live examples or screenshots.

2. Are you experienced with Shrine Pro theme specifically? If so, show examples.

3. Have you used Nano Banana Pro or similar AI image generation tools to create product images for Shopify stores? Please share examples of AI-generated product imagery you've created.

4. Have you used Claude (or similar AI tools) for writing store copy — product descriptions, benefit sections, FAQs, etc.? Describe how you use it in your workflow.

5. Walk us through your process for building a branded store when you're given only a product, a brand name, and minimal assets. How do you go from zero to a finished store?

6. Which Shopify apps have you worked with? Are you comfortable setting up Loox, ---------- , subscription apps, upsell tools, and similar integrations?

7. How do you ensure fast turnaround times without compromising on quality?

8. Can you look at the Elare store example linked above and confidently say you can build at that level? Be honest.

9. Are you comfortable handling revisions and feedback to improve store design and content?



---



COMPENSATION



$50 CAD per store build



This is a part-time position, but we are looking for someone available for long-term collaboration with ongoing projects. We are scaling quickly and will have consistent store builds coming through.



---



*** HOW TO APPLY ***



*You must include your favorite Shopify theme in the subject line of your application for it to be considered (this shows you actually read it and is very important).*



1.) Send us a message answering all 9 questions

2.) Include examples of Shopify stores you've built — specifically stores where you used AI tools for product images and/or copywriting

3.) Share any AI-generated product images you've created using Nano Banana Pro or similar tools

4.) Provide your contact information (WhatsApp, etc.)



---



If you are a strong Shopify store builder who understands how to use AI tools like Nano Banana Pro and Claude Opus 4.6 to build branded, conversion-optimized stores with limited resources — and you can deliver at the quality level shown in our Elare example — we want to hear from you.



If you cannot build at that standard, this is not the right fit. We need someone who can take minimal inputs and deliver a polished, launch-ready store.

Research winning products using TikTok ecommerce intelligence tools such as Kalodata and other market research methods

Build SOPs for repeatable execution

Experience building or managing Shopify stores

Strong product research ability

Familiarity with Kalodata or similar product research tools

Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager

Working knowledge of Google Ads

title: Amazon FBA Product Research and Development Specialist (Philippines Region)
description:
Amazon FBA Product Research and Development Specialist (Philippines Region)



Job Overview

We are a dynamic, US-based startup specializing in selling products through the Amazon FBA platform. As we continue to expand, we are looking for exceptional talent to join our remote team in the Philippines. If you're a fast learner with a passion for product research and development, this is your opportunity to grow with a company that values integrity and innovation.



Job Description:

No previous Amazon experience is required, but the ideal candidate should possess the following qualities:



What You’ll Do:

Learning & Adaptability: Ability to quickly self-learn and conduct research to understand competitor products and categories. Find niche markets with strong growth opportunities.

Strong Market Research Skills: Identify product opportunities with strong sales potential, minimal competition, and strong profit margins after deducting product costs.

Creative & Analytical Mindset: Develop impactful product concepts that align with market needs, and use customer feedback to enhance product functionality, packaging, or manuals to boost satisfaction. Your ideas should upgrade existing products in the market, not simply copy ideas.

Evaluate Product Samples & Validate Product Concepts: Ensure product quality and functionality meet specifications. Based on product samples, identify necessary improvements and refine the product. The final product should be enhanced based on feedback and ready for customer satisfaction.

Coordination: Collaborate with brand managers, sourcing personnel, and designers for product documentation and design requirements, working together to develop products that solve customer pain points and deliver exceptional value.

Team Collaboration: Actively share insights, ask questions, and willingly contribute ideas to help improve company workflows and documentation.

Time Management: Complete tasks efficiently, meeting deadlines with great attention to detail.

Honesty & Integrity: Exhibit high professional ethics, maintain confidentiality, and ensure the accuracy and reliability of product information.



Compensation and Benefits:

Starting salary: $2.50/hour + $50 per successful product, paid monthly.

After a 3-6 month trial period, hourly rate increases to $3 or more based on performance, with top performers eligible for a monthly salary of $500 or higher.

Long-term role with growth to Brand Manager or leadership positions.

Fully remote with training in Amazon SEO and visual design.

Join a vibrant global team driving e-commerce excellence.



Note: This job description is not exhaustive. Additional activities, duties, or responsibilities may be assigned as needed.



How to Apply:

To apply, please complete the Google Form Applications below. Applications will only be processed through this form. We will not check messages on Onlinejobs.ph.



Apply Here:



Join us and kickstart your e-commerce career with a team that values growth and proactive collaboration. We look forward to seeing your talents and potential thrive with us!

title: PAID ADS SPECIALIST
description:
We are a fast-growing SEO and e-commerce company in the health and wellness space, managing multiple successful online brands. We are looking for a Paid Ads Specialist to plan, execute, and optimize high-performing digital advertising campaigns that drive traffic, leads, and revenue growth.



This role is ideal for a performance-driven marketer who is highly analytical, detail-oriented, and experienced in scaling paid acquisition campaigns across multiple platforms, with strong experience in budget management, audience targeting, keyword research, ad creative testing, A/B testing, and campaign optimization. The role requires continuous monitoring of performance metrics and delivering actionable insights to improve conversion rates and cost efficiency (CPL/ROAS). Develop and execute paid advertising strategies across platforms like Google Ads, Meta 
/Instagram), TikTok Ads, LinkedIn, and other relevant channels, with a strong understanding of platform algorithms and ad compliance



Key Responsibilities:

Plan, launch, and manage paid ad campaigns across Google Ads, Meta

 revenue and customer retention funnels

title: Senior Real Estate Disposition Operator for Texas SFR Portfolio
description:
We are hiring a real **disposition operator** to help sell a Texas single family rental portfolio.



This is **not** a VA role.



This is **not** a transaction coordinator role.



This is **not** a generic lead gen role.



We need someone who can **own this from start to close**. That means positioning the deals properly, getting them in front of the right buyers fast, driving serious conversations, staying on follow up, helping push toward offers, and keeping 
ntum all the way through closing.



We are looking for someone who is **aggressive, resourceful, organized, and highly execution focused**.



### Portfolio



We own a portfolio of about **20 single family homes** in the **Texarkana, Wake Village, and Nash, Texas** area.



The portfolio includes a mix of:



-   occupied cash flowing properties

    

-   vacant move in ready properties

    

-   vacant properties needing some repairs or final work

    



We are open to selling:



-   individual properties

    

-   small groups

    

-   larger bundles

    

-   or the full portfolio

    



We do not care about forcing one structure. We care about getting in front of the right buyers and creating real deal 
ntum quickly.



We are open to marketing nationwide to:



-   investors

    

-   landlords

    

-   brokers

    

-   1031 exchange buyers

    

-   portfolio buyers

    

-   out of state buyers

    



We may also be open to helping with management transition where useful.



### What matters most



We want someone who can **start outreach immediately**, ideally on day one or within the first couple of days.



Strong preference for candidates who already have:



-   access to InvestorLift

    

-   an existing buyer database

    

-   active investor or broker relationships

    

-   access to
 investor groups or
 Marketplace already being used for outreach

    

-   systems, tools, or infrastructure that allow immediate execution

    



We are **not** looking for someone who needs to spend the first week mostly building lists, researching, or warming up.



### What you will own



-   deal positioning and packaging

    

-   buyer sourcing

    

-   outreach through calling, texting,
, brokers,
 groups, Marketplace, and other effective channels

    

-   buyer follow up

    

-   qualification

    

-   negotiation support

    

-   moving deals toward contract and closing

    

-   clear reporting and next steps

    



### Ideal fit



You should already have real experience with:



-   dispositions

    

-   investor outreach

    

-   buyer sourcing

    

-   broker outreach

    

-   follow up systems

    

-   negotiation support

    

-   getting deals toward offers and contracts

    



Strong preference for someone with:



-   hands on InvestorLift experience

    

-   real buyer relationships or an active buyer list

    

-   SFR portfolio experience

    

-  
 group or Marketplace sourcing experience

    

-   low hand holding needs

    

-   high ownership mindset

    



### Compensation



This role includes **base pay plus deal based compensation**.



If you know how to create real buyer activity and help get deals closed, there is upside here.



### Do not apply if



-   you are mainly a VA

    

-   you are mainly admin support

    

-   you are mainly a transaction coordinator

    

-   you do not have real disposition experience

    

-   you need a long setup period before outreach can start

    

-   you cannot clearly explain how you would generate buyer conversations in the first few days

    

-   you cannot show relevant results

    



### To apply, send:



1.  Short intro

    

2.  Your real disposition experience

    

3.  Your exact hands on InvestorLift experience

    

4.  Whether you currently have access to InvestorLift or another buyer sourcing platform

    

5.  What buyer sources you can use immediately

    

6.  Whether you already have access to
 groups,
 Marketplace, buyer lists, or broker relationships

    

7.  How you would begin outreach in the first 1 to 2 days

    

8.  Your approach to a mixed Texas SFR portfolio like this

    

9.  1 or 2 relevant examples with results

    

10.  Whether you work solo or with a team

    

11.  Your availability and time zone

    



Please do not send a generic application.



We are looking for someone who can take ownership, move fast, and help get deals across the line.

title: Custom Infrastructure, AR Integration & Multi-Channel Marketing Management
description:
The Objective

We are seeking an elite Partner or Agency to build a proprietary, custom-coded e-commerce ecosystem and manage its global growth strategy. Shopify or SaaS-based solutions will not be considered. We are building a high-value, independent asset.

The Requirements: Leadership & Autonomy

• Ownership Mindset: You must identify solutions independently and execute with precision. I manage multiple projects; I need a partner who delivers results, not questions.

• Supplier & Technical Logistics: Direct management of supplier communication for API integration and automated fulfillment.

• English Proficiency: All professional communication and site content must be in English.

The Technical Build: Virtual Try-On (AR)

The Aesthetics/Wigs niche requires a Virtual Try-On (AR) feature. Customers must be able to visualize products in real-time via their camera. This must be a custom, high-performance integration.

Three Distinct Verticals (No Templates)

1. Aesthetics (Wigs): Premium, AR-enabled, luxury UX.

2. Pet Care: Trust-based and functional.

3. Supportive Living (Disability, ADHD, Autism): Requires a neurodivergent-friendly UI. This niche is delicate and demands high accessibility standards (WCAG) and intuitive design.

Omnichannel Marketing Strategy (Open Framework)

I am looking for a partner who understands that the "classic" TikTok/Meta Ads approach isn't the only way to win. I am open to any effective strategy provided it is backed by data and logic.

• Strategic Flexibility: Beyond social media ads, I expect suggestions on Google Search (Intent-based), SEO, Pinterest,
 Marketing, or Native Advertising.

• Niche-Specific Tactics: What works for wigs won't work for the ADHD/Autism niche. You must demonstrate how you adapt the channel to the audience.

• Proven Track Record: Mandatory: You must provide Case Studies demonstrating success in both custom builds and marketing ROI (ROAS/CPA). Show me what you have achieved previously.

Communication Standards

• Clarity & Simplicity: Solutions must be explained clearly, without unnecessary jargon.

• Professional Boundaries: I stop responding at 10 PM to maintain high performance and standards.

• Goal: A scalable, proprietary business where tech and marketing run as a well-oiled machine.

title: Maintenance Coordinator - Bilingual
description:
PSB (Pro Services Boston) and Green Ocean Property Management are integrated maintenance + property management teams serving the Greater Boston market. We manage multifamily, single-family, and HOA assets and run an in-house service operation focused on speed, quality, and clear communication.



Role Overview:

The Maintenance Coordinator is the command center for all work orders: intake, triage, scheduling, vendor coordination, tenant communications, and close-out. You’ll prioritize urgent issues, keep preventive maintenance on cadence, and drive down cycle times. This is a performance role with clear SLAs, daily accountability rhythms, and growth into senior coordination/ops leadership.



Core Responsibilities:

Work Order Intake & Triage

Receive requests via portal/phone/email; log with complete scope, photos, access info, and priority tag.

Classify by Priority (P0–P3) and building/owner rules; verify warranty/recall/recurring issues.

Pre-diagnose to reduce truck rolls (simple resets, filter sizes, breaker checks, shutoff guidance).

Scheduling & Dispatch

Assign to the right vendor/tech based on trade, SLA, geography, availability, and cost.

Build and update daily/weekly schedules; confirm tenant access, lockbox codes, pet/alarms, parking.

Create and track Not-to-Exceed (NTE) amounts; obtain approvals when required.

Vendor Management

Coordinate licensed vendors (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, appliance, roofing, etc.).

Ensure COI/W-9/licenses are current; validate arrival/completion, photo proof, and written diagnosis.

Request quotes for >NTE jobs; compare scope/price; route to approval.

Tenant & Owner Communication

Provide clear ETAs, prep steps (water shutoff, clearing access), and progress updates.

Set expectations for parts lead times and follow-ups; confirm satisfaction at completion.

Escalate sensitively when work impacts health/safety or habitability.

Preventive Maintenance (PM)

Maintain seasonal PM calendars (boilers/furnaces, gutters, dryer vents, smoke/CO checks, filter changes).

Batch/schedule PMs to minimize tenant disruption and travel time; track completion.

Invoicing & Close-Out

Ensure work orders have diagnosis, materials, labor, before/after photos, and time stamps.

Match invoices to WOs, verify against NTE, route exceptions, and submit to accounting the same day.

Emergencies & After-Hours Coordination

Follow the P0/P1 emergency SOP (gas/water/electrical hazards, no-heat, lockouts).

Coordinate on-call vendors, city services, and temporary mitigation.

Reporting & Quality

Produce daily/weekly reports on SLA adherence, WIP aging, cost variance, and vendor performance.

Flag repeat issues, recommend root-cause fixes (access hardware, part stocking, vendor changes).

Qualifications:

Fluent in English and Spanish language

Maintenance coordinating experience in a US Property Management company is a must

Knowledgeable in construction engineering is a plus

Has excellent problem solving skill

Good communication skills in English

Outstanding skills in organizing schedules

Experience with property management software Buildium/Property Meld is a plus

Self-driven and can work with little supervision

Extremely organized and can work in a constantly changing and fast past environment

Want to have a stable career with endless potential for learning and growth

Able to work on EST Business hours



IF YOU ARE NOT A BILINGUAL MAINTENANCE COORDINATOR- Please do not Apply or you will not be entertained. Thank you
