title: HOA Manager
description:
The HOA Property Manager is responsible for the day?to?day operations, governance support, vendor oversight, and owner/resident experience across an assigned portfolio of homeowner associations. This role requires strong analytical ability, impeccable attention to detail, and exceptional written and verbal communication skills. The manager serves as the primary liaison among the Board of Directors, unit owners, residents, vendors, and internal teams (Maintenance and Finance), ensuring that association operations comply with governing documents, applicable laws, and company standards while meeting service-level and financial targets.



Key Outcomes (What Success Looks Like):



Accurate, timely Board packets and meeting facilitation with clear minutes and action logs

Portfolio-level adherence to budgets, assessments, and reserve funding plans in partnership with Finance HOA

Proactive maintenance planning and on-time completion of preventive and corrective work with Maintenance HOA

High owner/resident satisfaction, timely resolution of requests, and transparent communications

Clean annual audits, renewed insurance policies, and documented compliance with statutes and governing documents

Up-to-date task/project management in Asana and on-time delivery of recurring HOA cycles and filings



Key Responsibilities:

1) Board & Governance Management

Serve as the primary point of contact for Board members; prepare agendas, Board packets, and management reports for regular and special meetings.

Interpret and apply governing documents (CC&Rs, bylaws, rules) and relevant state statutes in daily operations; coordinate with counsel when required.

Facilitate annual meetings, elections, and owner notices in accordance with legal and governing document requirements.

2) Owner & Resident Relations

Maintain responsive, professional communication with trustees/Board, unit owners, and residents via
, phone, and portal.

Issue timely association-wide notices (policy changes, maintenance schedules, community events, compliance reminders).

Manage and resolve escalations, complaints, architectural review requests (ARC), violations, and hearings within established SLAs.

3) Financial Coordination & Reporting 

Support budget development, reserve study implementation, and monthly variance commentary; review financials for accuracy.

Monitor assessment billing, collections, payment plans, and delinquency follow-up in alignment with collection policies.

Review and approve invoices, code expenses to budgets, and validate vendor work completion prior to payment.

4) Maintenance, Projects & Vendor Management (with Maintenance HOA)

Translate Board priorities into annual maintenance calendars; schedule and track preventive maintenance and inspections.

Open, monitor, and close work orders; ensure scope, SLA, and quality standards are met; maintain accurate asset records.

Bid, negotiate, and manage vendor contracts (landscaping, janitorial, security, pools, roofing, elevators, etc.); perform periodic vendor reviews.

Coordinate capital improvement projects (RFPs, proposals, schedules, owner notifications, punch lists, closeout documents).

5) Information Management & Systems

Keep all HOA Asana projects/boards current with daily updates, dependencies, and follow-ups; maintain recurring tasks and automations.

Process resale and lender questionnaire packages accurately and within service timelines; maintain fee schedules.

Maintain organized digital records (governing docs, minutes, contracts, insurance, warranties, architectural files) in the association’s repository.

6) Team Leadership & Development

Train and onboard new APMs/PMs on processes, systems (Asana, accounting/portal), compliance, and customer service standards.

Promote a collaborative, service-oriented culture aligned with company values; escalate staffing/resource needs to the Unit Head.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):

On-time completion rate for recurring HOA tasks and compliance filings

Work-order first-response and average time-to-close (by priority)

Delinquency rate and collections effectiveness; percent of assessments collected

Budget adherence (OPEX/CapEx) and variance accuracy; invoice cycle time

Owner/resident satisfaction score; complaint resolution time

Board satisfaction score (post-meeting surveys) and action-item closure rate

Qualifications:

3+ years of HOA/condo association management or related property management experience

Demonstrated proficiency with task/project management tools (Asana) and owner portals; strong Excel/Google Sheets skills

Exceptional communication (written and verbal), meeting facilitation, and stakeholder management

Strong analytical, organizational, and time-management skills; high attention to detail

Working knowledge of governing documents, meeting procedures, collections, elections, and common HOA statutes

title: Are You a Rockstar Admin VA? We Need You in Our Insurance Agency!
description:
=====================================================

JOB TITLE: Are You a Rockstar Admin VA? We Need You in Our Insurance Agency!

=====================================================



TYPE OF WORK: Full-Time | 40 Hours/Week

LOCATION: Remote – Work from Home (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Monday to Friday | 8:30 AM – 5:00 PM (US Time) | Fixed Hours

SALARY: $600 USD/month (~?33,600/month)



-----------------------------------------------------

ABOUT THE ROLE

-----------------------------------------------------



We are a US-based independent insurance agency looking for a highly organized, reliable Virtual Assistant to support our daily operations remotely. You will be the voice of our agency — handling inbound calls, managing client pipelines, and keeping our workflows running smoothly. Must have clear, neutral-accent English — this is a client-facing phone role and verbal communication is the #1 requirement. 



This is a fast-paced, structured role that requires someone who can think on their feet, follow systems precisely, and adapt quickly. If you thrive in a busy environment and love staying organized, this role is for you. This role requires you to manage multiple tasks simultaneously — answering calls, updating the CRM, sending
s and texts, and running quotes, often all at the same time. You must be able to prioritize quickly and stay organized under pressure.



-----------------------------------------------------

YOUR DAILY RESPONSIBILITIES

------------------------------------------
. Answer and manage all incoming calls for your full 8-hour shift using a multi-line phone system — routing, transferring, and triaging calls professionally.



2. Send client
s and text messages on behalf of the agency with accuracy and professionalism.



3. Manage and update client pipelines and workflows inside our CRM — keeping records current and tasks prioritized.



4. Work within our Agency Management System (AMS) to support daily operations (full training will be provided).



5. Use our quoting software to run insurance quotes for auto, home, renters, and other lines as directed by the agency owner.



-----------------------------------------------------

REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

-----------------------------------------------------



To qualify for this position, you must have:



- Excellent verbal and written English — this is a phone-heavy role and non-negotiable

- Experience using a CRM or pipeline/workflow management tool

- Strong multitasking ability — you will be juggling calls,
s, texts, and system tasks simultaneously

- Proven ability to work independently in a structured, process-driven environment

- A reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet, distraction-free home office



-----------------------------------------------------

WE'D LOVE IT IF YOU ALSO HAVE

-----------------------------------------------------



- Previous experience in insurance, financial services, or a call center environment

- Familiarity with multi-line VoIP phone systems

- Experience with quoting software or agency management systems



-----------------------------------------------------

THE RIGHT PERSON FOR THIS JOB IS

-----------------------------------------------------



We work in a fast-paced industry. You will go really far if you are:



- A fast learner who can absorb new tools and processes without hand-holding

- Calm and collected under pressure — this is a high-volume, real-time environment

- Detail-oriented and follows instructions to the letter

- A self-starter who takes initiative and flags problems proactively



-----------------------------------------------------

BASIC SKILLS REQUIRED

-----------------------------------------------------



In addition to having excellent English skills, you will need to be comfortable with the following tools. You don't need to be an expert in all of them, but you need to be at least familiar with most:



- Gmail and other
 applications

- Google Docs, Google Sheets, Google Calendar

- Microsoft Word, Microsoft Excel

- Communications apps 

- CRM or project management software (any platform)

- Time tracking software 



-----------------------------------------------------

WORK SCHEDULE & HOLIDAYS

-----------------------------------------------------



- This is a full-time, long-term position

- Monday to Friday | 8:30 AM – 5:00 PM US Time | Fixed hours — you must be online and available for your entire shift

- US holidays observed



-----------------------------------------------------

SALARY

-----------------------------------------------------



$600 USD/month (~?33,600/month) for full-time work (40 hours per week)



-----------------------------------------------------

TRAINING PROVIDED

-----------------------------------------------------



Full training will be provided on our Agency Management System, CRM workflows, multi-line phone system, and quoting software. You do not need to arrive knowing every tool — but you do need to be a fast learner who takes training seriously.



-----------------------------------------------------

CAREER POTENTIAL

-----------------------------------------------------



This is a long-term role with room to grow as the agency expands. Dependable tea
mbers who demonstrate strong performance will be considered for increased responsibilities and compensation reviews.



-----------------------------------------------------

HOW TO APPLY

-----------------------------------------------------



Send your application with your resume and a brief introduction about your relevant experience.



In your subject line, write exactly: "I'm Your Insurance VA"

Applications without this subject line will not be reviewed.



In your message, please answer the following:

1. What is your experience with phones or customer service?

2. Which CRM or management tools have you used before?



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Land Acquisition & Disposition Marketing Strategist (Bilingual)
description:
Owl Land Sales is a land investment business across Florida, and we are looking for someone who can own the marketing and lead generation side of the operation at a high level. 

This role sits at the intersection of land investing, marketing strategy, and execution. 

You will be responsible for understanding our inventory, identifying the right buyers and sellers, and building campaigns that generate real opportunities. 

This is not your typical plug-and-play marketing role. It requires someone who understands how land moves, how buyers think, and how to position a property so it gets attention and action. 



What You Will Be Doing 

You will take a property and determine: 

• Who the ideal buyer or seller is  

• What motivates them  

• How to position the opportunity  



From there, you will create the marketing needed to generate interest and leads.

• Develop messaging and positioning based on audience and market demand 

• Create and publish marketing content across platforms (social media, marketplaces, listings, print materials, signage) 

• Write clear, compelling copy for ads, listings, and outreach 

• Manage incoming leads and handle initial responses and qualification 

• Build and manage campaigns, funnels, and automations 

• Maintain organized lead pipelines and follow-up systems 

• Track performance and adjust campaigns based on data 

• Use AI tools to support research, content creation, and property visuals (maps, overlays, zoning details)



What This Role Requires 

This position requires a combination of industry knowledge, marketing ability, and technical skill. 



Land & Buyer Insight

• Understanding of land buyers, sellers, and their motivations 

• Ability to match properties with the right audience 



Marketing & Execution

• Strong grasp of positioning and messaging 

• Ability to create campaigns that generate leads 

• Experience posting and managing content across platforms 



Creative Skills

• Strong copywriting ability 

• Solid design skills (Canva or similar tools) 

• Experience producing a range of marketing materials 



Technical & Systems

• Experience working in CRM systems and managing pipelines 

• Ability to build and manage automations and workflows 

• Strong organizational and data tracking skills 



AI & Data

• Comfortable using AI tools to improve efficiency and output 

• Ability to gather and interpret data to guide decisions 



Bilingual Communication

• Native or near-native fluency in English and Spanish 

• Strong written and verbal communication in both languages



What Will Set You Apart 

• Experience specifically in land investing or land sales  

• Ability to take initiative and operate independently  

• Strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills  

• Attention to detail, especially in written communication  



Work Structure 

• Remote position  

• Flexible schedule with accountability for results  

• Direct collaboration with ownership  





How to Apply 

Along with your resume, please submit to 
 

1. A short video introduction (2–3 minutes)  

2. An example of a marketing campaign or project you created  

3. A brief explanation of how you would market a piece of vacant land to attract buyers 

4.    Use the word Driven in the subject line

title: Airbnb Operations Manager - Short Term Rental Portfolio
description:
We manage 185+ furnished rental units across the U.S. on Airbnb, VRBO, 
, Expedia, Marriott, and more. We run a professional, systems-driven operation. We are hiring an experienced Operations Manager to lead our guest communications team, own the daily operating standard, and run the day-to-day without needing to be told what to do.



This is a senior role. If you do not meet every requirement below, do not apply. Applications that do not qualify will be deleted without response.



ROLE DETAILS



Full-time, 5 or 6 days/week 

Schedule: Flexible, but you must overlap with USA Pacific Time business hours and be reachable for escalations across both shifts (AM and PM). 

Pay: Based on experience. 

Six-day schedules receive higher compensation. 

Performance-based bonuses available after the trial period.



REQUIREMENTS — YOU MUST MEET ALL OF THESE



5+ years of experience in short-term rental operations, property management, or hospitality operations 

3+ years of direct people management experience leading a team of 5 or more VAs, coordinators, or operations staff 

You must have managed teams supporting a portfolio of 50+ units 

Hands-on experience with Guesty or Hostaway as an admin or power user, not just a frontline operator 

Proven experience handling guest escalations, owning team performance metrics, and reporting to ownership or executives 

Strong written and spoken English, including the ability to give direct feedback and write clean SOPs 

Comfortable with 
 or similar project management platforms as an admin 

Reliable internet, stable workspace, and full availability during your assigned hours



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



We want an operator. Someone who runs the team without waiting for permission. Someone who builds systems, holds people accountable without being a jerk, and owns problems all the way to resolution. You should be able to look at a messy operation, see what is broken, and fix it. You should be comfortable having hard conversations, setting deadlines, and following through.



You are the management layer. If you need to be managed, this is not the right fit.



You should think like a small business owner running this team on our behalf. You care about the numbers. You care about how the team is performing. You care about guest experience and brand reputation. You move fast and you write clearly.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



You own the daily operating standard for the guest communications team. This includes managing 5 to 10 VAs across AM and PM shifts, owning the daily report board on 
, enforcing EOD reporting standards, handling all escalations the VAs cannot resolve, and being the point of contact between ownership and the team.



You own team performance. This means tracking response times, EOD compliance, claims win rate, recovery rate, review scores, and any other metrics tied to the team's output. You run weekly scorecards. You run 1:1s. You give feedback. You document underperformance and you address it directly.



You own deadlines. Claims have a 14-day post-checkout deadline. Listings need to be created on time. Reviews need to be responded to. Onboarding for new units needs to happen on schedule. Nothing slips on your watch without a documented reason.



You own the standard. If something on the team is not working, you flag it, you propose the fix, and you implement it.



SECONDARY RESPONSIBILITIES



SOP creation and maintenance, onboarding and training new VAs, coaching and performance reviews, process improvement projects, special projects assigned by ownership. You may also be asked to assist on backend admin work during low-volume periods, but management of the team always comes first.



TOOLS WE USE



Guesty, PriceLabs, Enso Connect, Autohost, HelloHost, OpenPhone, Slack, 
, Google Drive, Loom



HOW TO APPLY



Reply to this listing with everything below included. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Your resume and a short message covering your total years in STR, the type of operations you have worked for, the size of teams you have personally managed, and the size of portfolio those teams supported.



Complete two personality assessments. Take both today and do not submit old results. Save your full results page for each and include both:



First: Go to 
/disc and take the free DISC assessment. Second: Go to 
 and take the free personality test.



A Loom video recorded at 
, between 4 and 6 minutes. Cover three things: your management background and the size of teams you have led, walk through one specific situation where you had to manage an underperforming tea
mber and how you handled it, and explain why you are applying to this role. Do not read from a script.



Your written responses to the scenarios below. Take your time. This should take 30 to 40 minutes.



Scenario A: One of your VAs has missed three EOD reports this week and was 45 minutes late to her shift twice. Other VAs are noticing and morale is dropping. The VA personally messages you and tells you her grandmother is sick and she has been distracted. Write the exact message you send her. Explain your next action. Explain what you communicate to the rest of the team, if anything, and why.



Scenario B: It is Monday morning at the start of your shift. Four things hit your plate at once. One: a guest escalation that a PM VA did not resolve over the weekend, and the guest is now threatening to escalate to Airbnb. Two: a new VA started today and no shadow has been assigned. Three: two open claims hit their 14-day deadline tomorrow and have not been filed. Four: ownership messaged you asking why EOD compliance dropped to 70% last week. List these in the order you would handle them and explain your reasoning for each one.



Scenario C: You discover that one of your VAs has been logging tasks as "Done" on the Monday board without actually completing them. Guests are now reporting issues that should have already been resolved. Walk through how you handle this. What is the conversation you have with the VA. What documentation do you create. What is the criteria you use to d
 whether this is a coaching 
nt, a written warning, or a termination.



Scenario D: Ownership asks you to improve EOD compliance from 70% to 95% within 30 days. Write the plan. What changes do you make to the process, the team, the tools, or the accountability system to hit that number. Be specific.



Qualified applicants will be contacted for an interview. All new managers begin with a 60-day paid trial period.

title: Commercial Fence Estimator
description:
Construction Estimating & Proposal Coordinator

Position Overview



We are seeking a highly detail-oriented and proactive Construction Estimating & Proposal Coordinator to take ownership of our estimating and proposal process from start to finish.



This is a high-responsibility role — you will coordinate with our takeoff team, build accurate cost estimates, and develop professional, client-ready proposals submitted directly to General Contractors.



Strong English communication skills are required, as you will be communicating directly with General Contractors, answering questions, and providing clarifications.



Key Responsibilities:

Coordinate with Takeoff Team

Review and verify material takeoffs against drawings and specifications

Identify discrepancies and ensure accuracy before pricing

Estimating & Cost Development

Build clear, structured, and fully editable cost estimates

Organize estimates into defined work scopes (no lump sum pricing)

Ensure each scope includes complete cost breakdowns

Structure estimates for easy revisions and adjustments

Proposal Creation & Submission

Prepare clean, professional proposals ready for General Contractor review

Clearly define scope, exclusions, and clarifications

Ensure alignment with plans, specs, and bid requirements

Meet strict bid deadlines

GC Communication

Respond to contractor questions and scope clarifications

Communicate professionally and confidently in English

Project Pipeline Tracking

Monitor platforms such as BuildingConnected, ConstructConnect, and SRBX Plan Room

Track opportunities, due dates, and submissions

Post-Award Coordination

Assist with shop drawings and submittals

Maintain organized project documentation

Qualifications

Experience in construction estimating, coordination, or similar role preferred

Strong ability to read and interpret construction drawings

High-level English proficiency (written and verbal) — required

Strong proficiency in Excel (must be able to build structured, formula-based estimates)

Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving ability

Ability to manage multiple deadlines and tasks simultaneously

Work Requirements

Must be available 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM Pacific Time

Reliable internet and consistent communication



?? Screening Assessment (Required – Read Carefully)



To be considered, all applicants must complete a screening assessment.



A Google Drive folder will be provided, including:



Project plans

Material pricing

Labor rates

Your Task

Review and verify the provided takeoffs

Prepare a structured cost estimate (Excel required)

Organize the estimate into clearly defined work scopes

Ensure the estimate is:

Clearly organized

Easy to follow

Fully editable (formulas only — no hardcoded totals)

Identify:

Missing scope

Quantity discrepancies

Risks or assumptions

Provide a brief explanation of your approach

Required Standards

Estimate must be broken down by work scope

Each scope must include a complete and traceable cost structure

All calculations must use formulas (no manual totals)

File must be structured so changes can be made quickly without rebuilding the estimate

What We Are Evaluating

Accuracy and attention to detail

Ability to organize information logically

Completeness of scope coverage

Quality and structure of estimate

Critical thinking and problem identification

Communication clarity

Submission Requirements

Excel file (structured, scope-based estimate)

Written summary of findings and thought process



Reach out to us to receive google drive folder for project.



Pay: 

Starting Pay is $6 per hour

6months is $10 Per hour

1 year is $12 per hour- 



Important:

Applications without a completed assessment will not be considered.



Why Join Us?



You will play a direct role in winning projects by producing accurate estimates and high-quality proposals.



This role is for someone who wants to become a key part of a growing preconstruction team, not just support it.

title: Zoho CRM / Zoho Analytics Builder
description:
Job Title: Zoho CRM & Analytics Specialist (Part-Time / Project-Based)

Compensation Pay: $500



About the Role:

We’re looking for someone who really knows their way around Zoho CRM and Zoho Analytics—not just basic setup, but actually building dashboards, reports, and making data useful.



This is a short-term, project-based role to help us clean up and build out our reporting system so we can track KPIs properly and make better decisions.



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Build dashboards and KPI trackers in Zoho CRM and Zoho Analytics

- Set up filters, formulas, and custom reports

- Connect data from Zoho Sign into Zoho CRM

- Create dashboards for different roles (e.g. sales, management, etc.)

- Make sure our data is clean, accurate, and easy to use

- Suggest better ways to structure reports and dashboards if needed

title: Social Media Manager & Poster for U.S. Marketing Agency (Multi-Client)
description:
Level Next Consulting & Marketing is a San Diego-based digital marketing agency. We deliver an "Omnivisibility System" for our clients — full-stack SEO, AEO (AI search optimization), social media, content, video, and local listings. We work with attorneys, lenders, wellness businesses, real estate teams, and other professional service brands across the U.S.



We have an experienced team handling design, video editing, blogs, and ops. We're looking for one more person to own the social media execution side so our clients stay consistent, polished, and visible.



What You'll Do



- Set up and optimize social media accounts across
, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Google Business Profile, and others as needed

- Schedule and publish content across multiple client accounts using Vista Social (our primary scheduler)

- Integrate accounts with our tools: Vista Social, Meta Business Suite, Google Business Profile, DashClicks, HeyReach

- Help launch and monitor paid social campaigns (mainly Meta Ads — setup, audience targeting, basic optimization)

- Track analytics and pull weekly/monthly reports (GA4, Meta Insights, native platform analytics, Vista Social reports)

- Keep multiple clients on a consistent posting cadence — typically 3-5 posts per week per client across 6-10 active clients

- Coordinate with our designer (carousels/graphics), video editor (Reels/shorts), and blog writer to make sure assets land on time

- Flag issues early, suggest improvements, and keep our project boards (Trello, Akiflow) updated



You're a Fit If You Have



- 2+ years managing social media for multiple clients or brands at once

- Hands-on experience with Vista Social, Hootsuite, Buffer, Sprout, or a similar multi-client scheduler

- Strong working knowledge of Meta Ads Manager (creating campaigns, audiences, basic troubleshooting)

- Comfort reading analytics and writing short, clear performance summaries

- Experience with U.S.-based clients and American English copywriting (or strong English writing skills)

- Reliable internet, backup power, and a quiet workspace

- Organized, communicative, deadline-driven — we run on Slack, Trello, and Akiflow and need someone who actually uses them



Bonus Points For



- Familiarity with HeyReach, DashClicks, Canva, Descript, Opus Clip, or Streamyard

- Light graphic design or video editing skills (not required — we have specialists, but it helps)

- Experience with local SEO and Google Business Profile optimization

- Experience with LinkedIn outreach automation



How to Apply



Please send:



1. 2-3 examples of client social accounts you've managed (links or screenshots of analytics/posts)

2. The tools you've used most (especially schedulers and ad platforms)

3. Your available hours and time zone overlap with U.S. Pacific Time



In your subject line or first line, include the word "Omnivisibility" so I know you read this carefully.



Looking forward to hearing from you.



— Max

Level Next Consulting & Marketing

title: Claude AI Specialist
description:
Kimbrough Legal, PLLC



About the Role



We are a family law firm in the US looking for a skilled Claude AI Specialist to help us set up, integrate, and optimize Claude across our daily operations. You will be our go-to person for everything Claude-related, from building custom workflows and prompts to training our team on how to use the tool effectively.

Our firm runs on the Microsoft ecosystem (Microsoft 365, Outlook, Teams, Dropbox, Monday, and MyCase).



This is a hands-on technical role. You will be the backbone of our AI adoption, so we are looking for someone who genuinely knows Claude inside and out.



What You’ll Do

• Set up and configure Claude (Pro/Team/Enterprise) for our firm

• Design and build custom Projects, Styles, and Skills tailored to legal workflows

• Create and refine prompt templates for document review, drafting, research, and client communication

• Integrate Claude with our current tech stack using API

• Build internal automations and agents using Claude Code, the Claude API, or Power Automate where useful

• Train our team

• Document everything so our team can self-serve

• Keep us updated on new Claude features and recommend improvements



Must-Have Skills

• Strong hands-on experience with Claude (Projects, Artifacts, MCP connectors, Claude Code, API)

• Solid understanding of prompt engineering and context management

• Workflow automation experience (Power Automate, Zapier, Make, n8n, or custom scripts)

• Comfortable working with APIs and basic scripting (Python or JavaScript preferred)

• Excellent written English

• Able to explain technical concepts clearly to non-technical users



Nice to Have

• Experience working with law firms or other professional services

• Familiarity with legal tech tools that integrate with Microsoft (MyCase, Monday, and etc.)

• Background in document management or knowledge management systems

• Experience with Microsoft Copilot for comparison/integration purposes

• Experience with other AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini)



What We Offer

• $8-$10 USD/hour, paid in US dollars

• Full-time hours (40/week)

• Long-term, stable role with a growing firm

• Opportunity to shape how AI is used across the entire company



How to Apply

Please send:

1. A short intro about yourself and your Claude experience

2. Links or screenshots of Claude projects, automations, or prompts you’ve built.

3. Your earliest start date

4. Submit your resume



Screening question (please answer in your application): Describe one workflow you built using Claude that saved meaningful time for a team or client. What made it work?



Applications without an answer to the screening question will not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant for Etsy - Production Design
description:
Position Type: Part-Time

Hours: 30 hours per week (may become full time, we are a growing company)



A. Key Duties and Responsibilities:



1. Order Organization & Data Management – Update spreadsheets, upload files and information to Google Drive, and keep all order details organized and accurate.

2. Laser Design & Production – Design and edit files in a program called: LightBurn (laser-cut or laser-engraved products) following our specific settings and production guidelines. The program is easy to learn.

3. Product Mockups & Personalization – Create clean, professional mockups and custom designs using Kittl and Canva for customer previews and listings. All mockups, graphics, text personalization, and print-ready files can be handled in these tools. Adjust to changes requested by the customers.

4. Team Communication – Provide exceptional written English communication with customers and clear spoken English with the company team.



Note on LightBurn:

If you have no prior experience with LightBurn, that is okay—we provide training. We simply ask that you research the software before applying and be ready to discuss it in your Loom video. LightBurn is the dedicated program we use to prepare files for our laser engraver. Key functions include importing vector/raster files (SVG, DXF, PNG, JPG), working with layers for different engraving/cutting settings, creating shapes and text, and previewing designs before production.



IMPORTANT: This is a remote position that requires a genuine commitment to continuous learning, and adapting. We are looking for a long-term partnership. If you are looking or have a second job - it can't take away from this one. We have a zero tolerance for mediocrity due to lack of commitment. 





B. About Our Company:



Join a thriving Etsy shop specializing in custom laser-engraved products. We are passionate about delivering high-quality, personalized items to customers worldwide, fostering creativity and excellence in every order. Our small team is dedicated to providing exceptional products and a delightful customer experience through our handmade creations.



C. Application, Timeline & Instructions

(If you do not take the time to read and follow the instructions, you will not be considered.)

1. As part of our hiring process, please submit a Loom video (3–5 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you would be an excellent fit for this role. In your video, please cover the following:



2. Etsy and E-commerce Experience: Share your experience with Etsy or other e-commerce platforms. Highlight any relevant tasks you’ve managed and why you feel comfortable working on these platforms.

Design Experience: Discuss your experience with design tools, specifically Canva, Kittl, and LightBurn. (Adobe products and video editing software are not required for this role.)



3. LightBurn Research: Describe what you’ve researched about LightBurn (a laser engraving design program). In your own words, explain what it is, its key functions, and how you would approach learning and using it effectively if you have no prior experience.



4. Customer Service Experience: Discuss your experience managing customers in writing. Provide one example of a positive customer interaction (what you did well and what you might improve). Then share an example of a negative customer experience and what you would do differently next time.



5. Why should we hire you?



Note: Also please make sure to check this platform. We won't be
ing you personally. We will respond through messages.



C. Who You Are:



1. Tech-savvy, self-motivated, and quick to learn new design software (especially LightBurn).

2. Proactive—you spot tasks that need to be done and complete them without constant direction.

3. Detail-oriented and able to follow precise instructions while producing accurate designs and files.

4. An excellent written and spoken English communicator who maintains a professional, friendly tone.

5. Adaptable and comfortable in a fast-paced environment where order volume can fluctuate.

6. Open to feedback, eager to improve, and excited to build a long-term role with us.



D. Benefits:



1. Fully remote work with flexible hours.

2. Supportive, creative team that values your input and growth.

3. Opportunity for professional development and increased hours based on performance.

4. Opportunity for growth.



We look forward to watching your Loom video and learning more about you.

- Stay current with trends in ad design and DTC creative performance



Qualifications:

- At least 2 years of experience in graphic design and video editing for digital marketing.

- Advanced skills in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects).

- Proven experience creating high-converting static and motion ads for Meta, TikTok, or Google.

- Strong eye for layout, color, typography, and brand consistency.

- Experience editing UGC and social proof content for performance-driven campaigns.

- Able to follow creative briefs, meet tight deadlines, and collaborate well with remote teams.

- Portfolio demonstrating versatility across static design, motion, and video editing.





-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





CREATIVE STRATEGIST



The Creative Strategist will own the research, ideation, and optimization of creative assets across paid ads,
/SMS, landing pages, and UGC. They'll translate brand goals, market data, and consumer psychology into briefs, scripts, and testing roadmaps, partnering with designers, editors, media buyers, and UGC creators to execute.



This role focuses on conversion optimization and creative direction — guiding creative generalists, reviewing and approving output, and ensuring all creatives are aligned with CRO goals. The strategist does not handle direct web design, but must have strong CRO experience to boost campaign effectiveness.



Key Responsibilities:

- Analyze client creative performance, benchmark competitors, and identify positioning and messaging opportunities across the full funnel.

- Develop creative roadmaps for DTC brands, concept new hooks and angles, and build testing frameworks across multiple ad formats.

- Create detailed UGC briefs, collaborate with creators through production, and curate social proof for ads and owned channels.

- Partner with media buyers and cross-functional teams to ensure creative aligns with funnel stages, KPIs, and brand standards.

- Guide creative generalists and support
/SMS and CRO-focused landing page strategy without executing web design.

- Track and interpret performance data, document insights, and iterate continuously to optimize campaigns.

- Present strategies, testing plans, and performance recaps to clients and internal leadership to support retention and revenue goals.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and creative strategy for digital marketing.

- Ability to analyze creative performance metrics and translate data insights into actionable design or messaging improvements.

- Strong leadership and feedback skills to guide generalists and align creative output with performance goals.

title: Social Media Content Strategist *Superstar Only*
description:
We're hiring a Social Media Content Strategist to lead the creative vision, ideation, and strategic direction behind our short-form content engine across Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. This is the senior creative role on the social team. You are the person who has the ideas - who watches a long-form episode and immediately knows which fifteen seconds will stop a scroll, who sees a cultural 
nt and already has three concepts ready before anyone asks.



You will be working directly with a creator who has over 4 million followers across platforms, with Instagram as the primary channel. Our content operation is structured like a studio with batch production, performance metrics, and AI-native systems. You own the creative engine - the ideas, the concepts, the narrative direction, and the quality standard. You manage the Content Producer who handles daily execution, publishing, and platform operations. Together you run a system that produces high-volume, high-quality content every day.



This is a full-time remote position. We are looking for a senior creative operator who generates ideas naturally, understands modern platform dynamics at a deep level, actively integrates AI into workflows, and holds every piece of content to an elite standard. A genuine interest in health, beauty, and strong visual aesthetics is essential - this is the world we operate in, and you need to live and breathe it.



Responsibilities

- Generate and develop original content ideas, concepts, and creative angles on a continuous basis. You are the primary source of what we make and why.

- Identify high-retention 
nts within long-form content and develop them into short-form concepts with clear hooks, narrative arcs, and platform-specific angles.

- Develop creative briefs and direction for each content cycle, giving the Content Producer and editors clear guidance on what to build and how it should feel.

- Lead trend research and cultural awareness across TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts, spotting opportunities early and translating them into on-brand concepts.

- Translate brand strategy into high-performing content concepts, story structures, and creative playbooks that guide all short-form output.

- Define and evolve the brand's visual and tonal identity across platforms, maintaining a cohesive and premium creative standard.

- Direct and approve content through production and post-production, ensuring quality, creative alignment, and platform-ready formatting before anything publishes.

- Manage the Content Producer by setting priorities, providing creative direction, reviewing output, and ensuring disciplined execution of the publishing calendar.

- Analyze performance data at a strategic level, identifying what is working, why it is working, and how to double down or pivot.

- Build and optimize repeatable creative systems, including AI-driven workflows that streamline ideation, editing, and production.

- Partner with the production team to ensure social-first thinking is embedded in long-form content capture and planning.



Requirements

- 5+ years of experience in a creative strategy or production leadership role in digital media, YouTube, branded content, or entertainment with proven results.

- A natural idea generator who consistently develops strong content concepts, creative angles, and fresh approaches without waiting to be briefed.

- Genuine interest in health, beauty, and aesthetics. You naturally follow this space, understand the visual standards, and care about how things look and feel.

- Deep fluency in platform culture and trends. You know what is trending, why it is working, and how to adapt it to a creator's voice without losing authenticity.

- Strong understanding of storytelling, pacing, hooks, and modern platform dynamics across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and emerging formats.

- Demonstrated experience managing at least one direct report and owning creative and performance outcomes.

- Proven ability to operate across creative strategy and production logistics while maintaining high quality standards.

- Editing and design literacy. You do not need to be the hands-on editor, but you must be able to direct editors and designers with precise, actionable feedback.

- AI-forward operator who actively integrates AI into creative and production workflows. Bonus for familiarity with tools such as Runway, VEO or Flow, ChatGPT, or Claude.

- Strong editorial judgment. You can look at a piece of content and immediately know what is missing, what is not working, and how to fix it.

- Excellent communication skills and ability to give clear, concise creative direction.

- Must submit a strong portfolio demonstrating creative direction, ideation, and platform-native content across multiple formats.

- Recognized for exceptional achievements such as attaining Latin Honors (Summa Cum Laude, Magna Cum Laude, Cum Laude), performance awards, or demonstrating fast career progression into higher roles.



Results

- A consistent pipeline of strong content ideas and creative concepts that drive the team's output forward.

- Trending sounds, formats, and cultural 
nts consistently identified and turned into on-brand content before they peak.

- A high-functioning creative system with predictable output and strong quality control.

- Content that reinforces the creator's positioning while maintaining consistency and a premium standard across platforms.

- Measurable increase in traffic from short-form content to long-form assets.



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of handling video production workflows.

- High-speed internet connection plus backup.

- Conducive work environment.



Working Schedule

- Full-time remote position.



Compensation

- Salary will be based on skills, speed, portfolio output, and experience.



Benefits

- Competitive salary.

- Paid Time Off from day one, increasing to 10 days annually after six months with the company.

- Training and development opportunities.

- Opportunity to contribute to a rapidly expanding content team producing world-class creator content.

- Great potential for career advancement into leadership positions.



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.
